name: Biden HQ
subject: Peter, the President needs you to donate to this email today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
If you have been waiting for the absolute perfect time... | | |
---
Peter -- If you have been waiting for the absolute perfect time to make your first online donation to President Biden's reelection campaign, we are here to tell you that TODAY is that day. Why today? There are the obvious reasons: defense of democracy, abortion access, protecting the _Affordable Care Act_ , and not letting Trump back into the White House for four more years of division and destruction. **But there's also the practical reason: We have very real fundraising goals we need to reach in order to win.** These are not arbitrary goals. They are numbers we must reach to fund a campaign that can beat what Trump and the outside groups are spending to beat us. And the fact is, almost all of our donations come in response to emails like this. **The President doesn't expect anyone to give to every email we send. But right now, we're in danger of falling behind on our goals for June, so he's really hoping you'll give to this one. clean_body: If you have been waiting for the absolute perfect time... | | | Peter -- If you have been waiting for the absolute perfect time to make your first online donation to President Biden's reelection campaign, we are here to tell you that TODAY is that day. Why today? There are the obvious reasons: defense of democracy, abortion access, protecting the Affordable Care Act , and not letting Trump back into the White House for four more years of division and destruction. But there's also the practical reason: We have very real fundraising goals we need to reach in order to win. These are not arbitrary goals. They are numbers we must reach to fund a campaign that can beat what Trump and the outside groups are spending to beat us. And the fact is, almost all of our donations come in response to emails like this. The President doesn't expect anyone to give to every email we send. But right now, we're in danger of falling behind on our goals for June, so he's really hoping you'll give to this one. What do you say? | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for stepping up to help the President today. The response to these messages is so important. Biden HQ

“The right to initiative is a key feature of Alaska’s governance. Our Supreme Court has reiterated on several occasions that the right to initiative is not to be defeated by technical rule violations,” Judge Rankin said, citing a 2006 Alaska Supreme Court decision. Furthermore, the Anchorage Superior judge said the plaintiffs’ argument constitutes “precisely the type of technical rule violation that warrants application of the constitutional principle of interpreting legislative procedures in favor of placing initiatives on the ballot.” The judge said she will allow the plaintiffs to further argue their case based on expert testimony, which could point to other discrepancies relating to the signature-gathering process.We expect Soros & Friends aka Pro-RCV Groups to Appeal to Supreme Court. We expect the Superior Court to make a ruling by July 20th. We then expect them to appeal, which will drag us into August.

**\- Total RCV Implementation + Regular Election Costs + Special Election Costs: $11,093,006.41**** ****\- 328% Increase in Election Costs compared to election costs from 2010-2020, which used closed primaries and plurality or FPTP voting.**** ****\- RCV Election in 2022 cost the State of Alaska 328% of what a normal election costs.**
---
**Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.****The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**_**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**__**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**__**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_
---
This is who is funding the [#RankedChoiceVoting](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6687585ff0c68b6fc97a96c2&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_66875753d0469468d028fc80&l=en-US&s=tlbLqxeP9mSXaciganRgZx5y9go%3D) group in Alaska 1630 Fund Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,”
---
---
|
---
Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss has been channeling substantial funds into American state ballot initiatives through the 1630 Fund aka Sixteen Thirty Fund, a progressive advocacy group.As reported by Americans for Public Trust, Wyss’s donations, which total around $243 million to the group, have been instrumental in influencing policies across various states, with a significant focus on Michigan. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes.https://thefederalist.com/2024/04/18/dark-money-group-backed-by-foreign-billionaire-has-dumped-100-million-into-state-ballot-initiatives/1630 Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. At some point, one must question when the regulators and government officials, elected to safeguard citizens, become tools manipulated by these malicious actors to act against the citizens they are meant to protect.(e.g. we have been attacked 4 times so far 3 times using state offices, we have been spied on, harassed, and our reputations damaged nationwide all because we were trying to address an election system we didn't feel was a good fit for Alaska)I hope you take this threat to your State Seriously, they are incredibly well funded and they are hell bent on making changes to the State of Alaska. This is one of those cases of too big to fail, where you will attack Alaskans and regular people, but applying these rules to a Swiss Billionaire is outside your job and expectations. As a citizen it saddens me to learn that millionaires and billionaires have more influence on a state and the way the state operates than the people who live here.Phil IzonPer State Statutes:**Sec. 15.13.068. Expenditures and contributions by foreign-influenced corporations and foreign nationals.
** (a) A foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national may not, directly or indirectly, in connection with an election under this chapter, make a contribution or expenditure or make an express or implied promise to make a contribution or expenditure.

(b) The provisions of this section prohibit a foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national from making a contribution or expenditure in connection with a state election only to the

clean_body: Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | | | “The right to initiative is a key feature of Alaska’s governance. Our Supreme Court has reiterated on several occasions that the right to initiative is not to be defeated by technical rule violations,” Judge Rankin said, citing a 2006 Alaska Supreme Court decision. Furthermore, the Anchorage Superior judge said the plaintiffs’ argument constitutes “precisely the type of technical rule violation that warrants application of the constitutional principle of interpreting legislative procedures in favor of placing initiatives on the ballot.” The judge said she will allow the plaintiffs to further argue their case based on expert testimony, which could point to other discrepancies relating to the signature-gathering process.We expect Soros & Friends aka Pro-RCV Groups to Appeal to Supreme Court. We expect the Superior Court to make a ruling by July 20th. We then expect them to appeal, which will drag us into August. | Watch The Debate Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) vs Approval Voting vs STAR Voting vs No Change, hosted by Braver Angels in Southern California, in this debate, Phil Izon who wrote the Repeal of Ranked Choice Voting, is going against the supposed father of Ranked Choice Voting in Oakland and San Francisco. | | | | | Please let me know what you think, my first book about Ranked Choice Voting was 320 pages. This one is only 100 pages and it can be read in a couple hours. My first book is available on on our | | | | | | | The Chair of the Democratic National Committee DNC Jaime Harrison “The 2024 election will be the first time Alaska voters elect a president using ranked-choice voting...Harrison told Alaska Democrats that with ranked-choice voting, Biden “really has a chance to win this state.” | \- Total RCV Implementation + Regular Election Costs + Special Election Costs: $11,093,006.41 \- 328% Increase in Election Costs compared to election costs from 2010-2020, which used closed primaries and plurality or FPTP voting. \- RCV Election in 2022 cost the State of Alaska 328% of what a normal election costs. Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.Their new Incorporation is their top donor.Then "Article Four from Virginia"Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C." This is who is funding the group in Alaska 1630 Fund Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,” | Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss has been channeling substantial funds into American state ballot initiatives through the 1630 Fund aka Sixteen Thirty Fund, a progressive advocacy group.As reported by Americans for Public Trust, Wyss’s donations, which total around $243 million to the group, have been instrumental in influencing policies across various states, with a significant focus on Michigan. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes. Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. At some point, one must question when the regulators and government officials, elected to safeguard citizens, become tools manipulated by these malicious actors to act against the citizens they are meant to protect.(e.g. we have been attacked 4 times so far 3 times using state offices, we have been spied on, harassed, and our reputations damaged nationwide all because we were trying to address an election system we didn't feel was a good fit for Alaska)I hope you take this threat to your State Seriously, they are incredibly well funded and they are hell bent on making changes to the State of Alaska. This is one of those cases of too big to fail, where you will attack Alaskans and regular people, but applying these rules to a Swiss Billionaire is outside your job and expectations. As a citizen it saddens me to learn that millionaires and billionaires have more influence on a state and the way the state operates than the people who live here.Phil IzonPer State Statutes:Sec. 15.13.068. Expenditures and contributions by foreign-influenced corporations and foreign nationals. (a) A foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national may not, directly or indirectly, in connection with an election under this chapter, make a contribution or expenditure or make an express or implied promise to make a contribution or expenditure. name: Christine Drazan
subject: Let’s honor our freedom together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Christine Drazan
body:
and unite for a stronger America
Friend,As we come together to celebrate this great day, I want to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a joyous and meaningful Independence Day.On this day, 248 years ago, our Founding Fathers boldly declared our independence, giving birth to a nation founded on the principles of freedom, liberty, and justice. Their courage and vision have given us the incredible gift of living in the greatest country on earth. Here in Oregon, and across our nation, we are united by a shared love for our country and a commitment to preserving the freedoms that define us. Our strength lies in our unity and in our unwavering dedication to the values that make America exceptional.I am deeply honored to stand with you in defending these principles. Together, we will continue to work towards a brighter future for our families, our communities, and our nation.Enjoy the fireworks, the parades, and the time spent with family and friends. Let us remember the sacrifices made by those who came before us and honor their legacy by staying true to the ideals of liberty and justice for all.Sincerely, Christine Drazan [](https://andor.createsend7.com/t/y-l-mjjdhhd-dihkkhuuli-r/)[](https://andor.createsend7.com/t/y-l-mjjdhhd-dihkkhuuli-y/)[](https://andor.createsend7.com/t/y-l-mjjdhhd-dihkkhuuli-j/) Paid for by Friends of Christine Drazan. body:
I can’t help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. | | | [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3ed2974770d343f5b5a8bc4a3e002ca7&_e=_Pf74uXt-Igg6kQiu557Gs7OP3bm9rzbMt5CvF0cuUv_0j3h88yEvmtGT2kCizKWhJ92KWovvfvKK_VH2mTBUAzpDO5ziSQ-U_-HACLSBKaduNsGHpFRk0b8n5agAmtJgs01bJfY_rCfaBaMC5FXGXYdIW3RHE5kKWnc_g0VDe3-E6VcpCCE3Ykq8J_ASoi7w7_GSzNYU2WJcd8iMaOlFnU2dDM7PNt68paz975cktYZhc7AUlM7NVzqgHmMFJJ-6IYG98ZuBpfLzw-eOiOie-ZxgqIHWj-YTGD9-6owuCcLb47FHBgAy1Z-P79AvOOj0IhE5Loi0X3pEIOqKLh1POxAuomro8xGZYzSugRZuAvKc2a2q-8BCJ4y2YhWz-vFymejNN82BDnlZUhyWr9f_A%3D%3D)

| | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3ed2974770d343f5b5a8bc4a3e002ca7&_e=_Pf74uXt-Igg6kQiu557Gs7OP3bm9rzbMt5CvF0cuUv_0j3h88yEvmtGT2kCizKWhJ92KWovvfvKK_VH2mTBUAzpDO5ziSQ-U_-HACLSBKaduNsGHpFRk0b8n5agAmtJgs01bJfY_rCfaBaMC5FXGXYdIW3RHE5kKWnc_g0VDe3-E6VcpCCE3Ykq8J_ASoi7w7_GSzNYU2WJcd8iMaOlFnU2dDM7PNt68paz975cktYZhc7AUlM7NVzqgHmMFJJ-D47jQQFnrapuugLrb0QtUQWNta_cxmIxl0XGo98D_m-UkzCF4wqsq8BxqE-_HSc_gokZkYG589hnakOrnirg1-gXWaYsvPQmer7Tokt7vbLhGp_EJWkvebc7sHr4N2wyIEBjWZH1uIIeQTgVbU7MYg%3D%3D)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3ed2974770d343f5b5a8bc4a3e002ca7&_e=_Pf74uXt-Igg6kQiu557Gs7OP3bm9rzbMt5CvF0cuUv_0j3h88yEvmtGT2kCizKWhJ92KWovvfvKK_VH2mTBUAzpDO5ziSQ-U_-HACLSBKaduNsGHpFRk0b8n5agAmtJgs01bJfY_rCfaBaMC5FXGXYdIW3RHE5kKWnc_g0VDe3-E6VcpCCE3Ykq8J_ASoi7w7_GSzNYU2WJcd8iMaOlFnU2dDM7PNt68paz975cktYZhc7AUlM7NVzqgHmMFJJ-9-_BJCHttF46m67eUOIrd4OBoN2StKX45CfQMQDh3gjDTUTJ0C4CQreM1n2s1Z-rEr8kY1YE-w1cdOCd8AlqiBe9wTbD7-F41BmKwgnQpLh4vi5QpjIVEKy_C5lrXmczbSCEFB9GYCY8WBJ9C1wi1A%3D%3D) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!

clean_body: I can’t help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. | | | | | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: Be careful what you wish for. I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you! | | | | Steve Garvey #6 | | | P.S. Adam Schiff had $35 million in the bank. Well, reports are now coming out that he spent upwards of $25 million in the primary and is down to $10 million in the bank. Make no mistake, while his cash advantage is greatly diminished, as I write these words, Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are quickly reloading. The ActBlue political machine has the capacity to pump millions into his race in the blink of an eye. You and I cannot give them any daylight. Please don't delay. | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 |

name: Scott Jensen
subject: Independence Day Message to Walz
body:
Joe Biden's fitness to serve | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/independence-day-walz?e=9828080a05)

| | Peter,

Earlier this week, Tim Walz called Joe Biden "[fit for office](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=680879ef69&e=9828080a05)." On this 4th of July, I felt compelled to make a [video about that assertion](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=81df3a05f4&e=9828080a05).

It is time for Governor Tim Walz to stop gaslighting Americans with your Joe Biden political cheerleading!

We see and hear with our own eyes and ears. We think independently and capably-you insult us. Everyday American patriots know that Independence Day demands a price, and that price means standing in the ARENA, not on the sidelines listening to cheap partisan rhetoric. [Please watch this video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=64f837eabe&e=9828080a05) by clicking the thumbnail below:

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor

name: Tina Smith
subject: Happy Independence Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi there, Happy Independence Day! I hope you get to spend this holiday with family and friends in celebration and reflection on our nation’s history. As I reflect on that history, I’m reminded of how far we’ve come and the people who got us to where we are today. We are indebted to their vision of democracy and their faith that a better future is possible. Those who came before us fought the most challenging of fights to make a difference. Little by little, they chipped away and created immense progress for us — and we owe it to future generations to continue those fights. From reproductive rights to climate protections, gun safety to Social Security, there is more work to do to protect the rights and freedoms of those ahead of us. I’m taking this holiday as an opportunity to renew my fight for progress. I’m going to keep working to pass bills that protect abortion access everywhere, tackle the climate crisis, expand the Supreme Court, abolish the filibuster, and restore our democracy. So today, as you celebrate our revolutionary beginnings, I humbly ask that you join me in recommitting to the important work ahead. Thank you, and I hope you have a happy Fourth of July! — Tina
---
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---
Tina Smith for Minnesota
PO Box 14362
St. Paul, MN 55114
United States

body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | July 04, 2024

Barack Obama doesn't
hold back in latest betrayal of President Biden

The former president used to be incredibly close to Joe
Biden. But that relationship is changing fast.

And Barack Obama doesn't hold
back in his latest betrayal of President Biden.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Top Democrat disavows
Biden and now 2024 is up in the air

The Left are eating
their own. There's no telling who's going to come out on top.
➞ Continue Reading

Kamala Harris buries her
head in the sand after this humiliating video of her was released

The vice president
continues to make a mockery of herself and her office. Her
ability to make embarrassing gaffes is comparable to President
Joe Biden's.
➞ Continue Reading

MSNBC's Joy Reid has a
mental breakdown on camera that's shocked Americans

Reid is a radical
Leftist who is quick to prop up the Democrat's propaganda. But
now she's lost her mind in the process.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

| | Dear Friends, Happy Independence Day! 🇺🇸🎇🇺🇸As we come together to celebrate July 4th, it's important to reflect on the roots of this pivotal day and what it truly stands for. Independence Day marks the adoption of the Declaration of Independence in 1776, a momentous occasion that enshrined the values of liberty, equality, and the pursuit of happiness. These are the bedrock principles of our democracy, and they resonate deeply with all of us, regardless of our backgrounds. July 4th is more than just a day of fireworks and barbecues. It is a day to celebrate the hard-won freedoms that allow us to express ourselves, gather with loved ones, and engage in the democratic process. This celebration is a testament to our collective strength and commitment to the ideals that unite us as a nation. It is a day to honor the sacrifices made by countless individuals who have fought for our rights and freedoms, from the early patriots to the civil rights activists who paved the way for a more inclusive society. As we light up the sky with fireworks and fill the air with laughter and joy, let us remember that our democracy thrives when we participate with the right intentions. At a time when democracy can feel unsteady for many, it is crucial to celebrate with a renewed commitment to maintaining and strengthening it. We must ensure that every voice is heard, every vote is counted, and every individual is treated with dignity and respect. In Orange County, I am committed to bringing these values to the forefront. As your representative, I will work tirelessly to protect our individual freedoms and promote equality for all. I will advocate for policies that ensure everyone can enjoy the same rights and opportunities. My vision is to create a community where everyone feels valued and empowered to contribute to our shared future. Let's take a moment to reflect on a significant historical event: On July 4, 1827, New York abolished slavery, marking a pivotal step towards freedom and equality. This day is a reminder of our ongoing journey towards a more just and inclusive society. It reminds us that the fight for freedom and equality is far from over and that we must continue to strive for a better future for all. As we celebrate this Independence Day, let us do so with a spirit of unity and positivity. Let us come together to honor our democracy and the principles that make our nation great. Most importantly, let us commit to working towards a future where liberty and justice truly exist for all. Wishing you a safe and joyous Fourth of July. Let's celebrate with intention and purpose, ensuring that our democracy remains strong and vibrant for generations to come. Warm regards, Dom Jones🇺🇸🎇

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: What President Trump said about my book
body:
My brand-new book — Right Wing Revolution: How to Beat the Woke and Save the West — has just been released...

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0h5ralm28vl5aph1oqcl3muti4hguk4m2u5v2d0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmcpr4sth2bs)
---
Friend, My brand-new book — _Right Wing Revolution: How to Beat the Woke and Save the West —_ has just been released... ...and I want you to be one of the FIRST to get your hands on a FREE copy of this must-read guide to WINNING the American Culture War!
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfpn166crssnhcatkff1qfqvnc7sse462cufjvlo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmcpr4sth2bs)
---
**[Friend, will you claim your FREE copy of Right Wing Revolution today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount, even just $5, to help support Turning Point USA. ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zns20ja3ah8pk9qmh6pkqob40araptjhio6crhu8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmcpr4sth2bs)**
---
[**Claim your FREE book now**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6sr97521pfrtesi7ofvlgakr0ov3vupc01nsp4o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmcpr4sth2bs)
---
---
**I was HONORED when****President Donald Trump****posted the following on X, with my emphasis added:** “Great Patriot Charlie Kirk, Head of Turning Point USA, has a wonderful new Book coming out next week, ‘RIGHT WING REVOLUTION.’ **It is a MUST READ****for those who want to take our Country back from the Radical Left Lunatics who are destroying it.** This will be very helpful reading for those looking to Save our Nation.” Friend, you can understand why I want as many grassroots patriots as possible to receive and read _Right Wing Revolution_ right away! [**That’s why I’m making you a special offer: Make a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA today, and I’ll rush you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****.** ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zttrh3gmpd9rcm9152jvrn4oopul5t4ljt85jmn0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmcpr4sth2bs)
---
[**Claim your FREE book now**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjb0h5aq1ij2tb7gb2o44gqlbg91os7pffckat20_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmcpr4sth2bs)
---
I wrote _Right Wing Revolution_ to provide a BOLD PLAN and a PRACTICAL GUIDE to taking on the “Woke” Left — and WINNING the American Culture War. Because as I’ve seen from 10+ years of traveling to schools from coast to coast — speaking with THOUSANDS of young people and reaching MILLIONS more online — the “Woke” Left has nearly completed the TOTAL DESTRUCTION of our shared American values, our history, and our way of life through their vicious lies. With _Right Wing Revolution_ as our guide, I truly believe that the Turning Point USA movement can take back our SCHOOLS, our CULTURE, and our COUNTRY with a restoration of FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM. [**Please don’t miss your chance to receive a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****. All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount, even $5, to help support the incredible work of Turning Point USA to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!** ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z14c71jqdr182oodvdt3is4ctrro7oqbv8vro0po_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmcpr4sth2bs)
---
[**Claim your FREE book now**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu22p9jj61phqbm3s9fqpd7pflerg3qnj532igj0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmcpr4sth2bs)
---
Working together, we have already launched a revolution among young people — along with GENERATIONAL CHANGE in favor of AMERICAN GREATNESS — and now it’s time to go EVEN BIGGER! Friend, _Right Wing Revolution_ isn’t just another book warning about the dangers of racist, sexist, hateful, Marxist “Woke” ideology. _Instead, it’s a comprehensive BATTLE PLAN to defeating the “Woke” Left and WINNING the American Culture War._ [**Please claim your FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****right away by making your gift of ANY amount, even just $5, to help support Turning Point USA.** ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1ecakodq37sh3rs5e399m3ecc0mtjv7e57tgfkg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmcpr4sth2bs) Thank YOU for your support of Turning Point USA and your PATRIOTISM and MORAL COURAGE.
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zna1scvqd8ali6t59u1sgqi11cgpl375ni14get0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmaob2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbphb80eo27190a7mgj19otafgnumfq0hs5t9qk0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmaob2cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpqt68rg1hds2bcgvhc0spmp0vtabcs4u5auulh0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmaob2cjh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8a1k73g3gbdlcqlc77lad2v9ektrcnhvnv991q0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmaob2cjh2bs)**
---

name: SIGN OUR LETTER [From House GOP]
subject: Dear President Trump –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
“Before you accept the formal Republican nomination, I want you to know that I am honored to give you my whole-hearted SUPPORT!”

| |

---
| | | Friend -

**President Donald J. Trump will take the stage in Milwaukee in two short weeks to formally accept the Republican nomination for president.** He has overwhelming support from our Conservative movement and we can't wait until he's officially our nominee.

Despite everything the Radical Left has thrown at him, President Trump has come out on top with his head held high. That's why we're asking you to sign our letter of support for President Trump before one of the biggest moments of his life!

---
| | [SIGN OUR LETTER >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z9mt281v319n8t22lfq9sqpkucvbmhjni67qvn38_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm6pj4cdh2bs "SIGN OUR LETTER")
---

Dear President Trump -

**Before you accept the formal Republican nomination, I want you to know that I am honored to give you my wholehearted support!**

You could have left it all behind and retired as a successful businessman and incredible President. But you didn't. You are running again to save our country and finish the job you started. And if you are still here fighting for us, then I will keep fighting for YOU.

It is the very least I can do after you have stood strong through:

- Biden's DOJ raiding your home
- Shameful indictments in four jurisdictions
- Unprecedented attempts to remove you from the ballot
- An unspeakable guilty verdict for phony charges
- Corrupt efforts to strip your presidential immunity

You didn't deserve any of it. You have made your only end goal clear since day one: **Make America Great Again.**

I want you to know that you have my vote and I won't waver in my support for you. I look forward to watching you formally accept the GOP nomination.

You deserve it!

God bless you,

X______________

| [SIGN OUR LETTER >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zibgs9dpdcgt6nlia94aqu3bhjqrec3t2eudctfg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm6pj4cdh2bs "SIGN OUR LETTER")
---

If there was ever a time to show Trump how much we support him, it's right here and now! Every Patriot who adds their name to our letter will be flagged for his campaign.

_**[And if you want to help Republicans sweep the House, Senate AND White House, please chip in a few bucks using any of these secure links to split a donation with President Trump.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zvs0on4j89c8qgbtlsu0oarfo9h2isu59co749og_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm6pj4cdh2bs "And if you want to help Republicans sweep the House, Senate and White House, please chip in a few bucks using any of these secure links to split a donation with President Trump.")**_

Thanks for all you do.

- House GOP

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zoc16579tu7sn1tpjs070lm42spe12nkgvahnu88_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm6pj4cdh2bs "Please take my Election Year Check-In!")
---

It's Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zut9n6s3h33d2jbq20dri47k2p4ogbrq59fou2a0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm6pj4cdh2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

_What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats?_ | | [START YOUR CHECK-IN ->](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zo6nba30oq2nl3ptarm3lrp2j4bp6j1ujlc84qc0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm6pj4cdh2bs "START YOUR CHECK-IN →")

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: It’s official. I’ve been disbarred
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
New York communists have taken away my law license.

New York communists have taken away my law license.
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0pruo5mhp8p59rs9ee8bsrd7p6tpofgj32q7oig_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm6pj4c3h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
I want you to hear this __directly__ from me. My law license has been **TAKEN AWAY** by the same New York Democrats who are trying to SENTENCE President Trump to prison this fall.
---
**_I did absolutely _nothing_ wrong._**
---
_The vengeful Democrats simply want to destroy me for serving as President Trump’s lawyer and for refusing to drop to my knees and surrender to the Deep State tyrants who are killing America._
---
This tragic news comes as we celebrate America’s 248th birthday and pay homage to our Founding Fathers who were willing to lay down their lives to choose liberty over tyranny. _They would’ve rather died on their feet than lived on their knees._
---
_248 years later, our nation is now once again teetering on the brink of tyranny._
---
**But please make no mistake: I am _not_ writing this letter to you with a sense of defeat or surrender.**
---
If I didn’t surrender when the FBI came knocking on my door in a dawn raid, then you better believe I’m not giving up now! Our Founding Fathers didn’t surrender to tyranny. _Neither can we_.
---
When I was unjustly arrested in Atlanta alongside President Trump, Crooked Joe’s accomplices filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757**.

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Your America is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvqj1857g10p31b3n677gjhfnh1k4df84ggkk65g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmeoj4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za2t33faqdk1auu5b02u450ej3l23ffs4gqtck20_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmeoj4cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9ovfptu8uarbbiur24gj7c6te3nostpn4qsetkg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmeoj4cjh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr10sggulo6f5v6opnodm09m3cannefo5jpqr068_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmeoj4cjh2bs)**
---

subject: It’s official. I’ve been disbarred

body:
New York communists have taken away my law license.

New York communists have taken away my law license.
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8tm5li1lf8a5mdbbq3esbe4nuguhdppdg7okp68_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmeoj4cph2bs)
---
Friend,
---
I want you to hear this __directly__ from me. My law license has been **TAKEN AWAY** by the same New York Democrats who are trying to SENTENCE President Trump to prison this fall.
---
**_I did absolutely _nothing_ wrong._**
---
_The vengeful Democrats simply want to destroy me for serving as President Trump’s lawyer and for refusing to drop to my knees and surrender to the Deep State tyrants who are killing America._
---
This tragic news comes as we celebrate America’s 248th birthday and pay homage to our Founding Fathers who were willing to lay down their lives to choose liberty over tyranny. _They would’ve rather died on their feet than lived on their knees._
---
_248 years later, our nation is now once again teetering on the brink of tyranny._
---
**But please make no mistake: I am _not_ writing this letter to you with a sense of defeat or surrender.**
---
If I didn’t surrender when the FBI came knocking on my door in a dawn raid, then you better believe I’m not giving up now! Our Founding Fathers didn’t surrender to tyranny. _Neither can we_.
---
When I was unjustly arrested in Atlanta alongside President Trump, Crooked Joe’s accomplices filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757**.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb3188gfj4vratfi6ircvduuvofdh5nfruo5pifo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjmeoj4cph2bs)

name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: We have a problem. A big one.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I briefed President Trump on America’s most classified matters of national security while Director of CIA.

| |

---
| | | I endured the gauntlet of West Point Military Academy, then boot camp, then became a Tank Platoon Leader in the final days of the Cold War.

I briefed President Trump on America's most classified matters of national security while Director of CIA.

And I stood eye-to-eye with the most dangerous dictators in the world as Trump's Secretary of State.

**It takes a lot to make me feel on edge. So the fact that I 'm even sending you this email should give you pause. **

Because I'm afraid we have a problem. A big one.

I just got word that Joe Biden and the Democrats are _closer than they 've ever been before_ to destroying our Conservative House Majority once and for all. The latest reports show they've stockpiled over $100,000,000 to defeat us in enough swing states to bring forth a COMPLETE LIBERAL TAKEOVER.

The ONLY THING standing in the way of Joe Biden having full control - and ramming through any radical policy he wants - is just a few competitive House seats. That's it.

I don't tell you this lightly and I know that's not what you want to see happen to our country.

_**[That's why I'm rushing to you, in partnership with Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise a game-changing one million dollars in the next 72 hours.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zss3n6p27t7oglpkg30tga5e6009imhjshjrkm1o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm9o36c1h2bs "That’s why I’m rushing to you, in partnership with Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise a game-changing one million dollars in the next 72 hours.")**_ I know what you're thinking... that's not enough runway to raise that much. But desperate times call for desperate measures. And if that's what it'll take to win, I'm willing to chase down every lead.

If all you can spare is ten or twenty bucks, that would be incredible. If you can afford more that's even better. I only ask that everyone give something.

Will you do what it takes to hand Joe Biden and the Democrats a humiliating defeat?
---
| | | [YES: I'LL PITCH IN TEN BUCKS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkuqn875kq9kvrl31sl7uuehq64rjhf49uov2bpo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm9o36c1h2bs "YES: I’LL PITCH IN TEN BUCKS")
---
| | | [YES: I'LL PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z32d333n8rdg3n3m1ulf1deu1ut9cii0aa82fcg0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm9o36c1h2bs "YES: I’LL PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [YES: I'LL PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7c20somopeh96ujsjqpkjm9sojc2i4l999ib33g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm9o36c1h2bs "YES: I’LL PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [I'LL PITCH IN ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdk9b8sp3shma0sf8qm298s8humun4k23gnpbvoo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm9o36c1h2bs "I’LL PITCH IN ANOTHER AMOUNT")
---
I know this is a lofty goal. I know there's not much time to hit it. It would be much easier to call it a day and not even try.

**But just giving up plays right into their hands. **

_**[That's why I'm taking the time to send you this email. Our path to success fully relies on EVERYONE pitching in SOMETHING. That's how we'll catch up to the Democrats and win this election in a landslide.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znq1r94to7eg6bomsegfc3n2tfc7acpbaq3pfiho_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm9o36c1h2bs "That’s why I’m taking the time to send you this email. Our path to success fully relies on EVERYONE pitching in SOMETHING. That’s how we’ll catch up to the Democrats and win this election in a landslide.")**_

Frankly, that's the only way. So I really hope you can step up when we need you the most.

Thank you. God bless you.
Mike Pompeo

---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zubta7rf8g2es7p5minb7q3aut9595t8dketcn5o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm9o36c1h2bs "Mike Pompeo")

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zetguc152ceiph6nsa65bbeg73ji9bksclm94rmo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chjm9o36c1h2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWEq6wyWNm

My name is Larry P. Arnn, and I'm the president of Hillsdale
College, a Christian liberal arts college in southern Michigan.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWEq6wyWNm

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

My name
is Larry P. Arnn, and I'm the president of Hillsdale College, a
Christian liberal arts college in southern Michigan. Hillsdale
was founded in 1844 with the mission of providing "sound
learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the blessings of civil
and religious liberty."

A few
years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World
Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great
Reset initiative.

What is
their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short,
they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab-the
founder and executive director of the Forum-wrote, "We need a
'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would
also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This
initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt
to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some
social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a
seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic
of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with
you.

In this
seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its
implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into
pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

Sign up
now using the secure link below, and we'll send the Great Reset
seminar lectures-absolutely free-directly to your inbox.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63355822:WEq6wyWNm:m:3:2627245898:A528949E30031FE8976CB2049841D8E2:r

Don't
miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the
defense of American liberty.

Use the
link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab-the founder and executive director of the Forum-wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures-absolutely free-directly to your inbox. Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Friend,

As much as the fake news media lies about Biden’s mental decline, there’s no denying it after the debate.

Every voter witnessed Biden crashing live on TV.

So, what’s next?

Some speculate Biden will be replaced. I don’t know for sure, but it seems like the media is preparing for Biden's departure.

This wasn’t a debate. It was a sacrifice to get rid of Biden.

Will Gavin Newsom become the new nominee? Will Kamala Harris?

Here’s the truth:

**It doesn’t matter who they choose next because, regardless of who they choose, Turning Point PAC is funding an unprecedented ballot-chasing program in all key battleground states.**

Here’s how you can help:

name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: We have a problem. A big one.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I briefed President Trump on America’s most classified matters of national security while Director of CIA.

| |

---
| | | I endured the gauntlet of West Point Military Academy, then boot camp, then became a Tank Platoon Leader in the final days of the Cold War.

I briefed President Trump on America's most classified matters of national security while Director of CIA.

And I stood eye-to-eye with the most dangerous dictators in the world as Trump's Secretary of State.

**It takes a lot to make me feel on edge. So the fact that I 'm even sending you this email should give you pause. **

Because I'm afraid we have a problem. A big one.

I just got word that Joe Biden and the Democrats are _closer than they 've ever been before_ to destroying our Conservative House Majority once and for all. The latest reports show they've stockpiled over $100,000,000 to defeat us in enough swing states to bring forth a COMPLETE LIBERAL TAKEOVER.

The ONLY THING standing in the way of Joe Biden having full control - and ramming through any radical policy he wants - is just a few competitive House seats. That's it.

I don't tell you this lightly and I know that's not what you want to see happen to our country.

But desperate times call for desperate measures. And if that's what it'll take to win, I'm willing to chase down every lead.

If all you can spare is ten or twenty bucks, that would be incredible. If you can afford more that's even better. I only ask that everyone give something.

Will you do what it takes to hand Joe Biden and the Democrats a humiliating defeat?

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Donald Trump just received a landmark court ruling that could change everything
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | July 05, 2024

Donald Trump just
received a landmark court ruling that could change everything

The former president has been smacked with legal woes
thanks to the corrupt Biden DOJ. But the tide may officially be
turning.

Because Donald Trump just
received a landmark court ruling that could change everything.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Barack Obama doesn't hold
back in latest betrayal of President Biden

The former president
used to be incredibly close to Joe Biden. But that relationship
is changing fast.
➞ Continue Reading

Top Democrat disavows
Biden and now 2024 is up in the air

The Left are eating
their own. There's no telling who's going to come out on top.
➞ Continue Reading

Kamala Harris buries her
head in the sand after this humiliating video of her was released

The vice president
continues to make a mockery of herself and her office. Her
ability to make embarrassing gaffes is comparable to President
Joe Biden's.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: We have a problem. A big one.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I briefed President Trump on America’s most classified matters of national security while Director of CIA.

| |

---
| | | I endured the gauntlet of West Point Military Academy, then boot camp, then became a Tank Platoon Leader in the final days of the Cold War.

I briefed President Trump on America's most classified matters of national security while Director of CIA.

And I stood eye-to-eye with the most dangerous dictators in the world as Trump's Secretary of State.

**It takes a lot to make me feel on edge. So the fact that I 'm even sending you this email should give you pause. **

Because I'm afraid we have a problem. A big one.

I just got word that Joe Biden and the Democrats are _closer than they 've ever been before_ to destroying our Conservative House Majority once and for all. The latest reports show they've stockpiled over $100,000,000 to defeat us in enough swing states to bring forth a COMPLETE LIBERAL TAKEOVER.

The ONLY THING standing in the way of Joe Biden having full control - and ramming through any radical policy he wants - is just a few competitive House seats. That's it.

I don't tell you this lightly and I know that's not what you want to see happen to our country.

_**[That's why I'm rushing to you, in partnership with Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise a game-changing one million dollars in the next 72 hours.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkT-P3CAUxD8N7rDgmT_eguKkk7uNojQpEQtvfUSALYx9l28fEemqa659mt-bGc3vu727mGJZf7iMpmZbD9sue3iX6L7lne51eyTMFhgIyjRl0vIhGHUDPfMBDdfAuAbO2PBm9Dx5eOJTujl4_Xw8bkEEF4TQTz0LcRui6X-YZpLNQjEYEVhXBY5Bca89Eazifj5S9K5k92ersf0dC7YhmbfW9oNMLwQWAsuB_qw4vsdSMYx-ywSWhi7Tnj0eSGDpBXCjWMJZMdDVnaUlbJ2fltr5GstKptdWTySgzpatd3l3cS1kev2Man--0F93PnI-qZu0jUvOpJCUa6kIKPywLYbv6_-7bKVhad36ojXTT5SA-jjL9eU-VBP295hSPJQmgq3ZxdRLD-3bo10G_gUAAP__uo-YQg "That’s why I’m rushing to you, in partnership with Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise a game-changing one million dollars in the next 72 hours.")**_ I know what you're thinking... that's not enough runway to raise that much. But desperate times call for desperate measures. And if that's what it'll take to win, I'm willing to chase down every lead.

If all you can spare is ten or twenty bucks, that would be incredible. If you can afford more that's even better. I only ask that everyone give something.

Will you do what it takes to hand Joe Biden and the Democrats a humiliating defeat?

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VKletOLXKXpSjkWWzICTAA~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VKletOLXKXpSjkWWzICTAA~~/AARclAA~~~) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VKletOLXKXpSjkWWzICTAA~~/AARclAA~~~)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VKletOLXKXpSjkWWzICTAA~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---

Restore Our Nation

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College ~~ Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. ~~ If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD: ~~ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. The “The Second World Wars” DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. ~~ Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

## ABC Plans to Air Biden Interview Tonight
In a change of plans, ABC News says it will air its interview with President Biden [in its entirety tonight](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGvozAQhH8NdIvMYjApXFwKipNy7ZXI4HWyT8ZGxgHl3z_51a_Z_TSjkUbz_zE_DHsOz39mI51dnM2a-aRZQQ8oZ1lb7YiQupp0q1C0oxK9qF-6w94ikrgNnVFiIWnGpRWjaZUbbp1TNWsUKIUSfSsKNILGUeFq5DBaibe-koIs55iar8ghv8j5TzwpNWvcaq9fOe9H1f2pcKpwuq6r2Y5QvAonCvA-KpwCXeXt0XPmtaBZVigq5AiGE7i397CwpQAcMqWT6QIOsCfeCHI5MYBLbM2nxBPc7-0e8vG3TtruF3vPx6AqKZ6bYf_TLf861KnxOwAA__-yHmsu) at 8 p.m. ET. The network originally planned to broadcast it on Sunday. The interview with ABC host George Stephanopoulos has grown in importance as Biden has struggled to move past last week's stumbling debate performance. This will be his highest-profile public appearance since then. On Wednesday, Biden [met with Democratic governors](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFytCAcB58GOxz8A4IFxdfY3demdBB-3nFRcZTT5O0zlzrNznY7sx-34ebTnNb7f7_AlSkPPpR0YjBcc1KDqqKbAIKs4BpDorFGaFE9XGfIGzkGr6UZW9vZoCVJ0mijBKyokiNBShihG_GWWsBaQ8Gr1kZFnWZKIKaS9_qZ01oemObvfGKvQ16q2T1K2Q4m_zHqGfXXddX42nYcRx1y_fpk1K-4Dkb9642ma7pGaUb9M4OPKWLlI2JJC7jdFh4x-gK-YZ_yvvg1oNpd3K40z-loDVPivvg0_7bLnyNORz8BAAD__27LXsY) and blamed his issues on a cold and jet lag. He told them he needed more sleep and would be ending his workdays by 8 p.m. He also reiterated that he was staying in the race. "_No one's pushing me out. I'm not leaving_ ," he reportedly told his staff.
## Saks to Buy Neiman Marcus for $2.65 Billion
The iconic Neiman Marcus department store chain is [being sold to HBC](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsULGOhCAU_BrsNM8HAhYU19DttVcaVp8rdwJG2DXe11_c-pr3JpmZzGS-bsPN-dXHx6cLZMqcBjcW_6JB1V2NYhDVZGYiJF6RaRVCqxV0UC1G80n1s9atmtW97wR0Ukogp7nkSnOqvEFAAQq6Fi7QAGmtcHRC6klg3zEBNPmS9uY7-VgWmtczvWhvxhSq1SylbJnxD4aWoT2Oo3lmV9LkzkvA0OaS9pOhDSnS9fOSts3HB0N7JTO0oK7DL8795NoF95tifX-edSQfXKyD28dnZmiVwF6ClPC2VLuZtsOvq89SMQGP4Pz6rlX-3ehl8C8AAP___C5k5Q), the corporate parent of Saks Fifth Avenue, in a $2.65 billion deal. Amazon will partner with HBC in the acquisition, which will give the newly combined Saks Global about $10 billion in annual sales. Marc Metrick, CEO of Sak's e-commerce business, will run the new company. The deal comes in a [turbulent period ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFurTAQRL_GdEZmMZhXuHgN3U2bEvku68smxibGgPL3EanTjI400mh03h_Tw3Hg-HpzK9ni0-Sw8EmTkZ0EPelqtp4IqK3INgZUMxjVqWqxBv3Qtg35HmdqEFXn-36AZ6c9YuP7ii0o0MqorlE31IqGwQA63Q-zhn-d0IpmLinXH4ljWciH73RSrjGtVbBLKdsu2v8CRgHjdV01xifepYDxnhYwKnPHTbv73KVnXxbpTooHyc1likUuT5QlSYdfB2eSkXh1Ua4u47HLV07HVi9lDVW283ZxCLz3Rmj1Wh2H3yflTy2nhZ8AAAD__1-6ZIc)for traditional brick-and-mortar retailers, who have struggled to attract younger shoppers during a general pullback in consumer spending.
## List: Best States for Summer Road Trips
Looking for the best parts of the U.S. for a road trip? A new list [ranks all 50 states ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7tuAyEQAL8GOqxlzcsFRZrrnDbliTN7PiLOWLC2lb-PnDrdSFOM5us8n1Op5Xb9TDtFXtucLlyeNHtlFZrZyBxXIqSjpKg9gg4eLMgtLpm0C-DdyXi7OHvUS8oBkl5tDga8LBEBDXiwGt5wAArB4yUZF7LBkxUGKBdu_fDdyo03WutPe1I_XNoua9yY70McPwROAqdXqpV4eyxvK3Ci_BA4LTRYvVofrAYnpqHW1tV47Dt11VvKinu5D4GTcSbIHvP9VWotw3lh4LqnUv9q_O_6M-JvAAAA___SX1rq)by which is best as a summer destination, led by Texas, Minnesota, New York, Louisiana and Florida. The survey takes into account prices, including gas and car repairs, highway safety and road quality, and the quality of various activities in each state, including state and national parks, fairs and fiestas, scenic byways, and nightlife options. The list includes [separate rankings for cost, safety, and activities](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7tuAyEQAL8GOqxlzcsFRZrrnDbliTN7PiLOWLC2lb-PnDrdSFOM5us8n1Op5Xb9TDtFXtucLlyeNHtlFZrZyBxXIqSjpKg9gg4eLMgtLpm0C-DdyXi7OHvUS8oBkl5tDga8LBEBDXiwGt5wAArB4yUZF7LBkxUGKBdu_fDdyo03WutPe1I_XNoua9yY70McPwROAqdXqpV4eyxvK3Ci_BA4LTRYvVofrAYnpqHW1tV47Dt11VvKinu5D4GTcSbIHvP9VWotw3lh4LqnUv9q_O_6M-JvAAAA___SX1rq), which are averaged together for the final ranking. The bottom of the list for summer travel is all New England states: Connecticut, Rhode Island and Delaware.

The network originally planned to broadcast it on Sunday. The interview with ABC host George Stephanopoulos has grown in importance as Biden has struggled to move past last week's stumbling debate performance. This will be his highest-profile public appearance since then. On Wednesday, Biden and blamed his issues on a cold and jet lag. He told them he needed more sleep and would be ending his workdays by 8 p.m. He also reiterated that he was staying in the race. "No one's pushing me out. I'm not leaving ," he reportedly told his staff. Marc Metrick, CEO of Sak's e-commerce business, will run the new company. The deal comes in a traditional brick-and-mortar retailers, who have struggled to attract younger shoppers during a general pullback in consumer spending. I want you to hear this __directly__ from me. My law license has been **TAKEN AWAY** by the same New York Democrats who are trying to SENTENCE President Trump to prison this fall.

**_I did absolutely _nothing_ wrong._**

This tragic news comes as we celebrate America's 248th birthday and pay homage to our Founding Fathers who were willing to lay down their lives to choose liberty over tyranny. _They would 've rather died on their feet than lived on their knees._

_248 years later, our nation is now once again teetering on the brink of tyranny._

**But please make no mistake: I am _not_ writing this letter to you with a sense of defeat or surrender.**

If I didn't surrender when the FBI came knocking on my door in a dawn raid, then you better believe I'm not giving up now! Our Founding Fathers didn't surrender to tyranny. _Neither can we_.

clean_body: New York communists have taken away my law license. New York communists have taken away my law license. | Friend, I want you to hear this directly from me. My law license has been TAKEN AWAY by the same New York Democrats who are trying to SENTENCE President Trump to prison this fall. I did absolutely nothing wrong. The vengeful Democrats simply want to destroy me for serving as President Trump 's lawyer and for refusing to drop to my knees and surrender to the Deep State tyrants who are killing America. This tragic news comes as we celebrate America's 248th birthday and pay homage to our Founding Fathers who were willing to lay down their lives to choose liberty over tyranny. They would 've rather died on their feet than lived on their knees. 248 years later, our nation is now once again teetering on the brink of tyranny. But please make no mistake: I am not writing this letter to you with a sense of defeat or surrender. If I didn't surrender when the FBI came knocking on my door in a dawn raid, then you better believe I'm not giving up now! Our Founding Fathers didn't surrender to tyranny. Neither can we. When I was unjustly arrested in Atlanta alongside President Trump, Crooked Joe's accomplices filed my MUGSHOT under booking # 2313757. So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like YOU will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I'm humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my legal defense trust to continue the fight for my freedom and justice. name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=67ce69d741be4188b4cd24f76f9a6374&_e=rsQANlpFI-_ibznMkNXckEK36mXE1cZ32X-uqSjJFIqT6cCmNUOfSoidscyJimZePyeywPPuLKi4lmhGZb4K7RxEp8Jke0ZoyyrtM4-GfuvJerHFM5xLCWzOAzxtrluvad4WPAnRjRIE86_oo_6fxf9gavTHIEE36VXK8aiUh5hf7IriqCxp3gIIIiSst-1xdvZtlnJBJsEDpovZmm5cgJdi1m29G2tDtfL3cze25Wxo0dUt7_pMLw2RmCX-yRIVUqWY3u0CSnrh6FydAFCemKbvUmcyLbiKSnACLXr8lK4q0VBEx4afg1ByMgBO93dsbtqbJ90jy4VKc9et8caGE1IFf0bkFl1Xx_CxBww0HNtmJnYhOl04RvBkviyv9E7eRk-buJMoi-SDiWxIY6C8VMzDKEh2J60p3U_x5appyD03HkJh7_0CFijunm90FvuW) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=67ce69d741be4188b4cd24f76f9a6374&_e=rsQANlpFI-_ibznMkNXckEK36mXE1cZ32X-uqSjJFIqT6cCmNUOfSoidscyJimZePyeywPPuLKi4lmhGZb4K7RxEp8Jke0ZoyyrtM4-GfuvJerHFM5xLCWzOAzxtrluvad4WPAnRjRIE86_oo_6fxf9gavTHIEE36VXK8aiUh5hf7IriqCxp3gIIIiSst-1xdvZtlnJBJsEDpovZmm5cgJdi1m29G2tDtfL3cze25Wxo0dUt7_pMLw2RmCX-yRIVUqWY3u0CSnrh6FydAFCemLfzjZGL6NA34c5Vzhp-tAqXhI0VYxz1PA-5hWyn9jkUzw4aFX6cGGurB8BFWs_8rEwqcJJsdJ72tTWO6ADyCigl5DIsGjNgHqOzy0RpWg6LUFHDzqp2OXguqLqUMunukfMaIzYstdbbJOpf9QPj5nYECdpi1hMx1UvISHROi4aY) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=67ce69d741be4188b4cd24f76f9a6374&_e=rsQANlpFI-_ibznMkNXckEK36mXE1cZ32X-uqSjJFIqT6cCmNUOfSoidscyJimZePyeywPPuLKi4lmhGZb4K7RxEp8Jke0ZoyyrtM4-GfuvJerHFM5xLCWzOAzxtrluvad4WPAnRjRIE86_oo_6fxf9gavTHIEE36VXK8aiUh5hf7IriqCxp3gIIIiSst-1xdvZtlnJBJsEDpovZmm5cgJdi1m29G2tDtfL3cze25Wxo0dUt7_pMLw2RmCX-yRIVUqWY3u0CSnrh6FydAFCemEZE8ZyTPX58o1t12XuqhvuuKoU0oezZS21gRsyhjQGFM7MvoNle0wLzPYaxoxy6mqr8G4Tyd5etzXWlSegP9PpB6W5glCrtHSxTet0MOGt7nrM4Yl6ZMIG7r5BPSSbtTDFDkK1RKy_aELyle8Y_4-JrA7T-acOgib9N0r2R3BFz)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **" The Second World Wars"** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=67ce69d741be4188b4cd24f76f9a6374&_e=rsQANlpFI-_ibznMkNXckEK36mXE1cZ32X-uqSjJFIqT6cCmNUOfSoidscyJimZePyeywPPuLKi4lmhGZb4K7RxEp8Jke0ZoyyrtM4-GfuvJerHFM5xLCWzOAzxtrluvad4WPAnRjRIE86_oo_6fxf9gavTHIEE36VXK8aiUh5hf7IriqCxp3gIIIiSst-1xdvZtlnJBJsEDpovZmm5cgJdi1m29G2tDtfL3cze25Wxo0dUt7_pMLw2RmCX-yRIVUqWY3u0CSnrh6FydAFCemFvp4ILnYqYmM_ZTrmyVmFQVGOSBfwS5BBsiHpIJBV8UpyeUZfLAfhcFz9NY0bfYyOhXcy3tt4GhwGHaQ0E6_Fq-occOPl6Q3RtmX-OPmOkzVTRqi5aykaPGbcB_CBMRkJrBVfjrBLaUGzOcc6RC-y4sxTFZ7J0_QHQKdjwtO8t8)**

body:
This is what he’s up to now

Friend, remember RINO, Trump Impeacher, Adam Kinzinger?

Here's a photo to help jog your memory:

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iixVwJDzDYhzxW2PM4ohxg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoalg-P0T6aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3BhLWUta2luemluZ2VyLXJpbm93YXRjaC1tci8_~~)

In an effort to stay relevant, Adam Kinzinger and his RINO pals on Twitter are doing nothing but hurling attacks against conservative Senate candidate Mike Rogers.

_Why, you might ask?_ Because in their RINO minds, Mike has done the unthinkable supporting President Donald J. Trump.

**[Mike Rogers is running for Senate in the State of Michigan. And everybody knows Michigan is the single most important state for Republicans if we are to stand a chance at flipping the Senate AND taking back the White House.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iixVwJDzDYhzxW2PM4ohxg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoalg-P0T6aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3BhLWUta2luemluZ2VyLXJpbm93YXRjaC1tci8_~~)**

_Coincidence that Mike Rogers is the candidate whom Adam Kinzinger chooses to go scorched earth on?_ Don't think so.

**[Nothing would set off Kinzinger more than Army veteran and former federal law enforcement officer Mike Rogers in the Senate and President Donald J. Trump back in the White House.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iixVwJDzDYhzxW2PM4ohxg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoalg-P0T6aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3BhLWUta2luemluZ2VyLXJpbm93YXRjaC1tci8_~~)**

And that's where you come in, Friend.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5d47bc6bcf254c9fa38a74aae6dce477&_e=jrEJp1zOtqcHbrntwJdvtKzFgCDwkLwVILQyqnaCR01IiU3gHZgVstbHLJHLJnLSFiZtYZ8Mpwh2K23KlZC6bdMdxeiNPA8NtjIxdFPnLo2sK7t61UI79EGIRzH2oUb6B48ZeG3BQFlDstolfQy4U672WjFD8IJs4vSujNo826a8j1o8-mcygHiGfoOky8EVarTig3SgfoZ7sPukT4XO05tFD_uFYKTlnkc1rVwwIghbgWHecFYe3IfezvdS-jZjThBxxVJ_diMVQNe7QsZluA75kFDV_N1PS5mbFgQeg4U6fEPG2F1r8iHAwe31RH1PaU7phK2H7p1aTXhkmqOyeyJOD7Y9u1XwlytGQ3IaTPyp16YeSSuR7tbvGcJ8F2syk8-viKASGKBwWjpVgow3YH9Vardmw15G14DJsPTV47QSp3dRhV2IgMVg8ybuTfxP) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5d47bc6bcf254c9fa38a74aae6dce477&_e=jrEJp1zOtqcHbrntwJdvtKzFgCDwkLwVILQyqnaCR01IiU3gHZgVstbHLJHLJnLSFiZtYZ8Mpwh2K23KlZC6bdMdxeiNPA8NtjIxdFPnLo2sK7t61UI79EGIRzH2oUb6B48ZeG3BQFlDstolfQy4U672WjFD8IJs4vSujNo826a8j1o8-mcygHiGfoOky8EVarTig3SgfoZ7sPukT4XO05tFD_uFYKTlnkc1rVwwIghbgWHecFYe3IfezvdS-jZjThBxxVJ_diMVQNe7QsZluCGZj8yxLhrd_Z6DvCE8HpRp1BBRHsG1F_0osGLaD_gMlbVJND88vMfK5orEfkoUmcP9SJbdKMR78LLnWwfJMEVIy266HvMcU6pu_K_WQf4q8KHlkSpgtNpF-X6EbiJNTINanTztpcQ94v75cR6F6KMEqkZeC4z-oawsx8E40t2A)**
