name: Bob Casey
subject: We can’t afford to be drowned out on the airwaves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I can’t win this election without you.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11048ea2-6efa-441f-8a2f-c236a9c95135/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| | | | | Peter, I wanted you to hear it from me first: My opponent just launched his first attack ad against me across Pennsylvania in an attempt to flip this battleground and retake the Senate majority. [To fight back, we need all hands on deck. Will you split $50 or more between my campaign and Blue Amp Action right now?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b88d36a-ba62-4336-b0e7-a393bb00c52a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It’s clear that national Republicans are trying to buy this Senate seat. Together, GOP super PACs have booked nearly $75 million in ads targeting me, and it’s only July. With the Senate and the White House hinging on Pennsylvania, we can’t afford to be drowned out on the airwaves. But unlike my mega-millionaire opponent, who’s being bankrolled by billionaires, this campaign is powered by folks like you, firstname. [I need your help if we’re going to win this election and keep Pennsylvania blue, so I’m asking: Can I count on you to split a donation between me and Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc66673a2-3371-43b8-9acf-5dfd57588096/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ to help us show my opponent this seat can’t be bought?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb4d13042-7225-467f-8c00-4712ae7559f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b938448-e158-4555-99e1-77b39e257237/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Scott Keith, 1517
subject: A Father’s Love: Rediscovering the Power of Biblical Fatherhood
body:
In our modern culture, the very idea of fatherhood has become distorted and devalued.

| | | [](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyE0L1u5CAUxfGnwR0W9_JhKChWu3KzmihdSoThegYNY1vgSV4_mrxA-qOjn_4fl3CJpZbt-hYf5O-phdZDpAAaJp5jDihQcTFxoQMM2WeXTDQDeZhQgBWIMNy8i6tTzkrUVqKhxaCRmhbIBtUkCYbiXz9iEhpACC3HZLXNLusVnFlXEZkSsVI7xzvRkfbt2qj3RsdzqSXFbUz7Y6j-dp5HZ_IPw5nh3Ck9G41xo7yfrwXD-eVmOEuSisgpvi7RcYXW8ugU8bxms5AAk5Njcu77syUKac_E5L__f981gIWh-Xx8lVpLNxNT4vqIpf4Izl8LfXr8DgAA__-sdWVH)
---
My friend, In our modern culture, the very idea of fatherhood has become distorted and devalued.
---
[](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyE0L1u5CAUxfGnwR0W9_JhKChWu3KzmihdSoThegYNY1vgSV4_mrxA-qOjn_4fl3CJpZbt-hYf5O-phdZDpAAaJp5jDihQcTFxoQMM2WeXTDQDeZhQgBWIMNy8i6tTzkrUVqKhxaCRmhbIBtUkCYbiXz9iEhpACC3HZLXNLusVnFlXEZkSsVI7xzvRkfbt2qj3RsdzqSXFbUz7Y6j-dp5HZ_IPw5nh3Ck9G41xo7yfrwXD-eVmOEuSisgpvi7RcYXW8ugU8bxms5AAk5Njcu77syUKac_E5L__f981gIWh-Xx8lVpLNxNT4vqIpf4Izl8LfXr8DgAA__-sdWVH)
---
I know you see it in the media. Fathers are often portrayed as disengaged, emotionally distant, or even absent altogether. Sadly, people have nowhere to look to see examples of good, Godly dads. But what if I told you there’s a **better way**? A path that leads to _gracious, gospel-centered fathers_ who can display to their families a glimpse of the love of our Heavenly Father? I want to help you rediscover the power of biblical fatherhood — and 1517 has a _great resource_ to guide you on that journey. That resource is _Being Dad_ \- a book I wrote that delves deep into the heart of what it means to be a father, grounded in the timeless wisdom of Scripture. [**We want to provide this valuable resource to as many fathers as possible, which is why, when you support 1517 with a gift of any amount today, we will send you a FREE copy of _Being Dad_ as a token of our thanks for your partnership**** _._**](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyE0L1u5CAUxfGnwR0W9_JhKChWu3KzmihdSoThegYNY1vgSV4_mrxA-qOjn_4fl3CJpZbt-hYf5O-phdZDpAAaJp5jDihQcTFxoQMM2WeXTDQDeZhQgBWIMNy8i6tTzkrUVqKhxaCRmhbIBtUkCYbiXz9iEhpACC3HZLXNLusVnFlXEZkSsVI7xzvRkfbt2qj3RsdzqSXFbUz7Y6j-dp5HZ_IPw5nh3Ck9G41xo7yfrwXD-eVmOEuSisgpvi7RcYXW8ugU8bxms5AAk5Njcu77syUKac_E5L__f981gIWh-Xx8lVpLNxNT4vqIpf4Izl8LfXr8DgAA__-sdWVH)
---
[Get your copy](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyE0L1u5CAUxfGnwR0W9_JhKChWu3KzmihdSoThegYNY1vgSV4_mrxA-qOjn_4fl3CJpZbt-hYf5O-phdZDpAAaJp5jDihQcTFxoQMM2WeXTDQDeZhQgBWIMNy8i6tTzkrUVqKhxaCRmhbIBtUkCYbiXz9iEhpACC3HZLXNLusVnFlXEZkSsVI7xzvRkfbt2qj3RsdzqSXFbUz7Y6j-dp5HZ_IPw5nh3Ck9G41xo7yfrwXD-eVmOEuSisgpvi7RcYXW8ugU8bxms5AAk5Njcu77syUKac_E5L__f981gIWh-Xx8lVpLNxNT4vqIpf4Izl8LfXr8DgAA__-sdWVH)
---
In _Being Dad_ , I bring my failures and successes as a family man and my Biblical scholarship to bear on the difficult task of fatherhood, offering a fresh and insightful perspective. Unlike other books on fatherhood, _Being Dad_ recognizes the struggles of fatherhood and offers the one thing that can sustain dads — the forgiveness and love of our **Heavenly Father**. _Being Dad_ reminds all of us that _forgiven fathers_ are a **gift from God** , for they have been given the gospel and are empowered by the Holy Spirit to proclaim it to their families. This truth has the power to produce gracious, Christ-centered fathers who can display a powerful picture of the love of their Heavenly Father, drawing their children into the embrace of saving faith. **[**When you support 1517 with a gift of any amount, we will send you a FREE copy of _Being Dad_ as our thanks for your partnership _._**](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyE0L1u5CAUxfGnwR0W9_JhKChWu3KzmihdSoThegYNY1vgSV4_mrxA-qOjn_4fl3CJpZbt-hYf5O-phdZDpAAaJp5jDihQcTFxoQMM2WeXTDQDeZhQgBWIMNy8i6tTzkrUVqKhxaCRmhbIBtUkCYbiXz9iEhpACC3HZLXNLusVnFlXEZkSsVI7xzvRkfbt2qj3RsdzqSXFbUz7Y6j-dp5HZ_IPw5nh3Ck9G41xo7yfrwXD-eVmOEuSisgpvi7RcYXW8ugU8bxms5AAk5Njcu77syUKac_E5L__f981gIWh-Xx8lVpLNxNT4vqIpf4Izl8LfXr8DgAA__-sdWVH)**
---
[Make a gift & claim your FREE COPY](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyE0L1u5CAUxfGnwR0W9_JhKChWu3KzmihdSoThegYNY1vgSV4_mrxA-qOjn_4fl3CJpZbt-hYf5O-phdZDpAAaJp5jDihQcTFxoQMM2WeXTDQDeZhQgBWIMNy8i6tTzkrUVqKhxaCRmhbIBtUkCYbiXz9iEhpACC3HZLXNLusVnFlXEZkSsVI7xzvRkfbt2qj3RsdzqSXFbUz7Y6j-dp5HZ_IPw5nh3Ck9G41xo7yfrwXD-eVmOEuSisgpvi7RcYXW8ugU8bxms5AAk5Njcu77syUKac_E5L__f981gIWh-Xx8lVpLNxNT4vqIpf4Izl8LfXr8DgAA__-sdWVH)
---
1517 understands that the challenges facing fathers today are immense. The world often paints a bleak picture of fatherhood, leaving many men feeling _discouraged, inadequate, or even hopeless_. But this book’s message is one of **hope, redemption, and the transformative power of the Gospel**. _I urge you to seize the opportunity to invest in the lives of fathers and families in your community._ Whether you are raising children in your home, have grown children, or want to encourage a father in your family or your church, _Being Dad_ is a valuable resource that makes the perfect addition to any father’s library. **[**Your gift of any amount will not only provide you with a copy of _Being Dad_ , but it will also support the critical work of 1517 as we strive to equip and empower fathers to fulfill one of the highest earthly callings they will ever receive.**](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyE0L1u5CAUxfGnwR0W9_JhKChWu3KzmihdSoThegYNY1vgSV4_mrxA-qOjn_4fl3CJpZbt-hYf5O-phdZDpAAaJp5jDihQcTFxoQMM2WeXTDQDeZhQgBWIMNy8i6tTzkrUVqKhxaCRmhbIBtUkCYbiXz9iEhpACC3HZLXNLusVnFlXEZkSsVI7xzvRkfbt2qj3RsdzqSXFbUz7Y6j-dp5HZ_IPw5nh3Ck9G41xo7yfrwXD-eVmOEuSisgpvi7RcYXW8ugU8bxms5AAk5Njcu77syUKac_E5L__f981gIWh-Xx8lVpLNxNT4vqIpf4Izl8LfXr8DgAA__-sdWVH)** Your support means the world to us. Together, we can cultivate a culture that celebrates the vital role of fathers and points hearts towards the transformative love of our Heavenly Father. In Christ, Dr. Scott Keith1517
---
[Support 1517](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyE0L1u5CAUxfGnwR0W9_JhKChWu3KzmihdSoThegYNY1vgSV4_mrxA-qOjn_4fl3CJpZbt-hYf5O-phdZDpAAaJp5jDihQcTFxoQMM2WeXTDQDeZhQgBWIMNy8i6tTzkrUVqKhxaCRmhbIBtUkCYbiXz9iEhpACC3HZLXNLusVnFlXEZkSsVI7xzvRkfbt2qj3RsdzqSXFbUz7Y6j-dp5HZ_IPw5nh3Ck9G41xo7yfrwXD-eVmOEuSisgpvi7RcYXW8ugU8bxms5AAk5Njcu77syUKac_E5L__f981gIWh-Xx8lVpLNxNT4vqIpf4Izl8LfXr8DgAA__-sdWVH)
---

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: What I said to former President Trump:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
“The road to the Senate majority is also the road to the White House.”

**[A GRASSROOTS MEMO FROM THE DESK OF SENATOR LINDSEY GRAHAM](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ImZDsHhfOkDMBIYvUDf-vA~~/AARclAA~~~)**

Friend,

Despite President Joe Biden's tyrannical lawfare against former President Trump and the Democrats' never-ending barrage of witch hunts, 2024 will still come down to a _simple truth ..._

...A truth that former President Trump and I _personally_ discussed at our recent meeting at NRSC headquarters:

**_["The road to the Senate majority is also the road to the White House."](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ImZDsHhfOkDMBIYvUDf-vA~~/AARclAA~~~)_**

Ever since the beginning of the year, the Left has been trembling in their boots looking at one specific headline:

Friend, my team has emailed you about the fundraising deadline I'm facing on June 30th.

**[I'm not alone. Every single Republican Senator and Senate candidate is facing this deadline.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaogd342ng5qu74m1qhpsiii8nfab8llcq9q4he0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chie8or2c3h2bs)**

**[And for our nominees in battleground states, it could be a make or break moment.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znl0ql11qr6lclq9ec93ntbegshthkapj6hmunto_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chie8or2c3h2bs)**

**[That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between these candidates and my campaign ASAP.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z94t0hvl6fgfpgeau9qfse86189soib21oh85rr8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chie8or2c3h2bs)**

_**[Tim Sheehy, who served as a Navy Seal,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z33o8uvbr914dkkgu8k67a1p9k0n9d90531g8edg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chie8or2c3h2bs)**_ is running in Montana against Jon Tester.

_**[Dave McCormick, a fellow Army veteran,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmsask04819tda2uqbaqm7unp6r59pnliib950b8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chie8or2c3h2bs)**_ is running in Pennsylvania against Bob Casey.

_**[Sam Brown, another fellow Army veteran,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znj0b1t7rapn2fkqs7gq4f45am75apge81ie5cng_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chie8or2c3h2bs)**_ is running in Nevada against Jacky Rosen.

_**[Bernie Moreno, a proven business leader,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfqmctpqjhnnfusnobm3eaor0rcm1kf2n69o9nfo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chie8or2c3h2bs)**_ is running in Ohio against Sherrod Brown.

_**[And Kari Lake, a tough conservative who will put America first,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbff0k9rano1gi7cnm5rv2r17embtl14gmgkdoo0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chie8or2c3h2bs)**_ is running in Arizona.

********************************************************[SPLIT A DONATION HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z72qanvn6s2sdsnidpj4k5qt17nsdhjos3qcslu0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chie8or2c3h2bs)************************************************** ******

If these tough conservatives win, it guarantees Republicans win the U.S. Senate.

And I need each of them there with me to stop the Marxist Left in its tracks, and to make America strong again.

**[A donation of any amount will go directly to their campaigns, and *any amount* will make a difference ahead of this critical marker.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp3mvbf0r9pepbk4ouuda3t62iqucn68gi2fota8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chie8or2c3h2bs)**

As I've also said before, if we don't win in November, we're done. So, if you can give at this time, don't wait. **[Help each of these tough conservatives before this deadline, and let's win in November.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcdsk2e1kji4mmu4rj6lf0nsv802gfgkurd7tjq8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chie8or2c3h2bs)**

In service,
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqtkd7816f77cppep1951l9s4miphh3a2m6usv4g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0chie8or2c3h2bs)
Tom Cotton

clean_body: Friend, my team has emailed you about the fundraising deadline I'm facing on June 30th. is running in Montana against Jon Tester. is running in Pennsylvania against Bob Casey. is running in Nevada against Jacky Rosen. is running in Ohio against Sherrod Brown. is running in Arizona. **************************************************************************************************** ** If these tough conservatives win, it guarantees Republicans win the U.S. Senate. And I need each of them there with me to stop the Marxist Left in its tracks, and to make America strong again. As I've also said before, if we don't win in November, we're done. So, if you can give at this time, don't wait. In service, Tom Cotton ************************************************************************************************** **** | Paid for by the NRSC. name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: We have a problem. A big one.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I briefed President Trump on America's most classified matters of national security while Director of CIA.

| |

---
| | | I endured the gauntlet of West Point Military Academy, then boot camp, then became a Tank Platoon Leader in the final days of the Cold War.

I briefed President Trump on America's most classified matters of national security while Director of CIA.

And I stood eye-to-eye with the most dangerous dictators in the world as Trump's Secretary of State.

**It takes a lot to make me feel on edge. So the fact that I 'm even sending you this email should give you pause. **

Because I'm afraid we have a problem. A big one.

I just got word that Joe Biden and the Democrats are _closer than they 've ever been before_ to destroying our Conservative House Majority once and for all. The latest reports show they've stockpiled over $100,000,000 to defeat us in enough swing states to bring forth a COMPLETE LIBERAL TAKEOVER.

The ONLY THING standing in the way of Joe Biden having full control - and ramming through any radical policy he wants - is just a few competitive House seats. That's it.

I don't tell you this lightly and I know that's not what you want to see happen to our country.

_**[That's why I'm rushing to you, in partnership with Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise a game-changing one million dollars in the next 72 hours.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81ac3b19ea1e400e9e2940e15b4f4f32&_e=trX2lEmhC1KIvIETNXQQnc8jxYRDgGkJd-NG1iCss2QIFiAeMYLaRFixRG879mPAoeaUBWNNm9Yadf1ui7Hp16333LQuJ9_1Ma-dODeG4ZR_fKyDVK4qi4SxFzHr5O72sgtQdDwfkyiZgVtX_QCjEcnNsZyQk2jcjTEn1BXxklnj4zKtmZhWQyusrOfNOMpLQhA0NH5qNrhIpSZtt54Ow0ZVpiou-6LUo9wJ8-6nBBqeM5QwcXrEviiStue3s5gIgAJ4VbkCz7X6XGtAvPmJCXXjQqQ90IjAq7l0jkDuA4gkwEMgvP76gWCergKyMuSVQwRfUbNsnUNbYAQ-yXDEg2cF8VMml1igkWGUdkPUiT8KFVlXH975P1sWlvbLHfz0GtLz5SrpuEi3x0261ZMA0FzsqAk-tMdnIT8cVmNA6VcvmXrIM1KJZmpAjdsIqk6J2kJzmkGROhm5upd827wh0g%3D%3D "That’s why I’m rushing to you, in partnership with Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise a game-changing one million dollars in the next 72 hours.")**_ I know what you're thinking... that's not enough runway to raise that much. But desperate times call for desperate measures. And if that's what it'll take to win, I'm willing to chase down every lead.

If all you can spare is ten or twenty bucks, that would be incredible. If you can afford more that's even better. I only ask that everyone give something.

Will you do what it takes to hand Joe Biden and the Democrats a humiliating defeat?
---

I know this is a lofty goal. I know there's not much time to hit it. It would be much easier to call it a day and not even try.

**But just giving up plays right into their hands. **

_**[That's why I'm taking the time to send you this email. Our path to success fully relies on EVERYONE pitching in SOMETHING. That's how we'll catch up to the Democrats and win this election in a landslide.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81ac3b19ea1e400e9e2940e15b4f4f32&_e=trX2lEmhC1KIvIETNXQQnc8jxYRDgGkJd-NG1iCss2QIFiAeMYLaRFixRG879mPAoeaUBWNNm9Yadf1ui7Hp16333LQuJ9_1Ma-dODeG4ZR_fKyDVK4qi4SxFzHr5O72sgtQdDwfkyiZgVtX_QCjEcnNsZyQk2jcjTEn1BXxklnj4zKtmZhWQyusrOfNOMpLQhA0NH5qNrhIpSZtt54Ow0ZVpiou-6LUo9wJ8-6nBBqeM5QwcXrEviiStue3s5gIgAJ4VbkCz7X6XGtAvPmJCXXjQqQ90IjAq7l0jkDuA4gkwEMgvP76gWCergKyMuSVVabra9wb0ViBZqQC3EJTpv0KWb1sx1ZqO0Ay42P0yuI4i1XRJUgjOFEf06Lz5J8ifqCrPP2oJoAlfguEW8mCEbZXJse-lSYPkMYNRH6Eurq9Niz3azpFkCI7yjA0e83bdvxzLLaMc3UdnFRUnjzAAA%3D%3D "That’s why I’m taking the time to send you this email. Our path to success fully relies on EVERYONE pitching in SOMETHING. That’s how we’ll catch up to the Democrats and win this election in a landslide.")**_

Frankly, that's the only way. So I really hope you can step up when we need you the most.

Thank you. God bless you.
Mike Pompeo

clean_body: I briefed President Trump on America's most classified matters of national security while Director of CIA. | | | | | I endured the gauntlet of West Point Military Academy, then boot camp, then became a Tank Platoon Leader in the final days of the Cold War. I briefed President Trump on America's most classified matters of national security while Director of CIA. And I stood eye-to-eye with the most dangerous dictators in the world as Trump's Secretary of State. It takes a lot to make me feel on edge. So the fact that I 'm even sending you this email should give you pause. Because I'm afraid we have a problem. A big one. I just got word that Joe Biden and the Democrats are closer than they 've ever been before to destroying our Conservative House Majority once and for all. The latest reports show they've stockpiled over $100,000,000 to defeat us in enough swing states to bring forth a COMPLETE LIBERAL TAKEOVER. The ONLY THING standing in the way of Joe Biden having full control - and ramming through any radical policy he wants - is just a few competitive House seats. That's it. I don't tell you this lightly and I know that's not what you want to see happen to our country. "That’s why I’m rushing to you, in partnership with Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise a game-changing one million dollars in the next 72 hours." I know what you're thinking... that's not enough runway to raise that much. But desperate times call for desperate measures. And if that's what it'll take to win, I'm willing to chase down every lead. If all you can spare is ten or twenty bucks, that would be incredible. If you can afford more that's even better. I only ask that everyone give something. subject: U.S. Military issues an ominous warning after Biden made this destructive move
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | July 05, 2024

U.S. Military issues
an ominous warning after Biden made this destructive move

Joe Biden has continuously made this country weak through
his awful policies. But now things have reached a boiling point.

And the U.S. Military has issued
an ominous warning after Biden made this destructive move.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Donald Trump just
received a landmark court ruling that could change everything

The former president
has been smacked with legal woes thanks to the corrupt Biden DOJ.
But the tide may officially be turning.
➞ Continue Reading

Barack Obama doesn't hold
back in latest betrayal of President Biden

The former president
used to be incredibly close to Joe Biden. But that relationship
is changing fast.
➞ Continue Reading

Top Democrat disavows
Biden and now 2024 is up in the air

The Left are eating
their own. There's no telling who's going to come out on top.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cfdc296d-3a4b-482e-ae24-7dacca9ab732?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

As I become older and more aware of truth, July 4th is even more profoundly affecting my mind and heart. We are less free today, July 4, 2024, than we were when the Founders declared their independence and when they were so sick of it all, dumped some tea in a Harbor while dressed as Mohawks to make a point in 1773.
SEVENTEEN. Seventeen usurpations was all it took for a few of the best men and women in history to say "enough." Today, we live under the illusion of freedom. We can no longer count the ways we are abused and raked over the coals by design by a systemic approach. We bypass and circumvent the United States Constitution and state constitutions and instead prop up our agendas with bureaucratic systems and red tape, mounds of paperwork, and little law enforcement, if any.
We are perpetually enslaved to system upon system with mounting systems on the rise by design--such as ESG and CBDC (my next article topic). I keep putting that off but really cannot any longer because of what I see in my state.
We should be reflective. We should celebrate what our country has been in the past. We should celebrate our victories and all the worthy things. We should also grieve what she has become. I am more reflective than celebratory these days. I reflect and appreciate what it took to "declare and see it through." Many of you also work tirelessly to secure our liberties, freedoms, and sacred inalienable rights. Sometimes we have to be creative in how we reclaim the original intent. It can be done. But it will never be top-down. It will always be bottom-up as designed. Each individual. Personal responsibility. Education. Fortitude. Willingness to speak the truth. Willingness to act. And courage to stand when no one else does.
I love my Homeland. She is worth fighting for. Protecting. Defending. But we will surely have to assert ourselves. You don't win wars on defense. What does that look like for you? Ask the Lord to use you and your gifts in creative ways to bring about freedom in your areas of influence.
Choose today to live as a Free American... not an American under the _illusion of freedom._ There were and are several governments that have mastered that already. We would do well to learn to not repeat that history.
I'm thankful to everyone who truly has and does and will continue to stand in the gap to continue to keep Freedom's Flame burning brightly. _Thank you, Lord, that we have been entrusted with such a rare and beautiful gift we call America, our precious Homeland. Help us steward well the sacred duty to defend, preserve, and protect our nation for which we each are called. Amen._
Rebecca Chaney,
Restore Liberty Mississippi, Director

clean_body: | | ---|---|--- | | | | | cross-posted a post from ---|---|--- | | | Dana CriswellJul 5 * Dana Criswell ---|---|--- Rebecca always has great insight and ideas. | | | Jul 5 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- As I become older and more aware of truth, July 4th is even more profoundly affecting my mind and heart. We are less free today, July 4, 2024, than we were when the Founders declared their independence and when they were so sick of it all, dumped some tea in a Harbor while dressed as Mohawks to make a point in 1773. SEVENTEEN. Seventeen usurpations was all it took for a few of the best men and women in history to say "enough." Today, we live under the illusion of freedom. We can no longer count the ways we are abused and raked over the coals by design by a systemic approach. We bypass and circumvent the United States Constitution and state constitutions and instead prop up our agendas with bureaucratic systems and red tape, mounds of paperwork, and little law enforcement, if any. We are perpetually enslaved to system upon system with mounting systems on the rise by design--such as ESG and CBDC (my next article topic). I keep putting that off but really cannot any longer because of what I see in my state. We should be reflective. We should celebrate what our country has been in the past. We should celebrate our victories and all the worthy things. We should also grieve what she has become. I am more reflective than celebratory these days. I reflect and appreciate what it took to "declare and see it through." Many of you also work tirelessly to secure our liberties, freedoms, and sacred inalienable rights. Sometimes we have to be creative in how we reclaim the original intent. It can be done. But it will never be top-down. It will always be bottom-up as designed. Each individual. Personal responsibility. Education. Fortitude. Willingness to speak the truth. Willingness to act. And courage to stand when no one else does. I love my Homeland. She is worth fighting for. Protecting. Defending. But we will surely have to assert ourselves. You don't win wars on defense. What does that look like for you? Ask the Lord to use you and your gifts in creative ways to bring about freedom in your areas of influence. Choose today to live as a Free American... not an American under the illusion of freedom. There were and are several governments that have mastered that already. We would do well to learn to not repeat that history. I'm thankful to everyone who truly has and does and will continue to stand in the gap to continue to keep Freedom's Flame burning brightly. Thank you, Lord, that we have been entrusted with such a rare and beautiful gift we call America, our precious Homeland. Help us steward well the sacred duty to defend, preserve, and protect our nation for which we each are called. Amen. Rebecca Chaney, Restore Liberty Mississippi, Director | | | | | | | | Originally posted on | | | | Yarborough Chaney ---|---|--- | ? Civil Stewardship from a Biblical Worldview (C) 2024 Dana Criswell Mississippi ? ?

body:

Friend,

Sean Hannity just gave Ted Cruz the chance to share the brutally honest TRUTH:

_**" This is the position of today's Democrat Party... They look at open borders... and it is what they want, because they see them all as future Democrat voters. [And if people have to die to keep them in power, sadly Democrats are willing to do that.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a97fcb786dcd41b295a875708ac6b6cd&_e=Z4ZNeMktROWq8TxN3ytv342Bjtzu_SWzUzHeraLF_GXpYPtCrTyz29oRvKPh81SAVzkEQ-oUmxpUKHDfdRtsbl55AX2wOy7oPwB4nbv1Va9hFWptYm7QaZZzjMCann8y6Vrm5whZy5_He1gQu23la_8vr6YBwY9QG4bHBGglEC8BEkYWDRgiO4_72t1dtMXXPXGaHQR2KWGUr7UfeCKfovSdTe9o7KpstMBphKyq-kshm02h9Iu4_GuE4IhD_qWHvdB3OlE-XF2Pi3v36d05wWvss6rC4-9C_F13LvVfB3DJeoQr_WStCRqWF8ZSF_zjJ4qk7LolAE1DAauZTcul2yrdBcPOHmfDe5W6nBOhZsIKOudd5PSaLaTmGretsGTIEEsKDneeDF-EZKssfWlWiKos2SQ9540C6TyIotJ8DlQ1nwtT9iyV5JDOF-SPkoHNk-YB90100zsY1UQ4PL1SLdlrxy5tBSpBKvzNkZ_AgP0%3D)"**_

**[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS"REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a97fcb786dcd41b295a875708ac6b6cd&_e=Z4ZNeMktROWq8TxN3ytv342Bjtzu_SWzUzHeraLF_GXpYPtCrTyz29oRvKPh81SAVzkEQ-oUmxpUKHDfdRtsbl55AX2wOy7oPwB4nbv1Va9hFWptYm7QaZZzjMCann8y6Vrm5whZy5_He1gQu23la_8vr6YBwY9QG4bHBGglEC8BEkYWDRgiO4_72t1dtMXXPXGaHQR2KWGUr7UfeCKfovSdTe9o7KpstMBphKyq-kshm02h9Iu4_GuE4IhD_qWHvdB3OlE-XF2Pi3v36d05wWvss6rC4-9C_F13LvVfB3DJeoQr_WStCRqWF8ZSF_zjJ4qk7LolAE1DAauZTcul24VGun1eQCMIchq5_VTox94NBgDZ7ggZZJkCzMCg8X-7OzKxJVu2RPnButtZmr2NQ_5CTBj4PMXu90r4q4edxHhyLgbfee_hGxXpVyZ_eKsi1Q7_yaQrPdjqpz3uvCAZcB1N3zFzOHkUCnONEEApJzg%3D)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
"The road to the Senate majority is also the road to the White House."

**[A GRASSROOTS MEMO FROM THE DESK OF SENATOR LINDSEY GRAHAM](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c26d21294bef4419a021da7be7dd0257&_e=l2oAdinZsXJH2buKcQ10IIpiUDsXpkuidRBMmWWjodKT_iZj1tGLowZqCYSGr4noCV0D1fHvtv_lDvQ-pUhhZOI8YhoOc0AZbwCSEZC1ALxr4FncSprsCYvhLEDxNeNzms-XVBQ9oASan6mLnLj7Vb45g3Tf-MrZGxsVr6kOxDpsAmpQzq_AIXB-KFhYuy8AqMeQcivCSJTO--Xfgvi43Rji6gRXb5Oj5FdLkdCsERymI5F13JJmmWgOh_DcLcXYys7Art1ymaYcbPldrLDAa1KueZKDl0vMtbKevgHP0dKisKxqwv_Hge1808YVgoNkO_5jF-wUEIKnJaZlsuYDBrxSb1GTk4tWaHcbbqeMqRMvs2diBWKqBf8xwmsem9kYr-4luBIiT-_t3Fy6u9dOKq72SexNt8SWZovjQ9-fhA9wT2hg6kO37XSmMIZsxeepIj_dFrIc7SHkrvzik5IwJI3xkA8rqFi0ffpGrKhVV9ZxhGdGG6HImVdiC5cIdezSoXhikz4fKXj3sJvxO3bY7w%3D%3D)**

Friend,

Despite President Joe Biden's tyrannical lawfare against former President Trump and the Democrats' never-ending barrage of witch hunts, 2024 will still come down to a _simple truth ..._

...A truth that former President Trump and I _personally_ discussed at our recent meeting at NRSC headquarters:

**_["The road to the Senate majority is also the road to the White House."](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c26d21294bef4419a021da7be7dd0257&_e=l2oAdinZsXJH2buKcQ10IIpiUDsXpkuidRBMmWWjodKT_iZj1tGLowZqCYSGr4noCV0D1fHvtv_lDvQ-pUhhZOI8YhoOc0AZbwCSEZC1ALxr4FncSprsCYvhLEDxNeNzms-XVBQ9oASan6mLnLj7Vb45g3Tf-MrZGxsVr6kOxDpsAmpQzq_AIXB-KFhYuy8AqMeQcivCSJTO--Xfgvi43Rji6gRXb5Oj5FdLkdCsERymI5F13JJmmWgOh_DcLcXYys7Art1ymaYcbPldrLDAa1KueZKDl0vMtbKevgHP0dKisKxqwv_Hge1808YVgoNkO_5jF-wUEIKnJaZlsuYDBrxSb1GTk4tWaHcbbqeMqRPymP38ivoijpubCevyBFN7wAph7MC8MSZaOw8ebwUK-axPZKWYkbBk1Uw2x4G1F1wAFqUSPtN9rOMBUzxCI9PQmKxHKdwErXq9tbONCCcJije434NxidZFgy5IjkyJH5sOL7SVnBxDWTBa8aS83qbQzQOYrjiYTmZilN6QoLOQQQ%3D%3D)_**

Ever since the beginning of the year, the Left has been trembling in their boots looking at one specific headline:

**[ABC NEWS:"Democrats' best hope of holding the Senate runs through Trump country..."](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c26d21294bef4419a021da7be7dd0257&_e=l2oAdinZsXJH2buKcQ10IIpiUDsXpkuidRBMmWWjodKT_iZj1tGLowZqCYSGr4noCV0D1fHvtv_lDvQ-pUhhZOI8YhoOc0AZbwCSEZC1ALxr4FncSprsCYvhLEDxNeNzms-XVBQ9oASan6mLnLj7Vb45g3Tf-MrZGxsVr6kOxDpsAmpQzq_AIXB-KFhYuy8AqMeQcivCSJTO--Xfgvi43Rji6gRXb5Oj5FdLkdCsERymI5F13JJmmWgOh_DcLcXYys7Art1ymaYcbPldrLDAa1KueZKDl0vMtbKevgHP0dKisKxqwv_Hge1808YVgoNkO_5jF-wUEIKnJaZlsuYDBrxSb1GTk4tWaHcbbqeMqROC9dyPZyIz9f4RvnDl9shG5ZNIhAf9gh9cCtOu7ubL6zts5hAK-iSB1gTBINPGxH8xWpdwLhsqZ2FpeKjcLU1VrtaLw48bKj8Q-CPFRt9MAM_CoRyDqsSPW0Px453RpQ3KS81bK3A7tuhV0szPdR8MbIr9aBpS9jHILOJ2InYsGw%3D%3D)**

_And unfortunately for the Radical Left, the biggest battleground states of 2024 are just that - TRUMP COUNTRY!_

With former President Trump leading the charge, a red wave is set to SWEEP the Senate, friend.

_But there 's just one problem..._

name: Mucarsel-Powell, Debbie
subject: the cost of a dozen doughnuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
doughnuts are more than just a sweet treat to me
| | |
---
Friend, I wanted to reach out this evening because we have an important deadline coming up. I'm about to ask you to help me hit my $100,000 midnight fundraising goal. But first, I want to tell you a story about doughnuts — and how they're going to help us save our Senate majority.
**[(If you're short on time and ready to retire Rick Scott this fall, you can chip in here to help me make up this fundraising gap and flip Florida blue.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88256660/483667750/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1475-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODI3NTFmZTQtYzgzYS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UFUdmTF0Wi-hWngv_jOx9RCjxqaokZw-ahzk48fu5PU=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88256661/483667751/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1475-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODI3NTFmZTQtYzgzYS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UFUdmTF0Wi-hWngv_jOx9RCjxqaokZw-ahzk48fu5PU=)
When I was 14, my family came to America to seek a better life. We arrived here with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and _still_ struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment.
**So, after I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local doughnut shop.** It was just a minimum wage job, but the small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe. Finally, after a lot of hard work, the possibilities that we could only dream of before became reality.
We were able to move out of that one room apartment, and I got a scholarship to an incredible college. Eventually, I found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much. That call to service took me to places I had never even dreamed of before. **I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and now, I'm running for the United States Senate.**

clean_body: doughnuts are more than just a sweet treat to me | | | Friend, I wanted to reach out this evening because we have an important deadline coming up. I'm about to ask you to help me hit my $100,000 midnight fundraising goal. But first, I want to tell you a story about doughnuts — and how they're going to help us save our Senate majority. = = When I was 14, my family came to America to seek a better life. We arrived here with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and still struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment. So, after I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local doughnut shop. It was just a minimum wage job, but the small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe. Finally, after a lot of hard work, the possibilities that we could only dream of before became reality. We were able to move out of that one room apartment, and I got a scholarship to an incredible college. Eventually, I found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much. That call to service took me to places I had never even dreamed of before. I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and now, I'm running for the United States Senate. Making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. I've seen time and time again how small acts have the power to create big, transformative change.And that's exactly how we're going to win this campaign in November. = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue. | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Scott Keith, 1517
subject: A Father’s Love: Rediscovering the Power of Biblical Fatherhood
body:
In our modern culture, the very idea of fatherhood has become distorted and devalued.

| | | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyE0E9q6zAQgPHTSDsZzVj_vNDiwcPQRUqhiy7FRBonAicyltNev_gEvcCPj-_rki5U1_q8vdODY-097T0RJ7DgVaGSUKNR2ittE8gSLUJYguQIHjWEADbIe6RC5LT3CzEyIV1NBmt8xsCTQ1xkjaejvbaAxoEZnAGy1rkRnZkcFmH0ayt08FCfvRbuubVta2s9au5D229yjffj2LoY_wmcBc6d82vngZ5c2jHk9hA4n9UC55FHwzwZtVxpUgZDUDQZVmUp7soaXMmTGOfeXnvmlFthMf5_-_ywAAHlHsv2U9e1dueF0bcH1fX05fHnn--IvwEAAP__Bopktw)
---
My friend, In our modern culture, the very idea of fatherhood has become distorted and devalued.
---
[](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyE0E9q6zAQgPHTSDsZzVj_vNDiwcPQRUqhiy7FRBonAicyltNev_gEvcCPj-_rki5U1_q8vdODY-097T0RJ7DgVaGSUKNR2ittE8gSLUJYguQIHjWEADbIe6RC5LT3CzEyIV1NBmt8xsCTQ1xkjaejvbaAxoEZnAGy1rkRnZkcFmH0ayt08FCfvRbuubVta2s9au5D229yjffj2LoY_wmcBc6d82vngZ5c2jHk9hA4n9UC55FHwzwZtVxpUgZDUDQZVmUp7soaXMmTGOfeXnvmlFthMf5_-_ywAAHlHsv2U9e1dueF0bcH1fX05fHnn--IvwEAAP__Bopktw)
---
I know you see it in the media. Fathers are often portrayed as disengaged, emotionally distant, or even absent altogether. Sadly, people have nowhere to look to see examples of good, Godly dads. But what if I told you there’s a **better way**? A path that leads to _gracious, gospel-centered fathers_ who can display to their families a glimpse of the love of our Heavenly Father? I want to help you rediscover the power of biblical fatherhood — and 1517 has a _great resource_ to guide you on that journey. That resource is _Being Dad_ \- a book I wrote that delves deep into the heart of what it means to be a father, grounded in the timeless wisdom of Scripture. [**We want to provide this valuable resource to as many fathers as possible, which is why, when you support 1517 with a gift of any amount today, we will send you a FREE copy of _Being Dad_ as a token of our thanks for your partnership**** _._**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyE0E9q6zAQgPHTSDsZzVj_vNDiwcPQRUqhiy7FRBonAicyltNev_gEvcCPj-_rki5U1_q8vdODY-097T0RJ7DgVaGSUKNR2ittE8gSLUJYguQIHjWEADbIe6RC5LT3CzEyIV1NBmt8xsCTQ1xkjaejvbaAxoEZnAGy1rkRnZkcFmH0ayt08FCfvRbuubVta2s9au5D229yjffj2LoY_wmcBc6d82vngZ5c2jHk9hA4n9UC55FHwzwZtVxpUgZDUDQZVmUp7soaXMmTGOfeXnvmlFthMf5_-_ywAAHlHsv2U9e1dueF0bcH1fX05fHnn--IvwEAAP__Bopktw)
---
[Get your copy](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyE0E9q6zAQgPHTSDsZzVj_vNDiwcPQRUqhiy7FRBonAicyltNev_gEvcCPj-_rki5U1_q8vdODY-097T0RJ7DgVaGSUKNR2ittE8gSLUJYguQIHjWEADbIe6RC5LT3CzEyIV1NBmt8xsCTQ1xkjaejvbaAxoEZnAGy1rkRnZkcFmH0ayt08FCfvRbuubVta2s9au5D229yjffj2LoY_wmcBc6d82vngZ5c2jHk9hA4n9UC55FHwzwZtVxpUgZDUDQZVmUp7soaXMmTGOfeXnvmlFthMf5_-_ywAAHlHsv2U9e1dueF0bcH1fX05fHnn--IvwEAAP__Bopktw)
---
In _Being Dad_ , I bring my failures and successes as a family man and my Biblical scholarship to bear on the difficult task of fatherhood, offering a fresh and insightful perspective. Unlike other books on fatherhood, _Being Dad_ recognizes the struggles of fatherhood and offers the one thing that can sustain dads — the forgiveness and love of our **Heavenly Father**. _Being Dad_ reminds all of us that _forgiven fathers_ are a **gift from God** , for they have been given the gospel and are empowered by the Holy Spirit to proclaim it to their families. This truth has the power to produce gracious, Christ-centered fathers who can display a powerful picture of the love of their Heavenly Father, drawing their children into the embrace of saving faith. **[**When you support 1517 with a gift of any amount, we will send you a FREE copy of _Being Dad_ as our thanks for your partnership _._**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyE0E9q6zAQgPHTSDsZzVj_vNDiwcPQRUqhiy7FRBonAicyltNev_gEvcCPj-_rki5U1_q8vdODY-097T0RJ7DgVaGSUKNR2ittE8gSLUJYguQIHjWEADbIe6RC5LT3CzEyIV1NBmt8xsCTQ1xkjaejvbaAxoEZnAGy1rkRnZkcFmH0ayt08FCfvRbuubVta2s9au5D229yjffj2LoY_wmcBc6d82vngZ5c2jHk9hA4n9UC55FHwzwZtVxpUgZDUDQZVmUp7soaXMmTGOfeXnvmlFthMf5_-_ywAAHlHsv2U9e1dueF0bcH1fX05fHnn--IvwEAAP__Bopktw)**
---
[Make a gift & claim your FREE COPY](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyE0E9q6zAQgPHTSDsZzVj_vNDiwcPQRUqhiy7FRBonAicyltNev_gEvcCPj-_rki5U1_q8vdODY-097T0RJ7DgVaGSUKNR2ittE8gSLUJYguQIHjWEADbIe6RC5LT3CzEyIV1NBmt8xsCTQ1xkjaejvbaAxoEZnAGy1rkRnZkcFmH0ayt08FCfvRbuubVta2s9au5D229yjffj2LoY_wmcBc6d82vngZ5c2jHk9hA4n9UC55FHwzwZtVxpUgZDUDQZVmUp7soaXMmTGOfeXnvmlFthMf5_-_ywAAHlHsv2U9e1dueF0bcH1fX05fHnn--IvwEAAP__Bopktw)
---
1517 understands that the challenges facing fathers today are immense. The world often paints a bleak picture of fatherhood, leaving many men feeling _discouraged, inadequate, or even hopeless_. But this book’s message is one of **hope, redemption, and the transformative power of the Gospel**. _I urge you to seize the opportunity to invest in the lives of fathers and families in your community._ Whether you are raising children in your home, have grown children, or want to encourage a father in your family or your church, _Being Dad_ is a valuable resource that makes the perfect addition to any father’s library. **[**Your gift of any amount will not only provide you with a copy of _Being Dad_ , but it will also support the critical work of 1517 as we strive to equip and empower fathers to fulfill one of the highest earthly callings they will ever receive.**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyE0E9q6zAQgPHTSDsZzVj_vNDiwcPQRUqhiy7FRBonAicyltNev_gEvcCPj-_rki5U1_q8vdODY-097T0RJ7DgVaGSUKNR2ittE8gSLUJYguQIHjWEADbIe6RC5LT3CzEyIV1NBmt8xsCTQ1xkjaejvbaAxoEZnAGy1rkRnZkcFmH0ayt08FCfvRbuubVta2s9au5D229yjffj2LoY_wmcBc6d82vngZ5c2jHk9hA4n9UC55FHwzwZtVxpUgZDUDQZVmUp7soaXMmTGOfeXnvmlFthMf5_-_ywAAHlHsv2U9e1dueF0bcH1fX05fHnn--IvwEAAP__Bopktw)** Your support means the world to us. Together, we can cultivate a culture that celebrates the vital role of fathers and points hearts towards the transformative love of our Heavenly Father. In Christ, Dr. Scott Keith1517
---
[Support 1517](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyE0E9q6zAQgPHTSDsZzVj_vNDiwcPQRUqhiy7FRBonAicyltNev_gEvcCPj-_rki5U1_q8vdODY-097T0RJ7DgVaGSUKNR2ittE8gSLUJYguQIHjWEADbIe6RC5LT3CzEyIV1NBmt8xsCTQ1xkjaejvbaAxoEZnAGy1rkRnZkcFmH0ayt08FCfvRbuubVta2s9au5D229yjffj2LoY_wmcBc6d82vngZ5c2jHk9hA4n9UC55FHwzwZtVxpUgZDUDQZVmUp7soaXMmTGOfeXnvmlFthMf5_-_ywAAHlHsv2U9e1dueF0bcH1fX05fHnn--IvwEAAP__Bopktw)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Exactly 4 months
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1617%2E135344%2Et0yQDd)

Four months. Today marks 4 months until the 2024 general election.
[**With that in mind, I wanted to ask: will you consider chipping in $4 to my campaign for U.S. Senate here in Michigan?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-july24.5Fk0a0&refcode=em240705-1-400&t=2&akid=1617%2E135344%2Et0yQDd)
$4, because although there are 4 months until the general election, there’s only 1 month until Michigan’s primary, where we’ll find out who our Republican opponent is and we have to be ready to hit the ground running once they are named.
$4, because Democrats only have a 51 seat majority in the U.S. Senate, and with Joe Manchin’s retirement and a likely flip in West Virginia, we need to hold onto this seat for Democrats to retain control of the body.
$4, because polling shows our race in a statistical dead heat against a Trump-endorsed candidate.
$4, because your donation has the power to help keep Donald Trump out of the White House, in addition to helping Democrats keep the Senate. Democrats can't hold the Senate if Elissa doesn't win Michigan.
$4, because the stakes of this election could hardly be any higher, and we have just 4 months to talk to undecided voters across 11 media markets.
[**My team and I have started to execute a plan to keep Michigan blue, but we are counting on grassroots donors to fund pretty much everything that we need to do over the next 4 months. At this point in the campaign, the majority of our contributions come through emails like this, so I’m counting on people like you to chip in $4 (or more, if you can.) It all adds up.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-july24.5Fk0a0&refcode=em240705-1-400&t=3&akid=1617%2E135344%2Et0yQDd)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $4](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/2603?c0=ebs-em-july24.rvQwCZ&t=4&akid=1617%2E135344%2Et0yQDd)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-july24.w0O6uM&refcode=em240705-1-400&t=5&akid=1617%2E135344%2Et0yQDd)**
---
****
Thank you,
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=1617%2E135344%2Et0yQDd).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=1617%2E135344%2Et0yQDd)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: American Briefing
subject: ICE Nabs Illegal Migrant Wanted On Child Rape Charges After He Was Released Into US Years Earlier
body:

body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**$7.** That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** Election Day is only 122 days away, and in November, we’re facing legislative elections in 44 states – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re up against Trump and his MAGA movement who have raised over $170 million since May. When enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps our candidates compete. **Reason #3:** Losing in November means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states for years to come – $7 helps defeat extremists who are determined to attack abortion rights and access to the ballot. [So what do you say? name: Dr. Prasanth Reddy
subject: My life is proof of the American Dream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REDDY FOR KANSAS
body:
| | |
---
| | Team,

I hope you had a great Independence Day yesterday.

I wrote an op-ed about my story, and why I’m running for Congress now.

__[_**My life is proof of the American Dream, and you can read more here. **_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/55f6eb9b3a4cb83e3947229f28c3afba/83bd7a8d53d76b0cc3d6b838967d376c/43823)
We have a lot of work to do to preserve the American Dream, and that’s why I’m stepping up now. Kansas’ 3rd District deserves a real leader, not someone who simply follows party leadership like Sharice Davids.

Thanks for your continued support!
---
---
Dr. Prasanth Reddy
---
[**READ HERE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/55f6eb9b3a4cb83e3947229f28c3afba/04c08a6c92dad812c3d6b838967d376c/43823)

** __Meet Dr. Prasanth Reddy:__** Dr. Reddy is a cancer physician and immigrant who's lived the American Dream. In the aftermath of 9/11, he answered his country's call. He became a citizen, joined the U.S. Air Force Reserve, and still serves as Lt. Colonel today. Dr. Reddy is running for Congress against a Democrat who votes with Joe Biden 100% of the time, in one of the most competitive House districts in the country. Dr. Reddy is a different kind of candidate. He's an outsider, a problem solver, and someone who's spent his career taking action. **[**Let's flip Kansas' 3rd District and send an independent voice to Congress. Chip in here or below.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/55f6eb9b3a4cb83e3947229f28c3afba/8444786f6b89cf95c3d6b838967d376c/43823)**

body:
Let us explain...
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3470%2E552475%2EpUWXdO)
Bob Casey and David McCormick couldn’t be more different, Peter.
Bob made his career standing up for Pennsylvania’s families. He’s in this fight for women’s rights, workers’ rights, and the rights of people with disabilities. He’s defending Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. He’s working for an economy that works for everybody.
David McCormick made his career as a hedge fund executive looking out for himself. He’s in this fight for the Wall Street billionaires who are supporting his campaign. He and the Republicans want to slash taxes for corporations and the wealthy — so the economy works only for them.
**That’s why we have to do everything in our power to re-elect Bob Casey.**
[**Will you chip in any amount — even just $5 — to power our campaign, help us reach every corner of the Commonwealth, and keep PA blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240705-1?refcode=em20240705-1&recurring=1&refcode2=3470_552475_pUWXdO&akid=3470%2E552475%2EpUWXdO)

Time flies, and election day is close!| | | Hi, Peter, it’s Jackie, Rick Scott’s Campaign Manager. Today marks 4 months until Senator Scott’s name will be on the ballot for re-election in Florida.

Under his conservative leadership, we watched Florida flourish!

But success comes with a price, and the radical liberals are FURIOUS. They’ve got a vendetta against Senator Scott and President Trump for winning close races and delivering results on promises made.

Senator Scott can’t hold this Senate seat without you, and I’m starting to worry that Biden and Schumer’s millions are going to change voters’ minds.

name: Kari Lake
subject: Major campaign update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
Ruben Gallego puts Hollywood elites ahead of Arizonans

Friend, I have a major campaign update for you.

My far-Left opponent Ruben Gallego was just caught at a swanky Los Angeles fundraiser, rubbing elbows with and cashing checks from a who's who of liberal MegaDonors.

Why does this matter? Because Ruben is showing us who he is. He'll take those checks and run ads saying he's a "moderate", but at his heart, he's an out of touch coastal elite trying to fool hardworking Arizonans.

**[Chip in to help me fight back](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=28328304fbdf4cee89b467f8ae3ea5d5&_e=hrxZWCuJQpmM3zoWb2xj6Jukyq13-JQixpK8nQyA9IfWVFwZrfrCvnv53GDxnXp2E1GdXPX8T5qFV_w-iECc2WMK63xyOCqwww3heob8PD4qWy5Qp2IdaIdAOZKSceRpImw3SpRDNChVeIF1PHty0gYjAH8m_aMWZL884x5cXpbnxg2k-YODvDWBJHtv_FodHJYxKQMjt7ljDGNIY0RBMfKyxz9ObyFSUwUBSsh2_RLWWbCLnHm7zWA4nwGqXC65bXdS4PJuGDdb6cuPjUOqK4f5bxNToALzmBRQArZtDameOaI3k8IfEulki9ShaStySqDEQXzF8ZIv4fOrCmn7o6seAxgwX1MYuj4x1wJ5R1WluFohRm5yJ5Fn_dqIAb320yUt5UYaE2vEKmR7uxw9Pw%3D%3D).**

The truth about Ruben Gallego is clear. He's put liberal millionaires ahead of the American people. That's why he votes with Joe Biden nearly 100% of the time, why he takes his marching orders from George Soros, and why he's spending his weekends fundraising with Beverly Hills big shots, not campaigning in Arizona.

Ruben isn't running to represent Arizona. He's running to represent his liberal mega-donors. He's already spending millions of dollars against me, and thanks to his Hollywood friends, you can bet the attacks will keep on coming.

I'm not funded by George Soros, Hollywood elites, or the Washington establishment. My campaign runs on donations from people like you. Because that's who I'm running to represent. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Here we go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Here’s why I’m asking if you can make a donation of any amount to support our re-election campaign right now
#
It’s starting.
Just a couple months ago, a new right-wing Super PAC got off the ground. Its mission: targeting me for defeat this year and boosting one of my GOP opponents. It’s got ties to the Trump administration, Mitch McConnell, and powerful corporate interests — from Big Oil to Big Pharma to the big banks.
And they recently disclosed spending tens of thousands of dollars on digital ads — with those ads run by a company that’s worked with Nikki Haley, the House GOP’s campaign arm, and Republican House Majority Leader Steve Scalise (the guy who once called himself “David Duke without the baggage”).
Look: defeating us in Massachusetts would virtually guarantee a GOP-controlled Senate. And national Republicans are desperate to take power so they can enact their radical agenda, from banning abortion nationwide to slashing taxes for billionaires and giant corporations.
We have to fight back.
[**I’m asking if you can split a donation of $5 or any amount to the Long Run and our re-election campaign right now — because we can’t afford to underestimate how much money national Republicans and outside special interests can spend trying to defeat us.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.-45zWj&refcode=em240705-1-c&t=1&akid=5347%2E196590%2ECV95E8)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.eTyvsn&refcode=em240705-1-c&t=20&akid=5347%2E196590%2ECV95E8)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.VYOQM7&refcode=em240705-1-c&t=21&akid=5347%2E196590%2ECV95E8)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.0cBriM&refcode=em240705-1-c&t=22&akid=5347%2E196590%2ECV95E8)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.OdpQDA&refcode=em240705-1-c&t=23&akid=5347%2E196590%2ECV95E8)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.o8D-wy&refcode=em240705-1-c&t=24&akid=5347%2E196590%2ECV95E8)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.JFik5O&refcode=em240705-1-c&t=25&akid=5347%2E196590%2ECV95E8)**
---
****
It’s no secret that big corporations use Super PACs to elect Republicans who’ll keep their taxes low and their regulations light.
And it’s no secret that big corporations — along with other powerful right-wing interests — use Super PACs to defeat Democrats who are fighting to put power in the hands of working people.
So in the long run, to make our country work not just for a thin slice at the tippy-top but for everyone, we’ve got to overturn Citizens United and enact sweeping anti-corruption legislation (yes, I’ve got a plan for that).
But for now, we’ve got to shore up our defenses against Super PAC spending and anything else the far right throws at us.
**Together, we’ll keep working to stop big money from drowning out the voices of working families. But our grassroots fundraising model only works if everyone keeps pitching in whatever they can, whenever they can.**
[**If it makes sense for you right now, please pitch in a contribution of any amount, and help fight back against the right-wing forces and corporate interests who want me out of the U.S. Senate.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.-45zWj&refcode=em240705-1-c&t=26&akid=5347%2E196590%2ECV95E8)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.-45zWj&refcode=em240705-1-c&t=27&akid=5347%2E196590%2ECV95E8)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=5347%2E196590%2ECV95E8). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=5347%2E196590%2ECV95E8)

name: JD Vance
subject: Humbly Asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc

It's not easy for me to write this email. I'm a little embarrassed to ask because you've already done so much to help me and my campaign since we first launched.

Peter,

**It 's not easy for me to write this email. **I'm a little embarrassed to ask because you've already done so much to help me and my campaign since we first launched.

**Let me get to the point:** Your donations give me the resources to fight the Left, and defend MAGA conservatives everywhere leading up to the final fight this November. Your words give me the encouragement to keep fighting on tough days, but there is no way I would ever stop fighting for you, your family, or our country because there's too much on the line in November. We MUST end the Southern Border crisis, we MUST stand up to Communist China, and we MUST create great American jobs and revitalize our economy.

So, I won't keep you much longer, but I will ask that if you're able to please rush an emergency donation using one of the secure links below to help me secure a victory in November and save our nation from the Socialist Agenda that progressives on the Left are trying to shove down our throats.

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=14286333.5795.1.92216479b5a81d53bb0e465306e29d65 )

\*\*An Emergency Memo Prepared by the House GOP Chair\*\*

Attn:

The entire country saw Joe Biden’s debate performance; we all know he is unfit to be President.

Make no mistake, at this very moment, alarm bells are going off in the mind of every Radical Democrat playing damage control.

But in the final months of the election, President Trump will be forced back to New York and off the campaign trail for his sham \*\*SENTENCING\*\* \*\*HEARING\*\* after the Democrats wrongfully convicted him in a kangaroo court!

\*\*The Left’s plot at this make-or-break moment for a disastrous Joe Biden could not be any more clear: _keep President Trump off the campaign trail at all costs._\*\*

Friend, the Democrat Judge overseeing President Trump’s sentencing _already_ donated to Crooked Joe’s campaign in 2020!

_We can hope for the best, but we must prepare for the worst... _

_And if the Democrats are going to use this sentencing to INTERFERE in the election and keep President Trump off the campaign trail, then WE must prove that their sinister plot will \*\*BACKFIRE\*\* beautifully! _

As House GOP Chair, it’s my duty to ensure that no matter the outcome of his sentencing hearing, Republicans have the resources to cut through the Democrats’ vicious attacks and lies and to help ensure President Trump’s America First message reaches every last voter, nevertheless.

\*\*Please make an emergency contribution using the link below to help FIGHT BACK at this pivotal moment in the 2024 election:\*\*

\*\*https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=14286333.5796.1.f499415db1f934ef0917b5d5ff5ff720\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=14286333.5797.1.a8f6c78d8b3f5f8842f8d3aea91b5668 )

Thank you,

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=14286333.5798.1.2f8096fc2be14df26ce008ba22055738 )

Rep. Elise Stefanik

House Republican Conference Chair

Folks,

I'm up a creek without a paddle, and my pirogue just sprung a huge leak.

I'm giving it all I got to stand up for you and our Conservative values, but everywhere I turn, there are more and more of them woke loonies.

I can manage to hold down the front lines, but I won’t be able to much longer without the resources and support from strong, conservative patriots like yourself.

Friend, even if you can chip in $1, it’ll go a long way in eliminating woke ideologies from the halls of our government!

Chip in here: **[[Link]](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8c2bcab9c89e442188c17b6d457dc45e&_e=sJb2iTnHy6Dugl2Z-nv_uopDAWBOjQlKxbo_eJP2M2DY9FUtN3kakRsRioK9JA5zdg8ZgKQUfU1MNIC4YeWqiSvWi1bcFbyDKb8pJVZCO13-NOswrgd5Tjl7gp2icZIhtM74dgIoPC6kMhw0aIquzv4TVpWOraufeigA65-OJ-kNNxeM1Xhc2zmGGc5UKrDwsVQun_14FEteAubAtGN5v8aOMM-fqWd3jPlFViQuodFNPson4bJ0eCuerCFrJhLV7rs7lq_oiI3zq68K4YWDms7cqoQQqMlYbbta18etzUy0i2hEUvmXsLscNc6BCfPhgeLHj_fzZ-REpPnLvI9AoCOaX5J2Mzz3ah521k6e_fswfKlXxqfcddZ--XM3XOC9)**

I won’t take up any more of your precious time, but just know I rely on folks like you who are willing to do what it takes to preserve American Freedom!

God Bless,

Senator John Kennedy

I can manage to hold down the front lines, but I won’t be able to much longer without the resources and support from strong, conservative patriots like yourself. clean_body: President Biden needs your help. | = Today marks 4 months until Election Day, Peter, and Donald Trump is going to spend all of it falsely attacking President Biden’s achievements for the American people. All of us here know we can’t believe a word that comes out of Trump’s mouth. Now, we have to get that message across to key voters... and we’re running out of time. = Look, President Biden has spearheaded historic investment in fighting climate change, game-changing infrastructure development, student loan forgiveness for millions of Americans, the first bipartisan gun safety legislation in years, and so much more. If the president and his administration are going to keep up their hard work and keep achieving results for the American people, we cannot allow Donald Trump to take back the White House. But his blatant lies about President Biden’s record can gain ground on social media and among key voting groups if we don’t fight back against them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- = | = | = | = Let's do this, Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, we’ve been working around the clock to uplift President Biden’s message to the American electorate and elect Democrats who will continue to fight for his ambitious agenda. President Biden and the Democrats are fighting tooth-and-nail to move our country forward, but Republicans are threatening to derail everything. = | = = Follow along: | ---|--- | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
Peter, t his November's election is one of the most important our country has EVER faced, and we need to go all in on EVERY winnable race.
That’s why we’re watching the Texas Senate race so closely. Ted Cruz is BEATABLE this year. Will you rush a donation before the end of quarter fundraising deadline to help piss off MAGA by turning Texas BLUE? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_2024n?refcode=062524_1]
Peter, t here’s no way around it. This is going to be one of the most important elections of our lifetimes.

name: Indiana GOP
subject: Celebrating 4th of July Weekend!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**🇺🇸 Celebrating 4th of July Weekend 🎉🥳**_
---
| | Friends, We hope you all enjoyed a wonderful time with friends and family yesterday, celebrating the Independence of our great nation! It's been incredibly encouraging to see our county parties showing their support for our candidates in local parades, fairs, and festivals. For those continuing the festivities, we wish you a weekend filled with fun and excitement. As you enjoy this time with your loved ones, we believe it's the perfect opportunity to rest, relax, and reflect on the significance of the holiday. Independence Day is a great reminder of why we all work as hard as we do to elect Republicans to serve our state. Why we walk in parades, knock doors, make phone calls, and much much more. A reminder that all our hard work is how we can make Indiana the best place to live, work, and play. We can't wait to continue our work alongside all of you and win in November! But for now, spend time with friends and family, and enjoy the holiday weekend!
---
| |
---
| | Chairman Randy Head
---
|
---
| |
---
| | _**Sen. Braun Took Part in the Linton Freedom Festival**_
---
---
**Senator Mike Braun**[celebrated](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=f0be27cb678c489c8a6384ac367c069a&_e=0dFQsR9U6zA7flga7GQ19-hN0Es2eQ6UEisAMD6g20cd80sytwSNsm5VuOy_UNsky2W6QKEslrTQuYD1tymMoqFzqfrzOyFDzfQi_eiBlB-CRXUsxI-fRGGSOAFqXpZ2_9golteYczh1DNGUxQBl-qPPFh7dqPDwwoOOR7VxMapsTSUwVQcQVcabchIh9mTgbZP7FodUbma8jf9rVgHqJxNgRIF1gFQAMtwHZek2TB7YFfr0b3PaseXXaP0PN7tg) Independence Day by attending the Linton Freedom Festival and meeting with Mayor John Preble. Volunteers and members of Team Braun showed out this week by attending Fourth of July parades, festivals, and fairs! **What's he saying** : "Happy Independence Day, Hoosiers! I was happy to stop by the Linton Freedom Festival and meet with Mayor John Preble. Our small towns are the foundation of our great state, and our great country!" - **Sen. Braun** said via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=f0be27cb678c489c8a6384ac367c069a&_e=0dFQsR9U6zA7flga7GQ19-hN0Es2eQ6UEisAMD6g20cd80sytwSNsm5VuOy_UNsky2W6QKEslrTQuYD1tymMoh4WDW25PknGrQptaJbne0uOOj9DwKx_s2Cb5wFtL-0RV1AaFhDuoXZl6bGCfeGmmkz8yN6PxfBqkDMjeQSimN8uau6xgy4aBJa8y0_tvOU5AH6_RxgeYmUdqveV8CNOBNApy5J0DGJUlw582vc4F_6AbBdfkDIYISl65-5TZI6d). **Sen. Braun** also made stops in 19 counties throughout southern Indiana as part of his Freedom and Opportunity Tour. **What's else is he saying** : "Thank you to all who came out to support Team Braun at parades and fairs across the state!" - **Sen. Braun** said via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=f0be27cb678c489c8a6384ac367c069a&_e=0dFQsR9U6zA7flga7GQ19-hN0Es2eQ6UEisAMD6g20dulzxX1N9UxdNtdukxNgLvHvQTalU26M8fYUeLqJZohHmLKs5jMjTZUdoP_bYq4yJA8fwB-TnvMiic9GzPiLJ5iZ0pvdycJ2KF4zbSh3jopxPDPDJUNAhpFKTMKki83zcKRtA3O5z7BYuRfwc7wQf3qs8UstMJxRmD62ZUDMH_Znx_qLqLdsnEx2MVrM1rouc_5D2AIXTd6ZdsvTkfN_Dq).

Mike Braun** on **[Facebook](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=f0be27cb678c489c8a6384ac367c069a&_e=KLT8oG_T-_ICSNW718Hsetdntajcj7yR0DI-eWULB8EbnA36DFJU3YAQkk6p7qZ1NWzi4xyg6mPClG1N2hgNtEYtNW1WnEHzntNmrMzQHWS3UtjEX2ybPXVpxw7brBTIQlNZ2SZEI7VesfkgAoDHqe8Ewt6ABM1L7jxK9AUOnYdYb1wHFnzQQ34USTcwOD2lcDYQmc1vrj61liV3kVvjXnyWTaYjP3s_4KPIdvRibN5S-LrSoin1yMfPXGGNWq10_dnbusQsj1jqRyWn-o0_I8nhcVXOF_S-iQsr_XoBiJL_iur8ayMxiZja--inGe4OxDRaie8rDI-zbBwOiydHcHxxW6ibMaJfW5I0jD-sO1A%3D)****** or [**X.**](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=f0be27cb678c489c8a6384ac367c069a&_e=KLT8oG_T-_ICSNW718Hsetdntajcj7yR0DI-eWULB8EbnA36DFJU3YAQkk6p7qZ1NWzi4xyg6mPClG1N2hgNtEYtNW1WnEHzntNmrMzQHWS3UtjEX2ybPXVpxw7brBTIQlNZ2SZEI7VesfkgAoDHqcXB_HjM24THSvA8940I1gsEI7w55NdtblBV4LvRGIqGPFRzhbY95hb-M92rRiwTmBMlYxHlNTHxvL_ZJKf2x_w66_67z48VfA-ftOGUZdba76dbdLjnoBCY3FtildbNBztE00ZKOaAN2wS2G-wSqGK5-n_KfjzUbkLZcypOEN7Tmis7l1Fb-d4fTQsNdAFVr0Pivr6FaI5vBMjTmmcBEBA%3D)

**_🎆🌭Cost of Your 4th of July BBQ🌭🎆_**
---
Independence Day stands as one of the most cherished celebrations of the year. It is a time to honor the patriots who have fought for our freedoms from the nation's inception and to recognize those who continue to protect these liberties. America, the greatest country in the world, deserves a grand celebration. However, in 2024, the festivities are marred by the economic challenges posed by Bidenflation. As we gear up for the week's festivities, we want to prepare you for what might be the most costly Fourth of July celebration in recent memory.
---
---
Figure from Indiana Capital Chronicle
---
Since Biden took office, grocery prices have increased significantly. Here are some examples:
---
* Ground Beef: +24.3%
* Pork Chops: +17.9%
* Chicken Breasts: +15.8%
* Chips: +13.5%

---
The cost of this year's barbecue is, on average, 18% more expensive than it was in 2021. These price increases are due to the overwhelming inflation we have experienced since Biden took office.

Bidenflation is just another example of the many policy failures of the Biden Administration, which are squeezing every dollar from hardworking Hoosiers. When comparing Trump's record to Biden's, the choice becomes very clear.

We must elect Republicans like Mike Braun and Jim Banks, and reject Biden and his Democrat allies, Jennifer McCormick and Valorie McCray. They want to bring Biden's liberal policies to Hoosier doorsteps, and it is up to us to stop them!
---
|
---
**_Lugar Series Applications Now Open!_**
---
---
Now is your opportunity to join the 624 current Lugar Series graduates! An opportunity to develop and train as a Republican women to help increase your ability to get elected to local, state and federal level position and increase your influence. Through a competitive selection process, the Lugar Series invites outstanding Hoosier women to take part in this leadership program. Each class is composed of distinguished women from various backgrounds and industries, who are committed to bettering their communities and advancing the GOP agenda. Those passionate about women in politics and government are encouraged to [apply](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=f0be27cb678c489c8a6384ac367c069a&_e=0dFQsR9U6zA7flga7GQ19_MB2ROGgNEv7mIfABKHWJmWofOnY50FRMInmmU-mbqYrPl1Bk6YgpUyCRCYAiHP3D-Fsk73MYQzYQiYwZVOqIBX098103TF5o1D3GL4Acv0fL3BREAcKWgIOs6A9I9RLoZqebTW828v88WqFN2-a-W0oghfne0hwXc_WkzZafcUcY8G74gEcqls79SO8BPfkpDXJ9kxsTCqGrh-9nLsKo0%3D).

clean_body: | | | | | | | 🇺🇸 Celebrating 4th of July Weekend 🎉🥳 | | Friends, We hope you all enjoyed a wonderful time with friends and family yesterday, celebrating the Independence of our great nation! It's been incredibly encouraging to see our county parties showing their support for our candidates in local parades, fairs, and festivals. For those continuing the festivities, we wish you a weekend filled with fun and excitement. As you enjoy this time with your loved ones, we believe it's the perfect opportunity to rest, relax, and reflect on the significance of the holiday. Independence Day is a great reminder of why we all work as hard as we do to elect Republicans to serve our state. Why we walk in parades, knock doors, make phone calls, and much much more. A reminder that all our hard work is how we can make Indiana the best place to live, work, and play. We can't wait to continue our work alongside all of you and win in November! But for now, spend time with friends and family, and enjoy the holiday weekend! | | | | Chairman Randy Head | | | | | Sen. Braun Took Part in the Linton Freedom Festival Senator Mike Braun Independence Day by attending the Linton Freedom Festival and meeting with Mayor John Preble. Volunteers and members of Team Braun showed out this week by attending Fourth of July parades, festivals, and fairs! What's he saying : "Happy Independence Day, Hoosiers! I was happy to stop by the Linton Freedom Festival and meet with Mayor John Preble. Our small towns are the foundation of our great state, and our great country!" - Sen. Braun said via . Sen. Braun also made stops in 19 counties throughout southern Indiana as part of his Freedom and Opportunity Tour. What's else is he saying : "Thank you to all who came out to support Team Braun at parades and fairs across the state!" - Sen. Braun said via . To stay up-to-date, follow Sen. Mike Braun on **** or | 🎆🌭Cost of Your 4th of July BBQ🌭🎆 Independence Day stands as one of the most cherished celebrations of the year. It is a time to honor the patriots who have fought for our freedoms from the nation's inception and to recognize those who continue to protect these liberties. America, the greatest country in the world, deserves a grand celebration. However, in 2024, the festivities are marred by the economic challenges posed by Bidenflation. As we gear up for the week's festivities, we want to prepare you for what might be the most costly Fourth of July celebration in recent memory. Figure from Indiana Capital Chronicle Since Biden took office, grocery prices have increased significantly. Here are some examples: Ground Beef: +24.3% Pork Chops: +17.9% Chicken Breasts: +15.8% Chips: +13.5% The cost of this year's barbecue is, on average, 18% more expensive than it was in 2021. These price increases are due to the overwhelming inflation we have experienced since Biden took office. Bidenflation is just another example of the many policy failures of the Biden Administration, which are squeezing every dollar from hardworking Hoosiers. When comparing Trump's record to Biden's, the choice becomes very clear. We must elect Republicans like Mike Braun and Jim Banks, and reject Biden and his Democrat allies, Jennifer McCormick and Valorie McCray. They want to bring Biden's liberal policies to Hoosier doorsteps, and it is up to us to stop them! | Lugar Series Applications Now Open! Now is your opportunity to join the 624 current Lugar Series graduates! An opportunity to develop and train as a Republican women to help increase your ability to get elected to local, state and federal level position and increase your influence. Through a competitive selection process, the Lugar Series invites outstanding Hoosier women to take part in this leadership program. Each class is composed of distinguished women from various backgrounds and industries, who are committed to bettering their communities and advancing the GOP agenda. Those passionate about women in politics and government are encouraged to . | 📱 News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb the inaugural celebration of the Purdue campus in Indianapolis. Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Hoosier Women Artists Wednesday. Treasurer Daniel Elliott on the air with Fox59. Comptroller Elise Nieshalla the fiscal new year. Secretary Diego Morales the Monroe County with the local Republican Party. Attorney General Todd Rokita Hoosier athletes who were able to land spots in the 2024 Olympics. Senator Todd Young an evening with Hoosier Republicans supporting Mike Braun for Governor. Senator Mike Braun in from Union County as part of his 92 county tour. Congressman Rudy Yakym the St. Joseph County Fair. Congressman Jim Banks President Trump's performance in the polls. Congressman Jim Baird the rededication ceremony of the "Wall of the Fallen." Congresswoman Victoria Spartz her thoughts on a recent SCOTUS decision. Congressman Greg Pence by the Rush County Fair. Congressman Larry Bucshon in a panel with the Hill where they discussed the issue of drug shortages in the US. Congresswoman Erin Houchin to last week's presidential debate. | Upcoming Events Across the State July 6: August 9: August 17: August 22: September 6: September 12: September 14: October 7:** | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. | | NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. subject: We defied the odds in 2022, and I know we can do it again

Hi team, it’s Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo (D-CO.) here. I represent one of the most competitive House districts in the entire country – and I officially have an opponent.
I’m officially running against Gabe Evans, an anti-abortion MAGA Republican who has the backing of Trump, Speaker Mike Johnson, and their dark money donors.
Now that the general election is underway, our opponent will use every dollar at his disposal to attack me and try to flip this critical seat.
So friend, I’m reaching out to you directly. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Michael Bennet's campaign to help us kick off the general election and hold this key House seat for Democrats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-caraveo?refcode=X_070524_BennetCaraveo_actrs]

I’m not your typical member of Congress. As the first in my family to graduate from college and then become a pediatrician in Adams County, Colorado, I ran for office to make a difference. From lowering prescription costs to securing paid family leave, I've fought hard for our community. Now, I’m proud to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress.
But my Republican opponent? He would support an abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest, endangering millions of women across the U.S.
Our campaign is built on grassroots support, and we need every dollar we can get to hold this seat and keep an anti-abortion extremist out of Congress. In 2022, we beat MAGA extremism, and I know we can do it again this year. Can you split a donation between our campaign and Michael Bennet's campaign to help us start the General Election strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-caraveo?refcode=X_070524_BennetCaraveo_actrs]
Thanks,
Yadira Caraveo

subject: Here’s where we’re at today

body:
---
Democrats, Here's where we're at after a very busy week: **FIRST:** Donald Trump announced that he had raised a huge amount of money after his conviction, including his super PAC receiving a $50 million check from one donor. **THEN:** He used that money to launch his first general election ads of the campaign. **NOW:** Trump is about to name his VP and his convention is right around the corner. Both big moments for his campaign. Democrats: if a government that puts the needs of working people first and fights for a habitable planet for future generations is worth $7 to you, that is the donation we're asking you to make to the Democratic National Committee today. We are sure you understand how important this moment is for Democrats everywhere: [**Please use this link to contribute $7 directly to the Democratic National Committee today.
