name: Ted Cruz
subject: My prediction on what happens next...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
We’re fired up and can’t let up to SAVE OUR COUNTRY!

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Joe Biden has humiliated himself in front of the world. Jill refuses to let him drop out.

_If this isn 't ELDER ABUSE then I don't know what is!_

**President Trump absolutely destroyed Joe Biden in the debate last week.** You almost had to feel bad for Joe, and I would - were he not responsible for so many lives lost and our Nation's disastrous current state of affairs.

Last September, I gave it a 25-30% chance that Biden will not be the nominee. After Special Counsel Robert Hur declined to charge him based on his age and inability to recall basic facts, I increased my prediction to 50%.

Now, I believe there's an 80% chance Joe Biden will not be the Democratic nominee.

**No matter what happens, we need to be fully prepared to fight back and****ELECT DONALD J. TRUMP ON NOVEMBER 5TH****to****MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN****!** **[RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT TO DEFEAT THE LEFT>>>](http://trk.tedcruz.-vxxFcxWZo0QivJYtNJVw)**
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
I'm so proud to stand with President Trump in this fight. He has once again proven that he is focused on the issues that matter - _the economy_ , _the border_ , _and crime_ - and that he's ready to get to work on Day One to get our country back on track.

**His takedown of Joe Biden will go down in history. His performance was outstanding.**

We're fired up and can't let up. Our efforts are critical to the fight to **SAVE AMERICA**.

**[**Thank you for any contribution you can send to fuel our fight at Team Cruz! >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz.)**
For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

clean_body: I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me win this seat. Hello, $5. That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign before midnight to help me win this critical House seat. Yes, just $5. $5 because in 2022, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes in the closest race in the entire country. $5 because we scared off Boebert, but now this race is going to be a lot harder to win. $5 because all the pundits say that this time, we absolutely can win this House seat. And $5 because the Super PACs are already attacking me, and I need your help to counter their lies if we’re going to win. I know $5 might not seem like much, but together with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors like you, we can take on the corporate PACs and special interests. We cannot stop here or let up. We’ve set a goal to raise another $25,000 before our next fundraising deadline, but right now, we are still short. = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = It means the world to know I have the support of people like you on this journey again. Thank you so much in advance. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. name: Hill Harper
subject: Don't Miss Out: An Intimate Evening of Comedy with Dave Chappelle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN]
body:
[ https://act.hillharper.com/go/422?t=1001&akid=1291%2E62735%2EdIkJnP ]Hill Harper for Senate

Hello,

We are thrilled to extend an exclusive invitation to you for an
unforgettable evening with comedy icon Dave Chappelle! Join us for a live
show in Detroit on Thursday, July 11th. Doors open at 6:00 PM, and the
show starts at 7:30 PM.

Ticket Options:

- LIMITED Balcony: $250 - SOLD OUT
- General Admission: $500
- Gold Circle: $1000
- Gold Circle + VIP Reception: $3300

VIP Gold Circle ticket holders will also be invited to a VIP reception
following the show with Hill Harper.

Bring your friends to what will be the best night of comedy in Detroit
this year!

[ https://act.hillharper.com/go/1866?t=1002&akid=1291%2E62735%2EdIkJnP ]To purchase your tickets, click this link!

Don’t live in Michigan or can’t make it? Consider donating to the
campaign! We have under 35 days until the election and every dollar gets
put to work immediately for voter outreach!

[ https://act.hillharper.com/go/1867?t=1003&akid=1291%2E62735%2EdIkJnP ]DONATE »

Thank you for your support!

- HH

This is a strict NO CELL PHONES ALLOWED show. Please leave your phones in
your cars or at home. Anyone who brings a cell phone will be required to
place it in a locked pouch. Upon arrival at the venue, all phones, smart
watches and accessories will be secured in individual Yondr pouches that
will be opened at the end of the event. Guests maintain possession of
their devices at all times.Everyone is subject to a pat down and wanding.
Anyone caught with a cell phone inside the venue will be immediately
ejected.

Pilot Boy Productions, Inc. and/or Dave Chappelle own all rights in the
content and materials delivered during his performance (the “Materials”).
Any use of the Materials without the express prior written consent of
Pilot Boy Productions, Inc. is strictly prohibited and is punishable to
the full extent of the law.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

clean_body: [ ]Hill Harper for Senate Hello, We are thrilled to extend an exclusive invitation to you for an unforgettable evening with comedy icon Dave Chappelle! Join us for a live show in Detroit on Thursday, July 11th. Doors open at 6:00 PM, and the show starts at 7:30 PM. Ticket Options: - LIMITED Balcony: $250 - SOLD OUT - General Admission: $500 - Gold Circle: $1000 - Gold Circle + VIP Reception: $3300 VIP Gold Circle ticket holders will also be invited to a VIP reception following the show with Hill Harper. Bring your friends to what will be the best night of comedy in Detroit this year! [ ]To purchase your tickets, click this link! Don’t live in Michigan or can’t make it? Consider donating to the campaign! We have under 35 days until the election and every dollar gets put to work immediately for voter outreach! [ ]DONATE » Thank you for your support! - HH This is a strict NO CELL PHONES ALLOWED show. Please leave your phones in your cars or at home. Anyone who brings a cell phone will be required to place it in a locked pouch. Upon arrival at the venue, all phones, smart watches and accessories will be secured in individual Yondr pouches that will be opened at the end of the event. Guests maintain possession of their devices at all times.Everyone is subject to a pat down and wanding. Anyone caught with a cell phone inside the venue will be immediately ejected. It's Gretchen Whitmer.

Two years ago, the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and revoked the federal right to abortion; a right many of us have had our entire lives.

Since then, Republican-led state legislatures across the country have been relentless in passing draconian abortion laws. Patients have been denied life-saving care and doctors and nurses have faced the threat of prosecution just for doing their jobs.

**If anti-choice Republicans win this November, we can expect this landscape to get worse.**

**[That's why I'm emailing you today. My friends at EMILYs List are hard at work supporting Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot, and they need your help. name: JD Vance
subject: I came into this world as a hillbilly…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Now I’m a U.S. Senator standing in the breach for the left behind and forgotten folks who made this country great but were abandoned by the political class.
Now I stand in the breach for the left behind, the hillbillies, and the forgotten folks who made this country great but were abandoned by the political class.

I was born a hillbilly in the foothills of Appalachia.

I was raised by my Mamaw and Papaw.

**This is JD Vance - now I'm a U.S. Senator standing in the breach for the left behind and forgotten folks who made this country great but were abandoned by the political class.**

The same corrupt elites allowing...
- Liberal operatives to prosecute the leader of our Party
- Entitled brats to desecrate our monuments
- Activists to spew anti-American propaganda in our schools
- Chinese-made fentanyl to decimate families and kill our kids
- Illegal aliens to take the jobs of hardworking Americans
It's a disgrace but hear this: Blue collar, white collar, or no collar - I will always stand between you and the Democrat Machine as it plunges our country into ruin.

_But you and I both know the strength of our movement comes down to our numbers._ Millions of Americans elected President Trump, millions stepped up when he was convicted, and millions more will help save this country from the corrupt Liberal elites.

So here's my final pitch to you, Friend:

This will be the most expensive election in American history. By a lot. The Democrat Machine has always crushed us in fundraising. **We have the message. We have the candidates. We have the leader - and we can win it all. **

_But that takes everyone stepping up right now. Not tomorrow. Not in October. Right here and now._

body:
| [ ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=a988846518b341d2b5c9fb550e7be4eb&_e=q2QH2j54eRl2QN4BKD3y2YdWgwmhcOSVCy9GiN5YMzcMVUI1zoYOoEW82J4kZZPbb2P4emY-hMmtVRn_IlN4mmJZLZNQl4Z9T9Dvy-TsVt9_BFkpev9SwSpDidguW8u2rRGwuJt4TKqVQRIks17hDTb7_WkpyzXX6z0LM2F8X-yOxAro9bnTnX4DE3gCcCD3vVT3ypodofU0rH5oPerYcL4YQxsaA4abpM0vMbRHN16gMigUPQJjvf3kT4PhQjErRNxpusG1jpKlSMDO8THXU6hQiAbEhgyDGnWb-uRhJG3dSUV39qTJuNK9WKTjEYrlzeTYLiNh1J6pROxQ0VDzOA%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

_Thank you for taking the time to open and read this email. Your attention means a lot, especially with how busy our inboxes can get._

As a United States Congresswoman, it's a key priority of mine to stay connected with conservatives like yourself through emails, texts, mail, and phone calls. My goal is to keep everyone informed and in the loop!

**I would like to ask you a quick favor. Could you read this message all the way through?** Your engagement is important for my mission to bridge the gap between our government's leaders and the people they represent.

Usually, only about 35% of our supporters open these emails, and just 1% make donations. It's a bit of a challenge since I rely on your support to hit our fundraising goals and make a difference in Washington.

**I don 't rely on billionaires or Wall Street stock brokers to fund my campaign. I believe politicians should be connected to everyone, not just the top 1%.** That's why I think it's crucial to fuel our conservative mission with contributions from people who share real values - people like you and me.

**Just think about it:** if everyone who opened this email gave just $3, we could easily blow past all our fundraising targets together.

| [ **DONATE $3** ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=a988846518b341d2b5c9fb550e7be4eb&_e=q2QH2j54eRl2QN4BKD3y2YdWgwmhcOSVCy9GiN5YMzcMVUI1zoYOoEW82J4kZZPbb2P4emY-hMmtVRn_IlN4mmJZLZNQl4Z9T9Dvy-TsVt9_BFkpev9SwSpDidguW8u2vUeW2DLiUoT8883vmFh21rVYNdv0creUDQitdYgOUhjFgpTEW8ZB9PYIJcMeKEoE42T-7JytAOELc_9sM-RsqAu3ku5Yk8aPNni1ko0U3CXdLm5GOuCm3NDR9YQJbk8Sl3A4vNQywhGB5Wd7UnwU6miw5-GuOS-OvRgOmsFaop-eDTM8ITsYlHRDltrIB8M3jrIuxKRW7uloURNWiyU0pQ%3D%3D)
---
[ **CHIP IN WHAT YOU CAN** ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=a988846518b341d2b5c9fb550e7be4eb&_e=q2QH2j54eRl2QN4BKD3y2YdWgwmhcOSVCy9GiN5YMzcMVUI1zoYOoEW82J4kZZPbb2P4emY-hMmtVRn_IlN4mmJZLZNQl4Z9T9Dvy-TsVt9_BFkpev9SwSpDidguW8u2rRGwuJt4TKqVQRIks17hDTb7_WkpyzXX6z0LM2F8X-yOxAro9bnTnX4DE3gCcCD37sQXqNdpe9GI-rHnLbfv4W68ihYrgCTu073HTf52GVrIv7PdkzQIa7jtTxIu881gLwXIRfxzQuN5B_RJphL7D_hbEcRoM9_jaNzoUz9AwUZHiYYZ8iodMwbXRId4M38efsBUnQhyNcaxq1TZJ6RXiw%3D%3D)
---

Like most of you, I was raised in a humble home that prioritized traditional values. My father is a proud immigrant from Greece who came to the United States with nothing. He worked several jobs to support our family and truly understands the value of hard work and grit.

My mother is a Cuban exile of the brutal Castro dictatorship, fleeing to America with only the clothes on her back. She is a great woman and an even better American. **Never did my parents ask for handouts from the government to get by.**

**My goal is to restore America to a nation where immigrants can come with nothing and still have the opportunity to create a great life for themselves. I 'm striving to build an America that once again offers the promise of the American Dream.** **I 'd be beyond appreciative if you could help me out and donate the price of a New York Subway fare.** **[Democrats rely on Hollywood and Big Tech to donate thousands of dollars a day. Not me- I count on the generosity of humble folks like you and me to chip in $3, $5, or even $15 to reach my goal. ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=a988846518b341d2b5c9fb550e7be4eb&_e=q2QH2j54eRl2QN4BKD3y2YdWgwmhcOSVCy9GiN5YMzcMVUI1zoYOoEW82J4kZZPbb2P4emY-hMmtVRn_IlN4mmJZLZNQl4Z9T9Dvy-TsVt9_BFkpev9SwSpDidguW8u2rRGwuJt4TKqVQRIks17hDTb7_WkpyzXX6z0LM2F8X-yOxAro9bnTnX4DE3gCcCD3DpCMwm0n5GVduoYvp-VvgGTyTKCPUfK_yk6PNZkCPIqVVDPuDPS3_ppSsHeMy-hKdAOLyTh3jqywihkT8uDL_O228fdtoJVydrf_Wsv6WLTK1aoCOOzCNUCf4n8ejsJqZ4qfGKgmLfi4H0LGJfYQ6A%3D%3D)**

[ **CHIP IN THE PRICE OF 1 SUBWAY RIDE** ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=a988846518b341d2b5c9fb550e7be4eb&_e=q2QH2j54eRl2QN4BKD3y2YdWgwmhcOSVCy9GiN5YMzcMVUI1zoYOoEW82J4kZZPbb2P4emY-hMmtVRn_IlN4mmJZLZNQl4Z9T9Dvy-TsVt9_BFkpev9SwSpDidguW8u2rRGwuJt4TKqVQRIks17hDTb7_WkpyzXX6z0LM2F8X-yOxAro9bnTnX4DE3gCcCD3DmpeCkXULJeadOyspdbsrvRIR_aSg4sMHHhU8E6Vy-paaU7ZpaIQwHpaWcdyzxIOB-XH6FB14Px3L0dDKLh_IOFoFDXNqxpAe-l0oE4kzC2C6dHjBfdritVZHp9Ww5BGNgeX7RMav44kfQAYsed-Zg%3D%3D)
---

I'm a New Yorker through and through- I know the value of one ride.

Dems hate that I'm reaching out to you like this... I'm the **ONLY Republican foothold left** representing NYC in Congress.

I'm not throwing in the towel, and I trust you won't abandon me or our common principles either.

**[If you stand for getting this country back on track and restoring the American Dream that my parents believed in, please chip in whatever you can before midnight.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=a988846518b341d2b5c9fb550e7be4eb&_e=q2QH2j54eRl2QN4BKD3y2YdWgwmhcOSVCy9GiN5YMzcMVUI1zoYOoEW82J4kZZPbb2P4emY-hMmtVRn_IlN4mmJZLZNQl4Z9T9Dvy-TsVt9_BFkpev9SwSpDidguW8u2rRGwuJt4TKqVQRIks17hDTb7_WkpyzXX6z0LM2F8X-yOxAro9bnTnX4DE3gCcCD3LOkFfvh1NtvNZXIyMqNhRe5Gmx_DWbMKejUS9SpjCPvcl3olVK9ATJPITAs-_KJ8XpbYEo9HA1Utv-gozHwLovcTLVtUGct5JzqwQcbATbaGQrizFK685eEM5IZscPxSRJRXC4xLILEvsGHxH9xFZA%3D%3D)**

Every single dollar helps.

As a United States Congresswoman, it's a key priority of mine to stay connected with conservatives like yourself through emails, texts, mail, and phone calls. My goal is to keep everyone informed and in the loop! I would like to ask you a quick favor. Could you read this message all the way through? Your engagement is important for my mission to bridge the gap between our government's leaders and the people they represent. Usually, only about 35% of our supporters open these emails, and just 1% make donations. It's a bit of a challenge since I rely on your support to hit our fundraising goals and make a difference in Washington. I don 't rely on billionaires or Wall Street stock brokers to fund my campaign. I believe politicians should be connected to everyone, not just the top 1%. That's why I think it's crucial to fuel our conservative mission with contributions from people who share real values - people like you and me. Just think about it: if everyone who opened this email gave just $3, we could easily blow past all our fundraising targets together. | Like most of you, I was raised in a humble home that prioritized traditional values. My father is a proud immigrant from Greece who came to the United States with nothing. He worked several jobs to support our family and truly understands the value of hard work and grit. My mother is a Cuban exile of the brutal Castro dictatorship, fleeing to America with only the clothes on her back. She is a great woman and an even better American. Never did my parents ask for handouts from the government to get by. My goal is to restore America to a nation where immigrants can come with nothing and still have the opportunity to create a great life for themselves. I 'm striving to build an America that once again offers the promise of the American Dream. I 'd be beyond appreciative if you could help me out and donate the price of a New York Subway fare. I'm a New Yorker through and through- I know the value of one ride. Dems hate that I'm reaching out to you like this... I'm the ONLY Republican foothold left representing NYC in Congress. I'm not throwing in the towel, and I trust you won't abandon me or our common principles either. Every single dollar helps. Congresswoman Nicole Malliotakis | | Paid for by Nicole for New York Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. Box 60487 Staten Island, NY 10306 View our privacy policy

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: defend our reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |

Friend, Donald Trump had an interview with TIME Magazine in April, did you see it?
* He said he would allow states to prosecute and punish women seeking reproductive health care.
* He said he would allow states to invade women’s privacy and _monitor their pregnancies._
* And he wouldn’t rule out signing a national abortion ban or legislation banning IVF.

Donald Trump and extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to take away a woman’s right to decide if, when and how she can have children.
Bodily autonomy and right to privacy are on the ballot this November. **That’s why we _need_ to do everything we can to keep the Senate blue this fall: so we can hold our Democratic majority and defend our reproductive rights. This is the only way we can stop a national ban and codify Roe v. Wade.**
**But I can’t do it without your help. Unlike Trump and his far-right allies, I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs. Instead, I rely on grassroots support from people like you.[_So please, friend, will you help me defend my must-win seat and keep the Senate blue by chipping in $5_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88276299/483710023/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5170-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTQwMzUwOS1lMjNhLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HN6De0iMfdQsX88pyxMYMwuEYGTQZexSU67tpftgoFo=)****[ _, or whatever you can spare, today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88276301/483710024/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5170-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTQwMzUwOS1lMjNhLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HN6De0iMfdQsX88pyxMYMwuEYGTQZexSU67tpftgoFo=)**

name: Biden HQ
subject: Trump is closer than ever to retaking power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Donald Trump is a dangerous man who will take away our freedoms and tank our economy if reelected. | | |
---
Peter -- When we reflect on what's true and block out the lies, it paints a HORRIFYING picture of Donald Trump. The truth is that he overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and plans to sign a national abortion ban. The truth is that he encouraged a violent insurrection on January 6 to try to prevent the peaceful transition of power. The truth is that he failed to manage COVID, leading to needless deaths. The truth is that he insulted our fallen soldiers calling them "losers and suckers." The truth is that he has the worst jobs record since Herbert Hoover. The truth is that he invokes Nazi language at rallies and said Hitler did "some good things." The truth is that he proposed cutting Social Security and Medicare every year as president. The truth is that he told communities grieving from gun violence to "get over it." The truth is that he called for terminating the Constitution and is pledging to rule as a dictator. **Donald Trump is a dangerous man who will take away our freedoms if reelected.** But in spite of all of that, Trump is _closer than ever_ to retaking power -- and he's amassed a gigantic campaign war chest to help him do it. _That's why President Biden needs you and your $25 today, Peter._ [**Will you donate before midnight to help us fight back against MAGA lies and defeat Trump at the ballot box? Your $25 is urgently needed so we avoid falling short of our contribution goal in Cresco. clean_body: Donald Trump is a dangerous man who will take away our freedoms and tank our economy if reelected. | | | Peter -- When we reflect on what's true and block out the lies, it paints a HORRIFYING picture of Donald Trump. The truth is that he overturned Roe v. Wade and plans to sign a national abortion ban. The truth is that he encouraged a violent insurrection on January 6 to try to prevent the peaceful transition of power. The truth is that he failed to manage COVID, leading to needless deaths. The truth is that he insulted our fallen soldiers calling them "losers and suckers." The truth is that he has the worst jobs record since Herbert Hoover. The truth is that he invokes Nazi language at rallies and said Hitler did "some good things." The truth is that he proposed cutting Social Security and Medicare every year as president. The truth is that he told communities grieving from gun violence to "get over it." The truth is that he called for terminating the Constitution and is pledging to rule as a dictator. Donald Trump is a dangerous man who will take away our freedoms if reelected. But in spite of all of that, Trump is closer than ever to retaking power -- and he's amassed a gigantic campaign war chest to help him do it. That's why President Biden needs you and your $25 today, Peter. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Let's keep the faith, Biden HQ

If you need more information — here’s what the far-right has planned for a Trump presidency:
* The Project 2025 proposal calls for independent agencies like the Department of Justice to be under direct control of the president and executive branch, blurring the lines and corrupting the rule of law.
* The proposal also calls for eliminating thousands of jobs and job protections for government workers who would be replaced by partisan, political appointments.
* It also calls for EXTREME cuts to research on renewable energy sources and guts agencies working towards our clean climate goals.
* Project 2025 would work to defund the Department of Education and eliminate the protections against discrimination guaranteed to students based on race, orientation, and gender identity.

This policy is backed by a budget of over $20 million dollars and Trump has given this extreme agenda his seal of approval. clean_body: Project 2025 is the extreme right’s dystopian playbook. | = We’re FOUR months from the November election and our team needs your support to protect this seat this November. Extremists on the right are outlining their agenda, and it’s devastating to working families and marginalized groups, and will fundamentally change our way of life. = | = If you need more information — here’s what the far-right has planned for a Trump presidency: The Project 2025 proposal calls for independent agencies like the Department of Justice to be under direct control of the president and executive branch, blurring the lines and corrupting the rule of law. The proposal also calls for eliminating thousands of jobs and job protections for government workers who would be replaced by partisan, political appointments. It also calls for EXTREME cuts to research on renewable energy sources and guts agencies working towards our clean climate goals. Project 2025 would work to defund the Department of Education and eliminate the protections against discrimination guaranteed to students based on race, orientation, and gender identity. This policy is backed by a budget of over $20 million dollars and Trump has given this extreme agenda his seal of approval. = = Thanks for your support. — Ross Floyd Finance Director, Nikki Budzinski for Congress = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = | **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

**We WON’T be silent while they are butchering children!**

Hi, I’m Eithan Haim M.D.

**Last year, I blew the whistle on the LARGEST children's hospital in the world LYING about their transgender program.** Children are being pumped full of hormones and _**BUTCHERED**_ for the Woke agenda. I was _**SICK**_**** to my stomach seeing CHILDREN manipulated to FOREVER change their bodies! The other day, I awoke to _**THREE**_ heavily armed federal agents at my door. They told me I was being indicted with _**FOUR felonies!**_ Now, I’m facing **10 YEARS IN PRISON** for revealing the _**EVILS**_ being done to children! **I’ve been working with my friends at the American Principles Project to protect children from this BUTCHERY!**

Together we are fighting to PROTECT children from the radical trans agenda. **_But everything will be at risk if we don’t win in November!_**

_They won’t stop at Doctors being arrested..._

**...THEY’LL BE COMING FOR ALL CONSERVATIVES!** If you oppose the WOKE agenda of BUTCHERING children, _**YOU ARE ON THEIR LIST!**_
**We need your help NOW because the attacks, prosecutions, and jailings won’t stop unless we WIN in 2024!**

Hey there, team — Mobilizing and engaging young voters will be absolutely vital to flipping Arizona blue this year. Gen-Z is one of the most politically engaged generations ever in decades, and it’s easy to see why. For decades, right-wing legislators have made schools and campuses unsafe, destroyed our climate, and made it impossible for young people to earn a living wage or find affordable housing. That’s why I’m reaching out today. The Young Democrats of Arizona is a powerful, grassroots organization that reaches every corner of the state to connect with young voters directly. Whether they’re in our rural or urban areas, the Young Dems are fighting for a progressive future that includes accessible education, well-funded public schools, and access to abortion care for everyone. **[Will you split a contribution with our party and the Young Democrats of Arizona to help us engage young voters across Arizona this cycle?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88278223/483713661/780699344?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240705_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMxMzA3MjItZTQzYS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qGRl9qTVGzmp3Xpoajlm0lvUg06O26mUS5OBSQAdkSc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between the Arizona Democratic Party and the Young Democrats of Arizona immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88278229/483713675/780699344?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240705_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMxMzA3MjItZTQzYS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qGRl9qTVGzmp3Xpoajlm0lvUg06O26mUS5OBSQAdkSc=)

Losing this seat puts affordable healthcare, lower prescription drug prices, and reproductive rights on the line. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = The country can’t risk letting MAGA extremism stay in power — and our opponent Gabe Evans has supported an abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest, which endangers millions of women across the U.S. Let’s show Yadira that we're here to back her up. = | = Thanks for your support, Yadira Caraveo HQ | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@caraveoforcongress.com to your address book. This campaign is powered by grassroots donations. You can = to make a donation to support Yadira Caraveo for CO-08. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Add your name and endorse Mark Kelly!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
It would mean a lot.
#

Friends —
Thanks to the support of so many of you, Mark is serving a full six-year term in the U.S. Senate.
In 2020, tens of thousands of folks signed on to say they were with Mark. Thousands more did the same in 2022. Their support was one of the reasons we were so successful, and we couldn’t be more thankful for everyone who stepped up.
But now, Mark needs our help on this new mission: _delivering for the people of Arizona and the United States in the Senate, and bringing science, data, and facts back to Congress._
**So today, we’re respectfully asking you to sign on and personally endorse Mark Kelly. We’d be honored if you would renew your support for our next mission.**
[**Will you add your name to say you personally support Mark Kelly? It’s important for Mark to know that he can count on you to fight by his side.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_mark_kelly_july24_em/?source=em240705-1-30&refcode2=5798.6688874.WZpjB9&akid=5798%2E6688874%2EWZpjB9)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_mark_kelly_july24_em/?source=em240705-1-30&refcode2=5798.6688874.WZpjB9&akid=5798%2E6688874%2EWZpjB9)**
Adding your name to support Mark is a simple and quick action, but it speaks volumes to what we are trying to do here:_support Mark in the Senate so he can keep delivering real results to improve people’s lives._
Because when you and thousands of others all step up and say you’re with Mark, you become part of our ongoing team.
Thank you in advance for adding your name, and for having Mark’s back.
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5798%2E6688874%2EWZpjB9).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

| | Dear Fellow American, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.

body:

Derek, this
week on Rachel Maddow’s MSNBC show, she hosted Adam for a live interview
on the dangerous Supreme Court decision granting Donald Trump almost
complete legal immunity for “official acts” he took as president.

But before Adam joined her, she highlighted a disturbing connection
between Trump’s immunity and his many, frequent threats against Adam. Take
a look:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2024_abs_em.oAIbuh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240705_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=6958%2E5257348%2E8lc7o0 ]LA Times article: Trump says he'll jail his opponents

“Congressman Adam Schiff, who knows something about trying to hold a president
accountable, he was the lead prosecutor in the first impeachment of Trump. He
then served on the January 6th investigation in Congress after Trump left
office.

Schiff has been a very frequent target of very explicit threats from
Trump.

Trump once posted ominously that Schiff “has not paid the price yet for
what he has done to our country.”

He also suggested Schiff should be arrested for treason, that was just
days after he appeared to fantasize publicly about executing traitors.

He said not just Schiff, but all members of the January 6th investigation
should be put in jail.

Schiff and his colleagues say they are preparing for Trump to follow
through on these threats if he becomes president again.

Thanks to today’s Supreme Court ruling, a second term President Trump
would have broad new immunity from prosecution for actions he might take
against his political enemies. And looking at the ruling in one very
straightforward way, it looks like he would have that immunity almost
without limit.”

— Rachel Maddow, 7/1/24

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2024_abs_em.oAIbuh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240705_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=5&t=1005&akid=6958%2E5257348%2E8lc7o0 ]Derek,
it’s not just us saying this — journalists, historians, and legal scholars
are all sounding the alarm about the danger of this Supreme Court decision
placing the president above the law. The ONLY way we can insulate our
democracy and its defenders like Adam from Trump’s retribution is by
defeating him at the ballot box — please rush in

Peter, the National Democratic Redistricting Committee is no stranger to playing the long game. **This work is hard, and victories won’t happen overnight — but they _will_ happen.** [POWER OUR LONG-TERM EFFORTS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88283220/483720982/1763522771?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_julyfun_email_20240705-NDRC-Tier1-MIVotingRights_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240705-NDRC-Tier1-MIVotingRights_&utm_campaign=julyfun&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkMDg0NmEwLWU3M2EtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZDD1gYjsleU9cngoKMl96GkKiH_eGVVJKyGfnGX-Jwo=) Not convinced? Look no further than my home state of Michigan: We fought for years to reform the redistricting process there — and with your support, we won a fairer map that is already leading to a more representative state legislature. Late last month, the state Senate moved to advance SB 401, also known as the Michigan Voting Rights Act, despite GOP opposition. If passed, this bill would help secure access to the ballot box by creating new protections for voters who’ve historically been discriminated against. **It comes down to this: When Democrats are in power in state legislatures, they advance legislation to defend voting rights and defend our democracy — _even as Republicans try to stop them_.** [**The NDRC is working to secure fair maps, protect voting rights, and elect Democracy Defenders to help make more of these victories possible. Will you pitch in now to help us continue fighting for fairness?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88283225/483720983/1763522771?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_julyfun_email_20240705-NDRC-Tier1-MIVotingRights_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240705-NDRC-Tier1-MIVotingRights_&utm_campaign=julyfun&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkMDg0NmEwLWU3M2EtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZDD1gYjsleU9cngoKMl96GkKiH_eGVVJKyGfnGX-Jwo=) **** **** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Will you pitch in now to help us continue fighting for fairness? | Peter, the National Democratic Redistricting Committee is no stranger to playing the long game. This work is hard, and victories won’t happen overnight — but they will happen. = Not convinced? Look no further than my home state of Michigan: We fought for years to reform the redistricting process there — and with your support, we won a fairer map that is already leading to a more representative state legislature. Late last month, the state Senate moved to advance SB 401, also known as the Michigan Voting Rights Act, despite GOP opposition. If passed, this bill would help secure access to the ballot box by creating new protections for voters who’ve historically been discriminated against. It comes down to this: When Democrats are in power in state legislatures, they advance legislation to defend voting rights and defend our democracy — even as Republicans try to stop them. = ** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, Brianna = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. **Team in case you didn’t already know, the issues you’re passionate about are the exact same issues NextGen is fighting for. So when you join our movement, you’re sending the message that:**
🏳️🌈🏳️⚧️ Our right to love and live our lives authentically is unassailable and should be protected.
🏥⚕️ Abortion is healthcare, and healthcare is a basic human right.
🎓📚 College education should unlock opportunities, not drag us down in debt.
📈💰 Our economy should work for all of us, not just a wealthy few.
🪸🌱 Our planet and its resources should be protected.
✊🗣️ **Young Americans can and will make a difference in the fight to protect our democracy.**
While these statements may seem obvious to us, we know firsthand that fighting for what’s right isn’t always popular and it _definitely_ isn’t always easy.
Far-right extremists are working overtime to keep us from making progress, **_and we can’t let them win._**
[If the issues we listed resonate with you, let Congress know it’s past time for them to get on board with our agenda for our future. Far-right extremists are working overtime to keep us from making progress, and we can’t let them win. | Together, NextGen America | | = |

name: Team Casey
subject: 4 months
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3473%2E552475%2EZWgA_z)
Peter, we’re just four months out from Election Day.
As we head into the final stretch, it’s more important than ever that we have the resources to power this campaign through the finish line. [**So before we go any further, we’re asking for just $4, one dollar for each month we have left.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240705-2?refcode=em20240705-2&recurring=1&refcode2=3473_552475_ZWgA_z&akid=3473%2E552475%2EZWgA_z)
**[Power Our Campaign ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240705-2?refcode=em20240705-2&recurring=1&refcode2=3473_552475_ZWgA_z&akid=3473%2E552475%2EZWgA_z)**
Here’s why your support today, four months out, is so crucial:
**4\. Our opponent is an out-of-state mega-millionaire.** Without strong grassroots support, Bob could be outspent by David McCormick, a mega-millionaire hedge fund executive who is self-funding his campaign to the tune of millions of dollars.
**3\. We’re up against nearly $75 million in Republican ad spending.** On top of the tens of millions of dollars that right-wing super PACs like McConnell’s Senate Leadership Fund have booked to blanket the airwaves, David McCormick just launched his first attack ad against Bob.
**2\. National Republicans’ anti-choice agenda is on the ballot.** With a slim Senate majority, losing this seat would mean handing the Senate to anti-choice extremists. If elected, McCormick won’t waste a second before implementing Donald Trump’s extreme, anti-choice agenda.
**1\. The path to the Senate and the White House hinges on Pennsylvania**. Political experts agree that if Bob Casey loses, Democrats don’t have a chance in hell at holding the Senate and the White House.
There are many reasons why we need to protect our Democratic Senate majority in November. But it all starts here in Pennsylvania. [**So please, give what you can to make that possible.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240705-2?refcode=em20240705-2&recurring=1&refcode2=3473_552475_ZWgA_z&akid=3473%2E552475%2EZWgA_z)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240705-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240705-2-el&refcode2=3473_552475_ZWgA_z&akid=3473%2E552475%2EZWgA_z) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240705-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240705-2-el&refcode2=3473_552475_ZWgA_z&akid=3473%2E552475%2EZWgA_z) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240705-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240705-2-el&refcode2=3473_552475_ZWgA_z&akid=3473%2E552475%2EZWgA_z) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240705-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240705-2-el&refcode2=3473_552475_ZWgA_z&akid=3473%2E552475%2EZWgA_z) [Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240705-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240705-2-el&refcode2=3473_552475_ZWgA_z&akid=3473%2E552475%2EZWgA_z) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240705-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240705-2&refcode2=3473_552475_ZWgA_z&akid=3473%2E552475%2EZWgA_z)

Casey HQ

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This email is long, but I want to explain what this movement is fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please let me explain, Peter.
#
Peter,
I’m running for U.S. Senate because I want everyday Missourians to call the shots in our country — not giant corporations or the cowards like Josh Hawley they’ve bought off in Washington.
**This email is long, but I wanted to take some time today to explain what this movement is fighting for — and why I need you to be part of it.**
**[CHIP IN NOW→](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55286?refcode=em20240705-5935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5935%2E614464%2EnEiai0)**
**When I came home between deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, it was clear to me that Missouri is on the frontlines of the fight for power in our country.**
While communities like mine all across our state were stripped for parts, corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley attacked workers with anti-union schemes like “Right-to-Work” and fought to block wage increases for Missouri families — all to enrich multinational corporations and mega-donors who bankroll their campaigns and their careers.
They helped Wall Street financiers sell off our farmland to billionaires in China and Brazil — devastating rural communities and contributing to the closure of 90% of Missouri hog producers in a single generation.
One of Missouri’s oldest and largest employers, Anheuser-Busch, was sold to a Belgian conglomerate — costing Missouri more than a thousand jobs.
Missouri-based Monsanto, one of the world’s most important agrochemical and biotechnology companies, was sold to Germany — eliminating even more jobs.
And as dozens more headquarters were taken out of state, politicians in power like Josh Hawley were happy to sit back and watch it happen.
**Manufacturing, agriculture, production — they’re shipping it all away to foreign oligarchs who don’t care about working people in our state.** And while our communities were being gutted, these same politicians voted time and time again to spend trillions of dollars and thousands of lives on overseas wars that got their Big Oil friends rich.
These politicians have spent decades sparking phony culture wars to distract and divide our families. They’ve become so obsessed with controlling our lives, they made Missouri the first state in the nation to ban abortion — without exceptions for victims of rape or incest.
**Our state deserves a Senator who will stand up and fight for it — and I’m ready to serve.[So if you’re ready to elect a real warrior for working people to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat, will you please rush a donation of any amount toward our grassroots campaign today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55286?refcode=em20240705-5935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5935%2E614464%2EnEiai0)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55287?refcode=em20240705-5935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=5935%2E614464%2EnEiai0) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55287?refcode=em20240705-5935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=5935%2E614464%2EnEiai0) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55286?refcode=em20240705-5935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=5935%2E614464%2EnEiai0)
---
**We aren’t fighting the corporate status quo just to make a point, either. This is a race we really can win.**
Our values have won at the ballot box in Missouri for referendums that go beyond what’s happening nowadays in Washington, or even what political elites in Jefferson City are willing to allow.
For the last three election cycles, Missouri voters have side-stepped our politicians by voting to increase the minimum wage well above the federal level, expand health care, repeal an anti-worker “Right-to-Work” scheme, legalize weed, and enact more protections against political corruption with wide margins.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55286?refcode=em20240705-5935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=5935%2E614464%2EnEiai0)
**So now, we’re building a record-breaking, people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley and take this Senate seat back for working Missourians.**
Together, we’re going to stop printing money for Wall Street and start funding our schools enough to get Missouri out of last place for starting teacher pay.
We’re going to abolish corporate PACs and demand a government that safeguards our democracy and holds corrupt politicians accountable.
We’re going to take back Missouri farmland for Missouri farmers and start manufacturing essential drugs right here in America.
We’re going to build an economy that puts American workers and small businesses in charge, not giant corporations and foreign oligarchs — an economy that invests in putting America first in the next generation of energy, semiconductors, and supply chain independence.
We’re going to put an end to pointless, trillion-dollar wars and invest in a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a historic investment in our workers and communities to rebuild our forgotten towns and cities, and to finally start making stuff in America again.
And we’re going to finally put everyday Missourians in charge of their own neighborhoods, workplaces, and bodies.
**It’s time to take our power back — and we can’t do it without your support.[So please, will you rush a donation of absolutely any amount toward my grassroots campaign today? I’m not taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race, so you’ll always know I’m fighting for everyday, working people in the U.S. Senate.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55286?refcode=em20240705-5935&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=5935%2E614464%2EnEiai0)**

clean_body: Please let me explain, Peter. Peter, I’m running for U.S. Senate because I want everyday Missourians to call the shots in our country — not giant corporations or the cowards like Josh Hawley they’ve bought off in Washington. This email is long, but I wanted to take some time today to explain what this movement is fighting for — and why I need you to be part of it. When I came home between deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, it was clear to me that Missouri is on the frontlines of the fight for power in our country. While communities like mine all across our state were stripped for parts, corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley attacked workers with anti-union schemes like “Right-to-Work” and fought to block wage increases for Missouri families — all to enrich multinational corporations and mega-donors who bankroll their campaigns and their careers. They helped Wall Street financiers sell off our farmland to billionaires in China and Brazil — devastating rural communities and contributing to the closure of 90% of Missouri hog producers in a single generation. One of Missouri’s oldest and largest employers, Anheuser-Busch, was sold to a Belgian conglomerate — costing Missouri more than a thousand jobs. Missouri-based Monsanto, one of the world’s most important agrochemical and biotechnology companies, was sold to Germany — eliminating even more jobs. And as dozens more headquarters were taken out of state, politicians in power like Josh Hawley were happy to sit back and watch it happen. Manufacturing, agriculture, production — they’re shipping it all away to foreign oligarchs who don’t care about working people in our state. And while our communities were being gutted, these same politicians voted time and time again to spend trillions of dollars and thousands of lives on overseas wars that got their Big Oil friends rich. These politicians have spent decades sparking phony culture wars to distract and divide our families. They’ve become so obsessed with controlling our lives, they made Missouri the first state in the nation to ban abortion — without exceptions for victims of rape or incest. Our state deserves a Senator who will stand up and fight for it — and I’m ready to serve. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: We aren’t fighting the corporate status quo just to make a point, either. This is a race we really can win. Our values have won at the ballot box in Missouri for referendums that go beyond what’s happening nowadays in Washington, or even what political elites in Jefferson City are willing to allow. For the last three election cycles, Missouri voters have side-stepped our politicians by voting to increase the minimum wage well above the federal level, expand health care, repeal an anti-worker “Right-to-Work” scheme, legalize weed, and enact more protections against political corruption with wide margins. So now, we’re building a record-breaking, people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley and take this Senate seat back for working Missourians. Together, we’re going to stop printing money for Wall Street and start funding our schools enough to get Missouri out of last place for starting teacher pay. We’re going to abolish corporate PACs and demand a government that safeguards our democracy and holds corrupt politicians accountable. We’re going to take back Missouri farmland for Missouri farmers and start manufacturing essential drugs right here in America. We’re going to build an economy that puts American workers and small businesses in charge, not giant corporations and foreign oligarchs — an economy that invests in putting America first in the next generation of energy, semiconductors, and supply chain independence. We’re going to put an end to pointless, trillion-dollar wars and invest in a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a historic investment in our workers and communities to rebuild our forgotten towns and cities, and to finally start making stuff in America again. And we’re going to finally put everyday Missourians in charge of their own neighborhoods, workplaces, and bodies. It’s time to take our power back — and we can’t do it without your support. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you for everything, Peter. Now let’s get moving, Lucas | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Nathaniel Moran
subject: The Second Quarter Minuteman Honoree, Meet Your Delegates and Alternates, and More...
body:
This Quarter, we are proud to honor Camille Brown | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
# Welcome to the 2024 Second Quarter edition of **The Moran Minuteman**.
This quarterly newsletter is our way of recognizing extraordinary efforts in the First Congressional District of Texas and providing an inside look into what happens behind the scenes in the life of a Congressman.
---
|
---
|
---
|
## Meet Your 2024 National Delegates & Alternates!
---
|
---
|
---
Tracy Vincent is married to his wonderful wife Donna of 22 years. They have 2 sons, 4 daughters, 16 grandchildren & 1 great-granddaughter. Tracy is President of Gregg County Republican Club, Past Gregg County Republican Chairman, Gregg County Voting Machine Evaluations Committee, Gregg County Wide Voting Committee, East Texans for Liberty VP, Gregg County Republican Fundraising and Longview and Henderson Chamber Leadership Programs. He is a member of Mobberly Baptist Church - Longview, Texas. Tracy truly enjoys helping the citizens of East Texas with educating our voters and young Republicans. And also being a Constitutional Conservative Patriot of "MAGA and Greater!", for all citizens of our great United States of America.
|
---
Craig Licciardi is from Flint, TX and has seven children with his wife Stephanie. They attend Harvest Time Church. Interestingly enough, he was encouraged to get involved in local politics by Congressman Moran's father, who encouraged him to go to his first precinct convention. Former Congressman Louie Gohmert also encouraged Craig to get involved at the local level. Craig didn't know what that looked like at the time, but he dove into the deep end of the pool, attending that first precinct convention in 2014. He became the precinct chair, and since then, he has been a delegate to six state conventions and served as our senate district's representative on the state Rules Committee in 2020. Craig is grateful and honored to have the opportunity to represent Texas' First Congressional District in 2024 as a national delegate in Milwaukee!
|
---
|
---
Lee Lester has been active in the Republican Party for over 30 years. Lee moved to Harrison County 11 years ago and became a precinct chair immediately filling a vacancy. After two previous county chairs resigned, he was asked to fill the positions as County Chair. Six years later, the county party is operating in the black and donating to local and statewide candidates. Lee is honored to serve the conservative Republicans of Harrison County.
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
## Quarterly Roundup!
---
|
---
Congressman Moran with Republican Women of Gregg County
|
---
|
---
Congressman Moran with Republican Women of Smith County
|
---
|
---
Congressman Moran with Harrison County Republican Women
|
---
|
---
|
## Congratulations to our Second Quarter Minuteman - Camille Brown
When I think of East Texans, I think of the [Minutemen of the Revolutionary War](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=39ca7b60c4&e=bbce4dd6ad). Loyal to country and community, dependable, selfless, and ready at a moment's notice, the Minutemen were American heroes who helped turn the tide of the Revolutionary War. **Today's East Texans reflect those traits.** You are patriotic, dependable, and deeply committed to making our communities better.

Each quarter, I will recognize an East Texan who has gone above and beyond in serving our region - someone who epitomizes the identity of a Minuteman. In addition to recognition in the quarterly newsletter, we will send the person a Moran Minuteman t-shirt.

This quarter's Minuteman, Camille Brown, has served with excellence in education for over 50 years. She is the owner and executive director of Stepping Stone School. Camille began her career as a kindergarten lead teacher in a private school in Tyler in 1966. She taught reading in public and private schools and directed two preschool programs, which she founded. Camille is also involved in numerous national, state, and local professional and civic organizations.

A nominator said, "In 2007 my husband and I had a 48-hour notice that we needed to become guardians for our three grandchildren. Ms. Camille, like a minuteman, reached out immediately to help us meet their every need. She helped with school uniforms, scholarship applications, enrollment and even bringing her staff together to provide an old-fashioned pounding to help feed these little brothers. Her quick efforts helped to stabilize a family crisis."

Additionally, Camille holds an annual Patriotic Parade around the 4th of July for her students at Stepping Stone. She wants the boys and girls to learn truth, honesty and freedom and to truly appreciate our veterans for what they have sacrificed for all of us. Camille teaches Christian ethics and values directing her students' paths into life-long skills for helping others. Her hobbies include reading, fishing, gardening, and flying. She has four children, ten grandchildren, and one great-grandchild.
---
|
---
| Thank you, Ms. Camille, for always helping others in a moment's notice and for teaching the next generation about true patriotism. It is an honor to recognize you as the 2024 Second Quarter Minuteman.

Do you know an East Texan who would be a great next recipient? Please submit their name **[here](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=9d880feb29&e=bbce4dd6ad).**

Our Moran Minuteman team will also be out and about serving at community events and in disaster relief efforts. Look for us, and we’ll toss you a t-shirt!
---
|
---
|
---
|
## Now...on to the National Convention
I am honored to represent the First District of Texas at the 2024 Republican National Convention in Milwaukee!
---
|
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Nathaniel Moran Congressman, First District of Texas
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | VALUES
---
[ ](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=829bc61774&e=bbce4dd6ad)

subject: Immigrant👏 Rights 👏 Are 👏 Human 👏 Rights👏
body:
“Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free” | | | Peter, **** “Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free...” That’s what it says at the base of the Statue of Liberty. Those are the words our country must live up to. Because immigrant 👏 rights 👏 are 👏 human 👏 rights 👏. We should be a place that upholds human rights and welcomes newcomers. We have everything we need to welcome immigrants with generosity instead of hate — it’s time our government started acting like it. Instead, immigrants are used as scapegoats, political bargaining chips, and are denied protections and basic human rights. **[That’s why UWDA is here — to fight for more. clean_body: “Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free” | | | Peter, ** “Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free...” That’s what it says at the base of the Statue of Liberty. Those are the words our country must live up to. Because immigrant 👏 rights 👏 are 👏 human 👏 rights 👏. We should be a place that upholds human rights and welcomes newcomers. We have everything we need to welcome immigrants with generosity instead of hate — it’s time our government started acting like it. Instead, immigrants are used as scapegoats, political bargaining chips, and are denied protections and basic human rights. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Carolina, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today:** | |

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Democrat Congresswoman under investigation for one heinous act caught on camera
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | July 05, 2024

Democrat
Congresswoman under investigation for one heinous act caught on
camera

The Left is used to getting away with their crimes. But
thus one isn't getting away that easily.

And now a Democrat Congresswoman
is under investigation for one heinous act caught on camera.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

U.S. Military issues an
ominous warning after Biden made this destructive move

Joe Biden has
continuously made this country weak through his awful policies.
But now things have reached a boiling point.
➞ Continue Reading

Donald Trump just
received a landmark court ruling that could change everything

The former president
has been smacked with legal woes thanks to the corrupt Biden DOJ.
But the tide may officially be turning.
➞ Continue Reading

Barack Obama doesn't hold
back in latest betrayal of President Biden

The former president
used to be incredibly close to Joe Biden. But that relationship
is changing fast.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Schiff, Adam
subject: Can I share something with you, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
younger me never imagined this could happen
| | |
---
Hi friend, can I tell you a quick story about this photo?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88290184/483727932/-1984759417?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1476-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGU3YTg3ODUtZWMzYS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qP6Ln2-31gEHFE-yZEbYxaAhe8bVpdM8YjWadBcrdsg=)
That's me in 1985 — just 24 years old at my law school graduation, fresh off a student research assistant job for Professor Laurence Tribe, thinking that I had just completed the toughest challenge of my academic career. Well, up to that point, anyway. (The bar exam was still a few weeks away.)
Some years later, I would become an Assistant United States Attorney, and successfully prosecute the first FBI agent charged with espionage, Richard Miller, for spying for the Soviet Union.
As a new graduate of law school, I could never have imagined I would handle a case like that.
Or that I would later investigate a president who also betrayed our country...
...lead his impeachment and Senate trial...
...serve on the January 6 Committee...
...get kicked off the Intelligence Committee by a craven Speaker of the House for doing the above...
...and get censured by extreme partisan MAGA House Republicans under the personal threat of that corrupt president.
Life leads us in uncertain and fortuitous ways. I’m fortunate that at a time when our country has been in trouble, and our democracy at risk, I have been in a position to help do something about it.
In the Senate, I hope to do even more.
**[If you're able to, will you contribute a split donation of $5 between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell’s and my campaign to help me reach the Senate, defend our majority, and defeat Trump? I would be grateful for your help in continuing my service.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88290185/483727934/-1984759417?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1476-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGU3YTg3ODUtZWMzYS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qP6Ln2-31gEHFE-yZEbYxaAhe8bVpdM8YjWadBcrdsg=)**

name: Team Foushee
subject: Valerie understands the value of a promise

She values following through with a promise and making change happen. No matter one’s zip code, Valerie believes _everyone_ deserves reliable transportation that connects them to education, employment opportunities, affordable housing, and more.
Local families, schools, and small businesses will all benefit from these grants – helping North Carolina’s transit infrastructure, and ensuring every North Carolinian has access to quality, affordable transportation.
Valerie is in Congress to uplift the common good. Not distracted by the chaos of Congress, **Valerie remains laser-focused on delivering real results for NC-04 – because that’s what matters. Everything she does is for her home district.**
Valerie will _always_ fight for federal funding that improves the daily lives of North Carolinians. With Valerie at the helm advocating for change, NC-04 doesn’t have to worry about an unfulfilled promise.
[So, can we count on you to make a promise now, Peter? Will you make a donation today to affirm you are standing by Valerie in her non-stop fight to uplift North Carolina? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88290256/483727983/618394365?source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_070524_1_1_Transit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjZiNTZhNC1lYzNhLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m70xYQpvmEum9nMFTYgFJeVBcMzzx1dsvm_59DAFH6g=)

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=49c63ab598214c21bfe308aec9b977eb&_e=NP_KxgJ7MPJyP1TO9ZXrMdocGAo3gtGMw_12xdrXsLjUfFFv0-oszpx0xUr_RzARDvmwBzeLFJJ598zQd1xxs8Tkxu-T33fbyhoyX4hWRBhselFBrZZ6I5mS8WqkejVVf7iZLhRFyoRVgC2c4px-7yfI8RPZaq5GE6WY-vleA6pp56MnsspOx-FjT9iu381rSKq22KXqXzHfxZT2K81iU2yz18Xjw8-o98myPOz2jDVimEEYJD_CJYqizHWzyUE93lLFBxvVvkX_7GdWNuohKHOSg_0O6noUojNoUKPf6-EUe3nCzFglErpfEQcrWH_OxYIwfXhJ0LhchMjNZUrmM0QxZMrMcMtvfKcPyeUDUAEiAJ9vSdcRHKrihByU4mZCAp1MLe0cKwN9459wD3PHq69FetWz2NlTujX1xBNxOW0rylsUr5UgzogB2LO5xbyi)
---
Fellow American,

**"While I am in Congress, no one will take Somalia's sea." - United States Congresswoman Ilhan Omar (MN-05)**
Yes, this is an actual quote from a Representative in the United States Congress. More importantly, this is an actual quote from my opponent, who I plan on sending back to Somalia on November 5th. She does not deserve to represent me or you any longer.

[**Help me buy her plane ticket with a donation to my campaign of any amount.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=49c63ab598214c21bfe308aec9b977eb&_e=NP_KxgJ7MPJyP1TO9ZXrMdocGAo3gtGMw_12xdrXsLjUfFFv0-oszpx0xUr_RzARDvmwBzeLFJJ598zQd1xxs8Tkxu-T33fbyhoyX4hWRBhselFBrZZ6I5mS8WqkejVVf7iZLhRFyoRVgC2c4px-7yfI8RPZaq5GE6WY-vleA6pp56MnsspOx-FjT9iu381rSKq22KXqXzHfxZT2K81iU2yz18Xjw8-o98myPOz2jDVimEEYJD_CJYqizHWzyUE93lLFBxvVvkX_7GdWNuohKGPHSmS_urUR959NPnMXvQzKK8p1WQyI7riAnNHO5s_IIlmnIO77yOdBBWNxaQOHCJL4Hw0fdLT2uL_c1-jEB-sGqFzkjlAc44KMJAFj9jMYCO8VshnPO_G-Rada9ZKir_0L8W2mcv_4b4Fzk_z9YmGpUaPP1yaTgh9BuBe5Kyc1)

Ilhan Omar has made it clear time and time again that her allegiance lies with Somalia, Hamas, and other American-hating groups. Meanwhile, she disgraces the halls of Congress in Washington, D.C., every day by aligning herself with the Squad and the most Radical factions of the Radical Left.

**I've had enough, and so have the people of Minnesota-05. It's time to expel her from Congress, and that starts with winning this election on November 5.**

But Ilhan Omar has the backing of the Squad and the Deep State Democrats' millions of dollars. The only way we can win is with a strong, nationwide grassroots Conservative effort.

**That's why I'm setting a goal to collect just 50 donations by midnight tonight. No donation is too small (or large) to make a difference in this race.**
[**I'm humbly asking you to send my campaign a donation to help me hit my midnight donor goal.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=49c63ab598214c21bfe308aec9b977eb&_e=NP_KxgJ7MPJyP1TO9ZXrMdocGAo3gtGMw_12xdrXsLjUfFFv0-oszpx0xUr_RzARDvmwBzeLFJJ598zQd1xxs8Tkxu-T33fbyhoyX4hWRBhselFBrZZ6I5mS8WqkejVVf7iZLhRFyoRVgC2c4px-7yfI8RPZaq5GE6WY-vleA6pp56MnsspOx-FjT9iu381rSKq22KXqXzHfxZT2K81iU2yz18Xjw8-o98myPOz2jDVimEEYJD_CJYqizHWzyUE93lLFBxvVvkX_7GdWNuohKCgDKprNrQQApHuiSvnaOKQXiwE-NWCQdTumY3qs13zZMd3fMHlwQGNfyuPcm88Ifk7zTqFCb0BN7vnkeo-4vyAW10nsCwBeTABbN2URam1k41A-27xp8fcBjIFzzsFM1A2SDfhxBMZm-qHF-ruhf2kVQGdDQhC4dSTYB69vKYJR)

If Ilhan Omar wants to protect Somalia's sea rather than America's border, I'd be more than happy to fund her plane ticket back to Somalia after I beat her in November. [**Chip in now to help me.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=49c63ab598214c21bfe308aec9b977eb&_e=NP_KxgJ7MPJyP1TO9ZXrMdocGAo3gtGMw_12xdrXsLjUfFFv0-oszpx0xUr_RzARDvmwBzeLFJJ598zQd1xxs8Tkxu-T33fbyhoyX4hWRBhselFBrZZ6I5mS8WqkejVVf7iZLhRFyoRVgC2c4px-7yfI8RPZaq5GE6WY-vleA6pp56MnsspOx-FjT9iu381rSKq22KXqXzHfxZT2K81iU2yz18Xjw8-o98myPOz2jDVimEEYJD_CJYqizHWzyUE93lLFBxvVvkX_7GdWNuohKKEGvdxPf5ommloWunoP-uvO4sOOOuwyp7wyBATMCr5chK-RgsUkTxwoKFHO873snIEdIA-CqvWZgUMCPeOUSCly0od0bUjPqA7_Hibs_nNLXzOSbPZmelsTSTbJzk5GBchZm3I7k0Yx6lFZwn43eQZPXfS0IXXhzIR-pAYEh0Vr)

God Bless America,

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=49c63ab598214c21bfe308aec9b977eb&_e=NP_KxgJ7MPJyP1TO9ZXrMdocGAo3gtGMw_12xdrXsLjUfFFv0-oszpx0xUr_RzARDvmwBzeLFJJ598zQd1xxs8Tkxu-T33fbyhoyX4hWRBhselFBrZZ6I5mS8WqkejVVf7iZLhRFyoRVgC2c4px-7yfI8RPZaq5GE6WY-vleA6pp56MnsspOx-FjT9iu381rSKq22KXqXzHfxZT2K81iU2yz18Xjw8-o98myPOz2jDVimEEYJD_CJYqizHWzyUE93lLFBxvVvkX_7GdWNuohKKN5EXXupu1xHJmtpIuASaK9o6iwUNLkbXALTkrwmTXyBhXPh_D3R-xr-4nKD4fizx3LNs0e1xn5kdLBrdmqh9LGUd7DhVZhjwJDNfjkuaewGRrDPhmFGAMUgN0TJNy-CE72PlTEXvJdgQwFOaURQNP3pHZYHp24k8KVVxOZrFpn)
Dalia Al-Aqidi
_Candidate for Minnesota's 5th Congressional District_

| Paid for by Dalia for Congress.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Hold up. Record scratch. Pause the tape.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Back when I was that kid sleeping on the floor of our apartment, I never would’ve guessed this is how things would turn out.
#

Hold up. *record scratch*
You might be wondering how this kid...
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july24.aPNp_S&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=1&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)
...ended up here, running for U.S. Senate, in one of the most competitive races in the entire country.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july24.aPNp_S&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=2&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)
Well, it started back in the apartment I shared with my mom and my sisters after our dad left. It was tough. I was sleeping on the floor because that’s all we could afford.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july24.aPNp_S&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=3&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)
I knew I had to do whatever it took to build a better life for us. I worked a bunch of jobs all through school to help make ends meet.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july24.aPNp_S&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=4&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)
Thanks to my family, my community, and a lot of hard work, I got into college. But before I graduated, I enlisted in the Marines to serve the country that gave me so much.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july24.aPNp_S&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=5&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)
I deployed to Al Anbar, Iraq with my brothers in arms. They called us “Lucky Lima”, but our luck turned eventually. We ended up the hardest hit Marine unit of the entire Iraq war, and I lost some of my best friends over there.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july24.aPNp_S&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=6&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)
You’re never the same person after something like that. And I knew I had to do something to improve things for the guys I served with, for people who grew up like me. So, I ended up running for Congress — and I won.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july24.aPNp_S&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=7&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)
Then, on January 6th, everything changed. It became clear to me that public service wasn’t just about improving the lives of the people in my community anymore — it was about defending our democracy, too.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july24.aPNp_S&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=8&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)
So now, I’m running for U.S. Senate. My opponent Kari Lake continues to spread the same lies and conspiracies that caused January 6th in the first place, and she’s one of the greatest threats to our democracy — after Trump himself.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july24.aPNp_S&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=9&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)
Back when I was that kid sleeping on the floor of our apartment, I never would’ve guessed this is how things would turn out.
When I was a Marine in Iraq, I never would’ve thought I’d have to fight to defend our democracy at home.
When I launched my first campaign, I never would’ve imagined that hundreds of thousands of people would back me up and donate to support me, either.
And I never, ever would’ve thought I’d need to ask supporters like you, people who have already done so much, to do a bit more. But to defeat Kari Lake and win in Arizona, that’s what I have to do.
I need you to do a bit more.
[**Please — if you can afford to make a donation of $5 or anything you can to my campaign, it would mean the world to me.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july24.aPNp_S&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=10&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1061?c0=ruben-em-july24.dmBsyr&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=29&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-july24.N43cN0&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=30&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-july24.taZL7R&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=31&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-july24.FLowKf&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=32&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-july24.3frsGk&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=33&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-july24.gqQ5v6&refcode=em240705-1-cooldown&t=34&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)**
---
****
Thank you. I couldn’t do this without you and the team we’ve built together.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=36&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=37&refcode2=2576_734936_xXDf58&akid=2576%2E734936%2ExXDf58)

body:
We’re working nonstop to spread the word about Project 2025 — Trump’s roadmap to reforming the presidency into a dictatorship. If we raise enough resources we will ensure every Veteran knows that the GOP is ready to tear the Constitution to shreds, and every American will know that Trump called fallen Americans “suckers” and “losers.”
#
Derek,
We know that after the American public learns more about Trump’s extremist, radical agenda, they reject him.
When they see more of who Trump truly is, they reject them.
And when they learn that the Republican Party thinks they are leading a “Second American Revolution” and that it will be “bloodless if the left allows it to be” they will reject them.
_(Yes, that’s a real quote from the President of the Heritage Foundation!)_
That is our mission over the next four months.
We’re working nonstop to spread the word about Project 2025 — Trump’s roadmap to reforming the presidency into a dictatorship. If we raise enough resources we’ll show every Veteran that the GOP is ready to tear the Constitution to shreds, and every American will know that Trump called fallen Americans “suckers” and “losers.”
The stakes are too high to fall short on our goals. Trump and the MAGA-right think they have the edge on us. It’s time to prove them wrong.
[**Make a donation of any amount to VoteVets today so that we can take the fight to Trump and the MAGA-right. We cannot falter. We cannot fail. Our democracy is on the line.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july24.xPqeRJ&refcode=em240705-1-30&t=1&akid=25835%2E3013755%2Eq_eS1l)**
