name: Riley Gaines
subject: Let’s protect women against the Biden Administration
body:
And I will not shut up
| Friend, I’m Riley Gaines. Maybe you’ve heard me talk about how other female swimmers and I were forced to compete against men -- and even share locker rooms with them.
Most people sat idly by and allowed this injustice to happen. That’s when I realized that nobody else was going to stand up for me, my teammates, and other women like us. I had to speak out. That’s why I launched the **Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute.** My team of Riley Gaines Center Ambassadors and I are building a movement of students, athletes, and concerned citizens who are fed up with the attack on our freedoms and rights. I’d love to have you join us to defy the dangerous gender ideology that’s spreading rampant throughout society today. [Together, you and I will fight against insanity like this: ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=f67d48fac5c546ad9103345fd8592646&_e=f2dVtM-1l8Y6jdNe9frS18xUjgFh5xibIJbqJU7TxBdDQDPPx9_60vV7Z6vuadNx57GE7YcP4UObS-ft3BQBXcATQ5CIlNMuSn8fWksuAex_HsrtlhYvygPZA3k2_hke5kg8D_VRQupZtICDopcdNQN1wZsl7EbDNX3Ug-RaHdFTHyWSiPS1Bmbgku-Y84XSRP0TV-kY5rK6Zb71dkNaWM0wTNjDoJKtFtUsAgqmVyoF78sl1XzG86QlZ28Akscanauqh-fs_LuINsiR0Izd1IcDtfAXJftKs6Pt8pAoEK_FGwCN_z6efl5mO64OMpBqenpIFMQmSbCMm5p-sqBfxa1ltViFsMDNJNrDsjIwqbzpv6kLvDXUl0YHd2iAQRFHcjIZ6ZbbRcgAblxccUxphe4mwag7lU9BVcCGLlN0895wb4TbeKuGhM4ETzuWxhOJHAkGevmb-GXsLA7ZTeU3VyN07_vkHJOJYTiKm0FP56uZH8p8liOZjuKUhC7bTHBQ0rHOtoCPLgehEtx5j8ALhw%3D%3D) [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=f67d48fac5c546ad9103345fd8592646&_e=f2dVtM-1l8Y6jdNe9frS18xUjgFh5xibIJbqJU7TxBdDQDPPx9_60vV7Z6vuadNx57GE7YcP4UObS-ft3BQBXcATQ5CIlNMuSn8fWksuAex_HsrtlhYvygPZA3k2_hke5kg8D_VRQupZtICDopcdNQN1wZsl7EbDNX3Ug-RaHdFTHyWSiPS1Bmbgku-Y84XSRP0TV-kY5rK6Zb71dkNaWM0wTNjDoJKtFtUsAgqmVyoF78sl1XzG86QlZ28Akscanauqh-fs_LuINsiR0Izd1IcDtfAXJftKs6Pt8pAoEK_FGwCN_z6efl5mO64OMpBqenpIFMQmSbCMm5p-sqBfxa1ltViFsMDNJNrDsjIwqbyo1Z_yxRgjOGQcwjnxBt2ABeUlP81-USFI2TcGXgPmESwOGyhWuFp2OI9bU6C_OKyH0VYQ2Q_vjDJxaZKKHrJSeSuHX6AbLZbfSARlUTkxEIQXdAaM801W_JMaugM8tI3e9aj4MdyPb5QXYdVFuu0eTJkR7nj7DwQp_CYTv9Yj3Q%3D%3D) Women already fought for equality. _Now, our achievements are being erased by men who declare themselves women._ Government is making matters worse. Look how the Biden Administration is altering Title IX rules, for instance. Title IX used to protect against discrimination on the basis of sex -- on the incontrovertible, biological fact that men are men and women are women and both are afforded equal access under the law to government-funded programs. But now, the Biden administration’s proposed Title IX changes will stop schools from enforcing women-only recognitions and spaces. They’ll rob women of opportunities, put them in physical danger, and silence them when they dare to dissent. %%first%%, I’ve gotten used to the left trying to shut me up. **But now they’re trying to erase all women**. I’m not backing down from this fight. I hope you won’t either. On behalf of America’s daughters, [ I hope you will stand with me by donating $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $25 right now!](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=f67d48fac5c546ad9103345fd8592646&_e=f2dVtM-1l8Y6jdNe9frS18xUjgFh5xibIJbqJU7TxBdDQDPPx9_60vV7Z6vuadNx57GE7YcP4UObS-ft3BQBXcATQ5CIlNMuSn8fWksuAex_HsrtlhYvygPZA3k2_hke5kg8D_VRQupZtICDopcdNQN1wZsl7EbDNX3Ug-RaHdFTHyWSiPS1Bmbgku-Y84XSRP0TV-kY5rK6Zb71dkNaWM0wTNjDoJKtFtUsAgqmVyoF78sl1XzG86QlZ28Akscanauqh-fs_LuINsiR0Izd1IcDtfAXJftKs6Pt8pAoEK_FGwCN_z6efl5mO64OMpBqenpIFMQmSbCMm5p-sqBfxa1ltViFsMDNJNrDsjIwqbxy63JB399e0RsbAbZ2BvjDalGc_sM9b-xeIBzNjB8eETBaQ34TJgfsjlhdDd-G2fuJhScSrU2BBFCuWQercDBU3YFzCj5d6dXnrOhj_OmBmeuEeuEvrGIh1SdB50BaJ0uCdFDttE6LUwpSd4ZfIMJ-Db3FTDaw56S-b9olAXbOrA%3D%3D) At this urgent moment, my Riley Gaines Center Ambassadors and I are working to protect the rights of women and girls against the Biden administration’s Title IX changes. We’re taking on the gender ideology radicals who aim to erase women’s place in this country. Patriotic Americans like you who care about women’s rights -- and the truth -- are rising up to stand with us. [ Please join us with your most generous gift today. ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=f67d48fac5c546ad9103345fd8592646&_e=f2dVtM-1l8Y6jdNe9frS18xUjgFh5xibIJbqJU7TxBdDQDPPx9_60vV7Z6vuadNx57GE7YcP4UObS-ft3BQBXcATQ5CIlNMuSn8fWksuAex_HsrtlhYvygPZA3k2_hke5kg8D_VRQupZtICDopcdNQN1wZsl7EbDNX3Ug-RaHdFTHyWSiPS1Bmbgku-Y84XSRP0TV-kY5rK6Zb71dkNaWM0wTNjDoJKtFtUsAgqmVyoF78sl1XzG86QlZ28Akscanauqh-fs_LuINsiR0Izd1IcDtfAXJftKs6Pt8pAoEK_FGwCN_z6efl5mO64OMpBqenpIFMQmSbCMm5p-sqBfxa1ltViFsMDNJNrDsjIwqbyifJNnFvMetPRlVrqbHJlPr9S7jmbbwOmCWD_fSqD6byiGuBJOUs2ioC4T8mIoGYTMYpNg6QTUskAlFWl-fWdFF05T5PuduihLpTKLuw7ZAbjWxYYUXNJvgAuEbxzQDI3S0m3tzx5dmrDfjYi-RWPKfVBAtzP0VBisdFEbdOYatQ%3D%3D) Together, you and I can stop the left’s attacks, and save women’s place in America’s future. Sincerely, Riley Gaines Director, The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute

clean_body: And I will not shut up | Friend, I’m Riley Gaines. Maybe you’ve heard me talk about how other female swimmers and I were forced to compete against men -- and even share locker rooms with them. Most people sat idly by and allowed this injustice to happen. That’s when I realized that nobody else was going to stand up for me, my teammates, and other women like us. I had to speak out. That’s why I launched the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute. My team of Riley Gaines Center Ambassadors and I are building a movement of students, athletes, and concerned citizens who are fed up with the attack on our freedoms and rights. I’d love to have you join us to defy the dangerous gender ideology that’s spreading rampant throughout society today. Women already fought for equality. Now, our achievements are being erased by men who declare themselves women. Government is making matters worse. Look how the Biden Administration is altering Title IX rules, for instance. Title IX used to protect against discrimination on the basis of sex -- on the incontrovertible, biological fact that men are men and women are women and both are afforded equal access under the law to government-funded programs. But now, the Biden administration’s proposed Title IX changes will stop schools from enforcing women-only recognitions and spaces. They’ll rob women of opportunities, put them in physical danger, and silence them when they dare to dissent. %%first%%, I’ve gotten used to the left trying to shut me up. But now they’re trying to erase all women. I’m not backing down from this fight. I hope you won’t either. On behalf of America’s daughters, At this urgent moment, my Riley Gaines Center Ambassadors and I are working to protect the rights of women and girls against the Biden administration’s Title IX changes. We’re taking on the gender ideology radicals who aim to erase women’s place in this country. Patriotic Americans like you who care about women’s rights -- and the truth -- are rising up to stand with us. Together, you and I can stop the left’s attacks, and save women’s place in America’s future. Sincerely, Riley Gaines Director, The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute | The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States, (703) 247-2000

| | Hi friend, it’s Jacky Rosen. The story below is a special one about my faith and how I first got involved in politics. **This one means a lot to me, so I hope you’ll take a moment to read it.** But if you don’t have the time to take a look right now, [**could you still chip in $5 to help me keep Nevada and the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88323853/483767777/199829904?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk4091-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzg2MzcyYS0wMjNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WL44INv8NKn7ZNKb2_VO3zF_AuxWD9_YF5lm1GeTwhI=)
---
Friend,

My career in public service began in 2016, when I was recruited to flip a competitive House seat blue. I was serving as the president of Nevada’s largest synagogue, and looking back now, that was incredibly fitting – **because my Jewish faith and values have always been at the very core of my work in Congress.**
In fact, my decision to run for public office was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam _–_ _to leave the world a better place than how we found it._
I’m so proud of the progress we've made in the years since. And in the face of growing antisemitism, attacks on reproductive freedom, and threats to tear down our democracy, I'm as committed as ever to making positive change happen. **But** **I****need _your_ help.**
**Right now,****polls are showing me locked in a dead heat with Trump-endorsed candidate Sam Brown – who set a major GOP fundraising record in the race that will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking:**
[**If you're with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities we love, will you chip in $5 or more today to help me defend my seat in Nevada and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88323854/483767778/199829904?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4091-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzg2MzcyYS0wMjNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WL44INv8NKn7ZNKb2_VO3zF_AuxWD9_YF5lm1GeTwhI=)

clean_body: | | | | | Hi friend, it’s Jacky Rosen. The story below is a special one about my faith and how I first got involved in politics. This one means a lot to me, so I hope you’ll take a moment to read it. But if you don’t have the time to take a look right now, = Friend, My career in public service began in 2016, when I was recruited to flip a competitive House seat blue. I was serving as the president of Nevada’s largest synagogue, and looking back now, that was incredibly fitting – because my Jewish faith and values have always been at the very core of my work in Congress. In fact, my decision to run for public office was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – to leave the world a better place than how we found it. I’m so proud of the progress we've made in the years since. And in the face of growing antisemitism, attacks on reproductive freedom, and threats to tear down our democracy, I'm as committed as ever to making positive change happen. But Ineed your help. Right now,polls are showing me locked in a dead heat with Trump-endorsed candidate Sam Brown – who set a major GOP fundraising record in the race that will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = It is a privilege to serve you and your loved ones. name: Dan Carr
subject: Living with Purpose
body:
Our Founding Fathers built with purpose not by accident!

| |
---|---|---
|
# Living with Purpose
### Our Founding Fathers built with purpose not by accident!
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Jul 5
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
Dear Friend,
I hope this message finds you well. Reflecting on Daniel 1:8, "But Daniel purposed in his heart that he would not defile himself with the portion of the king's meat, nor with the wine which he drank," reminds us of the importance of staying true to our principles and convictions. **We must STAND!!**
**" Our great nation stands today because our Founding Fathers built with a clear sense of purpose," **as _Thomas Jefferson_ famously stated. _Benjamin Franklin_ wisely remarked, **" The Constitution only gives people the right to pursue happiness. You have to catch it yourself."**
As we continue to strive towards a prosperous and just society, let us uphold these principles and carry forward their vision with determination.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b9013302-da61-48ed-83f9-b7735124aa48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

clean_body: Our Founding Fathers built with purpose not by accident! | | ---|---|--- | Living with Purpose Our Founding Fathers built with purpose not by accident! | | | | Jul 5 | Dear Friend, I hope this message finds you well. Reflecting on Daniel 1:8, "But Daniel purposed in his heart that he would not defile himself with the portion of the king's meat, nor with the wine which he drank," reminds us of the importance of staying true to our principles and convictions. We must STAND!! " Our great nation stands today because our Founding Fathers built with a clear sense of purpose," as Thomas Jefferson famously stated. Benjamin Franklin wisely remarked, " The Constitution only gives people the right to pursue happiness. You have to catch it yourself." As we continue to strive towards a prosperous and just society, let us uphold these principles and carry forward their vision with determination. ? Dan Carr (C) 2024 Dan Carr 18237 Hwy 53, Gulfport, MS 39503 ? ?

name: JD Vance
subject: I was born an Appalachian hillbilly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Now I’m a U.S. Senator standing in the breach for the left behind and forgotten folks who made this country great but were abandoned by the political class.
Now I stand in the breach for the left behind, the hillbillies, and the forgotten folks who made this country great but were abandoned by the political class.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=403e7d4932f94a34be44a09b541e9fc2&_e=jfjC83bmft-O6wgL2sx-2OcbUVjJURNx0mQKIfS2mjtkYuHbTo3kVjO9EQs1tgaqqrG_OaehQyeJBv2QRRSJOaC447PjOza81RBLE41ldpsu1IOn0ChlT04AZByUeofPxL9VoJfcfOWgapxl8aJzSn4HT1ziKV6_sJ0Jeqob16JfmzQP5kPuzagVzn8vIBQxAoGEG0CRqVo0j8Hl8U77V5k8sy6uDHJuomwKvJoMpIw8dR-V3dD0HDrR1BxcmNi2BfyhdLmvMpetVQiiTUw8iEblLDXFjjQtmOFEeUN8MWoH3zJlG8JCW-BFAPUciKsgSzsp-k26OkV1YT0nPosh73nM8SyT2VL3ktBQJmJif-vb10zaTmhViZHVVPrUMXHr "JD Vance")
---

I was born a hillbilly in the foothills of Appalachia.

I was raised by my Mamaw and Papaw.

**This is JD Vance - now I'm a U.S. Senator standing in the breach for the left behind and forgotten folks who made this country great but were abandoned by the political class.**

The same corrupt elites allowing...
- Liberal operatives to prosecute the leader of our Party
- Entitled brats to desecrate our monuments
- Activists to spew anti-American propaganda in our schools
- Chinese-made fentanyl to decimate families and kill our kids
- Illegal aliens to take the jobs of hardworking Americans
It's a disgrace but hear this: Blue collar, white collar, or no collar - I will always stand between you and the Democrat Machine as it plunges our country into ruin.

_But you and I both know the strength of our movement comes down to our numbers._ Millions of Americans elected President Trump, millions stepped up when he was convicted, and millions more will help save this country from the corrupt Liberal elites.

So here's my final pitch to you, Friend:

This will be the most expensive election in American history. By a lot. The Democrat Machine has always crushed us in fundraising. **We have the message. We have the candidates. We have the leader - and we can win it all. **

_But that takes everyone stepping up right now. Not tomorrow. Not in October. Right here and now._

_**[That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise a million dollars by the end of the month to get our message out to the people, register voters in key states, and turn them out to VOTE REPUBLICAN up and down the ballot.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=403e7d4932f94a34be44a09b541e9fc2&_e=jfjC83bmft-O6wgL2sx-2OcbUVjJURNx0mQKIfS2mjtkYuHbTo3kVjO9EQs1tgaqqrG_OaehQyeJBv2QRRSJOaC447PjOza81RBLE41ldpsu1IOn0ChlT04AZByUeofPxL9VoJfcfOWgapxl8aJzSn4HT1ziKV6_sJ0Jeqob16JfmzQP5kPuzagVzn8vIBQxAoGEG0CRqVo0j8Hl8U77V5k8sy6uDHJuomwKvJoMpIy5ZvbRyA6gE77UXHfv7T7cc-p8YSKofybwscgB6nuH3BKr8JgNx_yKhpzPYQ4gSjx1qiNG9GEVlhk7bCcxKSYQDcptHddqS7VcnCH3zSICGoP0OKcS0hZOy0m6qklEKvL7TKOw3qZ7yS1C5U69D714 "That's why I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise a million dollars by the end of the month to get our message out to the people, register voters in key states, and turn them out to VOTE REPUBLICAN up and down the ballot.")**_

Respectfully, could you spare a few bucks to help us out?
---
| | | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=403e7d4932f94a34be44a09b541e9fc2&_e=jfjC83bmft-O6wgL2sx-2OcbUVjJURNx0mQKIfS2mjtkYuHbTo3kVjO9EQs1tgaqqrG_OaehQyeJBv2QRRSJOaC447PjOza81RBLE41ldpsu1IOn0ChlT04AZByUeofPxL9VoJfcfOWgapxl8aJzSn4HT1ziKV6_sJ0Jeqob16JfmzQP5kPuzagVzn8vIBQxAoGEG0CRqVo0j8Hl8U77V5k8sy6uDHJuomwKvJoMpIxFhbA8hUMUP-dRdJecvC52aXfQD97GOsKGwlIdWa-UzKismFXexP7uNLvlSYydYF7Jkl63o4ICiww33c5sOrv7dBcNi6fsBakpGFvL8IsqCS6YOQYVc_Gwpf-xRh0IR10OmZY2daDwXLeaH13L-aC1 "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---
Time is of the essence so I'll wrap this up, but we really need your help. When we expand our Majority in the House, win back the Senate, and get President Trump back in the White House - I promise it'll all be worth it.

You can quote me on that.

Thanks and God bless you,
_- JD Vance_

---

I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share with me.

This is very important to me.

name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: Should anyone be above the law?
body:
The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=cb4b64b634c54d5ca3c7be98f6f3b040&_t=_k_Nxam6mPyFT0mYoR8VpGmOmU6nESzYT-XFe3GjfCTgIliud4WThlz0uGj_4puS3bnClpIRz6MvCqBCU4NFv-PptYj1qj2Kbx3OxOzPiITt-fZc2yRIT9S4EA0vbrbB)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=cb4b64b634c54d5ca3c7be98f6f3b040&_e=3V9698vtVfgOQeE2ec390Y611eMi4cvnAEU8MS8T8Q8TBMBhynCo5zVz_Z3wMPF0W3c1PtoEu8j7rqx8V5POoaBXcUlO_HahGnIyok4E4P9XxnI2HwILMXGGImbmen_1LW4-GPVFHFZf-k6EBGA0jAPZtnPd-qDST61Enbj9bVzbT3D34l_KB59FDpG7MLv7sZObOImE00UBzMbLwrXlXKLI7VMOgGtPZ39HfMHP9f0P4zEH8ZBmUocfSOWoUuQzwg92wM-d2Tv9rC2F_7gZN0fF2i4RQ3B1OAJ6tCzAqVb18F70qxoKoHhHBFEb-vvGO_FJXj8XOoc_P6Um0Jj3G514B7HX9y1W-WArZGJcLsrh3HWoMGGxLk05jIwCNCK5)
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=cb4b64b634c54d5ca3c7be98f6f3b040&_e=3V9698vtVfgOQeE2ec390Y611eMi4cvnAEU8MS8T8Q8TBMBhynCo5zVz_Z3wMPF0W3c1PtoEu8j7rqx8V5POoaBXcUlO_HahGnIyok4E4P9XxnI2HwILMXGGImbmen_1LW4-GPVFHFZf-k6EBGA0jAPZtnPd-qDST61Enbj9bVzbT3D34l_KB59FDpG7MLv7sZObOImE00UBzMbLwrXlXKa4-P9qsbMdL8WRCk-I20e5mFn7zkhAn8BhItRvBSXdv4rpD4KvgG5vQHWTlxA93da03lO_NYLkQU1wOu1nyCaUOiwpvFc8BIPcLazOjFFlQ3tuM7UKxaqwE78B5bS_RxTSNIGaz4H_aY6Cn1axh9SXQL7JXhcuuO4Zw9TtqyJGn4hi3uCYqYk7hw5mTjVJhw%3D%3D)

Dear Friend,

Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

The survey has only eight questions, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

**The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.**

Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents...

...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

At the same time, with the help of the media it...

* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
* Hides the corruption of the ruling class
* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption.

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=cb4b64b634c54d5ca3c7be98f6f3b040&_e=3V9698vtVfgOQeE2ec390Y611eMi4cvnAEU8MS8T8Q8TBMBhynCo5zVz_Z3wMPF0W3c1PtoEu8j7rqx8V5POoaBXcUlO_HahGnIyok4E4P9XxnI2HwILMXGGImbmen_1LW4-GPVFHFZf-k6EBGA0jAPZtnPd-qDST61Enbj9bVzbT3D34l_KB59FDpG7MLv7sZObOImE00UBzMbLwrXlXKa4-P9qsbMdL8WRCk-I20fg4CUyL-cK4k9Iebptro1aNI-Suf0h2sBfdydCUyTNmZXVDPnBcdbaJkdpYmKIS2vK8f2Sn-luK9oc7Rh3qxkEVP_SZWfTHh47KkvbylrVwxQf8ql81bgqPenRsO5rnkQpts-LLgWQgP53ZmvVNILmq_s2uo7hoOb_HS109-pzRw%3D%3D)**

The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.**

Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack.

**You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.**

A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.**

These efforts include:

* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It only has eight questions and will take a few minutes of your time.

Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

**This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link:

clean_body: The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey has only eight questions, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It only has eight questions and will take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 .

We need all hands on deck to fight back against right-wing dark money.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240705-4077-footer&t=1&akid=4077%2E420207%2EcDbaEL)
$25.
These days, you can’t get a whole lot for $25. But we’re proud to say that it’s the average donation to our campaign so far this year.
Our primary election is on August 6th. After spending tens of millions in Democratic congressional primaries last month, right-wing dark money super PACs are now turning their attention to other leading progressive voices — and that could very well include Pramila.
**We don’t have billionaire megadonors who spend on elections without any regard for our democracy. No. What we have is stronger. We have grassroots supporters with $25 in their pockets. And that means we can fight back — but it’s going to take all of us.**[**So**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240705.4ZP4RU&refcode=em20240705-4077&t=2&akid=4077%2E420207%2EcDbaEL)**[, Peter, will you donate $25 to our campaign today?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240705.4ZP4RU&refcode=em20240705-4077&t=3&akid=4077%2E420207%2EcDbaEL)**

clean_body: We need all hands on deck to fight back against right-wing dark money. $25. These days, you can’t get a whole lot for $25. But we’re proud to say that it’s the average donation to our campaign so far this year. Our primary election is on August 6th. After spending tens of millions in Democratic congressional primaries last month, right-wing dark money super PACs are now turning their attention to other leading progressive voices — and that could very well include Pramila. We don’t have billionaire megadonors who spend on elections without any regard for our democracy. No. What we have is stronger. We have grassroots supporters with $25 in their pockets. And that means we can fight back — but it’s going to take all of us. Thank you, Team Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Under President Trump, the world respected us. America needs his leadership back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
We need a Commander in Chief in the future who will not check his watch when welcoming those who have made the ultimate sacrifice.

| [](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=dc4722f394c94c3a84bc746b72f4151b&_e=T9_rH7ja7xa4Aa5DrcCm7D4d_Om8MuweSs8Rk2i44ShZOku_rS1UCk8qpssrE1KjNhHYldWkm5yc5_mMjQZRYa3v4Im7SbfyotxkQbQscNZUBY-wTYIR_hLVQ8PXJpBbFU0beIpiRdCw2g6V__TEAB9xb-bhXSlNfnBt90_uVwL6tTSheFqHmOEzKrIR9LXm39nI7ran1TwZ87o1Kl8-2jTxwwNAYAjyrGAFAlZ_YvO6vVDAsOfd3CxmBwXS0nP64Go23J1ISoQiJEddX03lBPVZ_CZPBGj5-caIHeXrGzMA7tbvGtL4ni3mVNKi0jcuwGIvYOuPgHrINsWSMAKHAw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

**We were a stronger country under President Trump.**

_When he was in charge, the world respected us._

Just look around. Have you ever seen the videos of President Trump when he visits a military base, or first responders, or law enforcement officers, or visits a fire station? He'll walk into a room carrying pizza, and _everyone cannot wait to see him, speak to him, and welcome him back._

| [**BRING BACK DJT**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=dc4722f394c94c3a84bc746b72f4151b&_e=T9_rH7ja7xa4Aa5DrcCm7D4d_Om8MuweSs8Rk2i44ShZOku_rS1UCk8qpssrE1KjNhHYldWkm5yc5_mMjQZRYa3v4Im7SbfyotxkQbQscNZUBY-wTYIR_hLVQ8PXJpBbgT4NGAwNMlyJIb270rP1yCwufXb8B7EZtZ54OqV5v-ueu56IPVNJo1W6XBQaoxxpQLtAA6_wWaW9ATJRY6QYwRbapSaVsMxqZgHepMFD-rhG3gavF4fIQNMlXX0BXwAs52ueZ_2WZjT2KumIkMsEPMiFggLcyAHSZc8_Jb0Cue0CqAUcxrheLK9GgmJv1rF_uAenaTVnUX7QQclLGy1AwA%3D%3D)
---
[**BRING BACK LEADERSHIP**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=dc4722f394c94c3a84bc746b72f4151b&_e=T9_rH7ja7xa4Aa5DrcCm7D4d_Om8MuweSs8Rk2i44ShZOku_rS1UCk8qpssrE1KjNhHYldWkm5yc5_mMjQZRYa3v4Im7SbfyotxkQbQscNZUBY-wTYIR_hLVQ8PXJpBbgT4NGAwNMlyJIb270rP1yCwufXb8B7EZtZ54OqV5v-t_P8_VlIiAWONSmYvXdw2nxO17xwz6x9GLr_9vxgWLsvC2OwbDHvAVyC3iKeoGCXd5lpHRxbpVWbhxQ59ZMSh9MFzU931anhKGiHUqODhOfoRXyA5jIyytv7zgNmMtO4jTrvEPxyIVJJZfpixaU5n5ypJ2-p5CqJj_7Gkjsiwd0A%3D%3D)
---
[**BRING BACK OUR RESPECT**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=dc4722f394c94c3a84bc746b72f4151b&_e=T9_rH7ja7xa4Aa5DrcCm7D4d_Om8MuweSs8Rk2i44ShZOku_rS1UCk8qpssrE1KjNhHYldWkm5yc5_mMjQZRYa3v4Im7SbfyotxkQbQscNZUBY-wTYIR_hLVQ8PXJpBbgT4NGAwNMlyJIb270rP1yCwufXb8B7EZtZ54OqV5v-saAZ2yIJL9XD_vdYRl2zzK41UToJBaFi-lpIoIET7huDG6uqnTDrAKFmvmcn5xfpi7Tze759He7oDLLdW4xFKzbAWlmChwXVzVfI-kgk-zeqMJAcMqvIefd22vOs1YzdVs_Y-w7RKEnwJqZGUxGrVUtTinYLr4BHHDF8Mn2XY02Q%3D%3D)
---

_**We want a military that is always ready to fight, but only when necessary. If you recall, during President Trump's four years in office, there were no new wars. We had the Abraham Accords. We had world peace.**_
We need a Commander in Chief in the future who will not check his watch when welcoming those who have made the ultimate sacrifice. _**We need a Commander in Chief who has compassion.**_ That's going to thank those Gold Star Families, and most importantly, those Gold Star families are going to have their promise from our Commander in Chief that the United States of America will take care of them and their future and will continue to recognize their service and sacrifice.

[**PUT DJT IN THE WHITE HOUSE**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=dc4722f394c94c3a84bc746b72f4151b&_e=T9_rH7ja7xa4Aa5DrcCm7D4d_Om8MuweSs8Rk2i44ShZOku_rS1UCk8qpssrE1KjNhHYldWkm5yc5_mMjQZRYa3v4Im7SbfyotxkQbQscNZUBY-wTYIR_hLVQ8PXJpBbgT4NGAwNMlyJIb270rP1yCwufXb8B7EZtZ54OqV5v-t_p1ZyTcR6-uW-wOiEsf45usNoNmmfRxF9Iwo3isa58PueR2ggHeHirFe98i1EfDXN9Tea9ibXLQVs-NAY5sc4uWZwDFQE1hK_tPDWH3Thw9qgQDeKbeoM7z2sVUpaNwUs_z7e-QyaY-mYJ4hiFiiFErFpEC5pCIPpsDcZAGssBQ%3D%3D)
---
[**BRING BACK WORLD PEACE**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=dc4722f394c94c3a84bc746b72f4151b&_e=T9_rH7ja7xa4Aa5DrcCm7D4d_Om8MuweSs8Rk2i44ShZOku_rS1UCk8qpssrE1KjNhHYldWkm5yc5_mMjQZRYa3v4Im7SbfyotxkQbQscNZUBY-wTYIR_hLVQ8PXJpBbgT4NGAwNMlyJIb270rP1yCwufXb8B7EZtZ54OqV5v-ssUuM5KcZtVGeuGAVTWV0VE7pyTYvF3PBFAxB8Cs4DymVI7FXKCDi_QVAiaSDy_R8MfEkpd02kmuRzafpeO00QV-EH6QwdScxSliYYRk2q4wra4OwS2ua4h5yWEAa1g1f8L3zeX-bAqe47wuMOW9Xx1fGRnzdza5rB_loZQbGtQw%3D%3D)
---
[**BRING BACK OUR RESPECT**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=dc4722f394c94c3a84bc746b72f4151b&_e=T9_rH7ja7xa4Aa5DrcCm7D4d_Om8MuweSs8Rk2i44ShZOku_rS1UCk8qpssrE1KjNhHYldWkm5yc5_mMjQZRYa3v4Im7SbfyotxkQbQscNZUBY-wTYIR_hLVQ8PXJpBbgT4NGAwNMlyJIb270rP1yCwufXb8B7EZtZ54OqV5v-t4o5MLAyEkgf35gF-TqOvFEiTK0Rumad1A85GBq6CSmD35r0_QHVvFeQLZULzWjCIGqtqFK1M2NhWCPJinaaXAahzqqt-rmqUEyjhziOQ6Oiz5ukgEjcaPL8TBwWGyXGdHco1x3wbKXJ-8YHnfLqoq1hf41-zKoMXQa9K52NSy0w%3D%3D)
---

It's time to put a true leader back in the White House. We have to make America strong again. I hope you'll join me in supporting a strong leader.

_Wesley Hunt_
[](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=dc4722f394c94c3a84bc746b72f4151b&_e=T9_rH7ja7xa4Aa5DrcCm7D4d_Om8MuweSs8Rk2i44ShZOku_rS1UCk8qpssrE1KjNhHYldWkm5yc5_mMjQZRYa3v4Im7SbfyotxkQbQscNZUBY-wTYIR_hLVQ8PXJpBbqDB3z1OeJbcuOxK577bRfWhImQkBiYn5UFx14ciIpb3qNPme7B7RoromFwLLbSEz-B4Y8rUEcx6oDxeDtZQ9KsxfsfaYqilz2JC5McNqjegIerdmYdP0LMG1_kRqkePchCK4CGkFzzIGh_U7ZLk6OJ2oz3ETNBhzF8C_czXto7K35n4UlvjoFmTXZiuXDMPp)

**_Changing Washington won 't be easy, but graduating from West Point and serving in the United States Army, being deployed to combat zones, and flying Apache helicopters over Iraq has prepared me for tough fights and big challenges.

I truly believe nothing is more worth fighting for than our great country and our way of life in the Houston area._**********

subject: You’re the only local Democrat missing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Don’t miss your chance to thank Hakeem Jeffries
| Hey, can we still reach you at this email?

**You’re the only local Democrat who hasn’t signed our card thanking Hakeem Jeffries for his heroic work defending our democracy.**

As one of our TOP supporters, we’re granting you a one-time extended deadline to sign before we send the card first thing tomorrow!

[**Incredible leaders like Jeffries need to know you’re in their corner, so please don’t delay: ADD YOUR NAME NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71379?t=6&akid=15459%2E878179%2E1KFiFA) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71379?t=7&akid=15459%2E878179%2E1KFiFA)
---
Thank you,

The Voter Protection Project
**–BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE–**
**Republicans “Terrified” That Jeffries’s Strong Leadership Will Cost Them the House Majority**
Rep. Hakeem Jeffries has been an INCREDIBLE leader for Democrats. _Now, he’s the KEY to taking back the House majority!_

**So we’re giving 500 top Democrats the opportunity to show Rep. Jeffries our appreciation for all his hard work!** [**and we need YOUR signature by midnight! SIGN NOW!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71379?t=8&akid=15459%2E878179%2E1KFiFA)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71379?t=9&akid=15459%2E878179%2E1KFiFA)
[**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71379?t=10&akid=15459%2E878179%2E1KFiFA)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

MAGA Republicans have done nothing but tear themselves apart since they seized control of Congress. **Even ousting their own Speaker!**

Thanks to you, we’re closer than EVER to flipping the House blue and ending the MAGA circus forever — _and the GOP knows it._

**So please know that Democrats all over the country have your back as we sprint towards the most critical election of our lifetime!**

[**Today I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation and to help Democrats flip the 4 seats we need to WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71379?t=11&akid=15459%2E878179%2E1KFiFA) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71379?t=12&akid=15459%2E878179%2E1KFiFA) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71379?t=13&akid=15459%2E878179%2E1KFiFA)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=15459%2E878179%2E1KFiFA). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=15459%2E878179%2E1KFiFA).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=15459%2E878179%2E1KFiFA) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=15459%2E878179%2E1KFiFA). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=15459%2E878179%2E1KFiFA)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=15459%2E878179%2E1KFiFA)

For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. |
#

Peter, [**With just four months to go until Election Day, will you pitch in $4 — $1 for every month left until November 5th — to help us re-elect Mazie, protect the Senate, and defeat Donald Trump?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88330688/483772621/-1699377675?amount=4&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240705_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWIzYWYzMi0wNzNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qXEmeqNxSeJ6FGLePOfjMrz68A-SPEUUC26PtbqSKig=) | [DONATE $4](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88330695/483772657/-1699377675?amount=4&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240705_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWIzYWYzMi0wNzNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qXEmeqNxSeJ6FGLePOfjMrz68A-SPEUUC26PtbqSKig=)

If you’ve been waiting for the right time to jump in and make a difference, **now is that time, Peter.**
It’s natural for folks to think that the best time to give is right before Election Day, when voters are already headed to the ballot box.
**But mainland billionaires, GOP super PACs, and Mitch McConnell’s allies are making spending decisions on a real-time basis.** When public fundraising reports are released in the coming weeks, they’ll pore through them to make their final ad reservations, determine where to send campaign operatives and decide which megadonors to call up next.
We know what a recipe for success look like. In 2020 and 2022, countless folks chipped in what they could and helped us mobilize voters in battleground states across the country — month after month, week after week, day after day — and the results spoke for themselves.
All we need to do is stay the course, have faith, and commit to the hard work now. Are you with us?

name: John Fetterman
subject: 9 questions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
President Joe Biden is going on the air TONIGHT...
#
Derek,
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240705?refcode=em20240705-9192&refcode2=9192_434096_ekRASk&akid=9192%2E434096%2EekRASk)
President Joe Biden is going on the air TONIGHT for an exclusive interview with George Stephanopoulos. Folks are going to be tuning in because the media has been calling it a “high-stakes” interview. 📺
Politico released this article saying that Biden should be asked about his mental decline and an alleged concerted effort to “insulate” the President by his own staff. Instead, I think George should be asking President Biden these nine questions:
1. Ever bang a porn star?
2. Ever bribe one?
3. Been impeached?
4. Consumed by revenge?
5. Vow to pardon Jan. 6th insurrectionists?
6. Pay a $25M fine for some shitty college?
7. Promise to be a dictator?
8. Ever destroy Roe?
9. Ever beat Trump?

In my mind, these nine questions should lead the discussion about who should be our next President. We deserve a President who has a greater moral compass than a dictator and convicted felon.
President Biden is a good President and a decent man, yet the media is hell bent on dragging his name through the mud. **I won’t stand for it.** ⛔
**[Ahead of tonight’s interview, will you show President Biden your support by sending his campaign a $5 donation right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240705?refcode=em20240705-9192&refcode2=9192_434096_ekRASk&akid=9192%2E434096%2EekRASk)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240705?amount=5&refcode=em20240705-9192&refcode2=9192_434096_ekRASk&akid=9192%2E434096%2EekRASk)**
It’s the best way to show President Biden that we’ve got his back. 💪
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240705-9192-footer&t=1&refcode2=9192_434096_ekRASk&akid=9192%2E434096%2EekRASk)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Michigan Rating Change: Now a TOSS UP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
My district is being called one of the most geographically important regions in the country.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88333703/483774662/-1419348363?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-07-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE1YWQ1Ny0wOTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfqv-olc--I1jLzenVjmyg4MEkReUgwxZSGnWAkQ7II=)
---
| ICYMI–The UVA's Center for Politics has recently changed its forecast for Michigan in the presidential race, moving it from a Dem-Leaning State to a complete Toss-Up. These ratings are based on predictions surrounding not only preference but turnout too. _That means that races like mine just got WAY more competitive._

_**The GOOD NEWS:**_ I'm running a grassroots campaign here on the ground that can help turn the tide for not only MY race but the Senate and the Presidency too. My district is being called one of the most geographically important regions in the country.

We know West Michigan will be at the heart of the election this November – in less than 125 days – for the Presidency, the U.S. Senate seat, control of the U.S. Congress, and so much more. I was out this weekend at parades across the district and what I saw was encouraging–people fired up about OUR race. I’m so proud of the leadership I’ve brought to this district, and I know I have what it takes to get people out and voting this November, but I need your help to reach them.

I know we just finished our quarter, **but we only have 83 days until ballots drop in Michigan** , and we have to be READY NOW. [_**We've set a $25,000 goal for this weekend to help us build up our grassroots efforts to reach EVERY voter. We don't want to look back on November 6 and realize we could have done more.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88333705/483774663/-1226733661?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-07-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE1YWQ1Ny0wOTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfqv-olc--I1jLzenVjmyg4MEkReUgwxZSGnWAkQ7II=)

clean_body: My district is being called one of the most geographically important regions in the country. | = | ICYMI–The UVA's Center for Politics has recently changed its forecast for Michigan in the presidential race, moving it from a Dem-Leaning State to a complete Toss-Up. These ratings are based on predictions surrounding not only preference but turnout too. That means that races like mine just got WAY more competitive. The GOOD NEWS: I'm running a grassroots campaign here on the ground that can help turn the tide for not only MY race but the Senate and the Presidency too. My district is being called one of the most geographically important regions in the country. We know West Michigan will be at the heart of the election this November – in less than 125 days – for the Presidency, the U.S. Senate seat, control of the U.S. Congress, and so much more. I was out this weekend at parades across the district and what I saw was encouraging–people fired up about OUR race. I’m so proud of the leadership I’ve brought to this district, and I know I have what it takes to get people out and voting this November, but I need your help to reach them. I know we just finished our quarter, but we only have 83 days until ballots drop in Michigan , and we have to be READY NOW. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . This election isn’t just about policy differences between my opponent and me -- though, there are many. This election is about the character of the person who sits in the Oval Office. Their honesty. _Their decency._Their integrity__. Do they respect other people or do they incite violence and hate? Can they honor their oath to the Constitution and uphold their oath of office? **Trump fails every one of those character tests.** He brags about being the one who “got rid of” _Roe v. Wade_. He is calling for the “termination” of the Constitution and pledges to rule as a dictator on “Day One.” He invokes the language of Nazi Germany at his rallies, calls his political opponents "vermin,” and talks about the blood of America being poisoned. And what’s worse is that the Supreme Court has just ruled that there are virtually no limits on the power of the President. According to the extreme majority on the Supreme Court, a President _is now above the law_. If Trump wins again, he will be even more unhinged and dangerous because he knows the courts won’t hold him back. **That’s why all of us -- every single one of us -- has to work tirelessly to do what the Court would not do:_Hold Trump accountable_. ** [Will you pitch in $25 -- or whatever you can afford today -- to help Kamala and me defeat Donald Trump once and for all? clean_body: I just wrapped up our campaign rally in Wisconsin -- and let me tell you, Peter, I’m more fired up than ever before. | | | I just wrapped up our campaign rally in Wisconsin -- and let me tell you, Peter, I’m more fired up than ever before. I'm in this race to the end. I would not be running again if I didn’t believe with all my heart and soul that I can do this job. Because, quite frankly, the stakes are too high. This election isn’t just about policy differences between my opponent and me -- though, there are many. This election is about the character of the person who sits in the Oval Office. Their honesty. Their decency.Their integrity. Do they respect other people or do they incite violence and hate? Can they honor their oath to the Constitution and uphold their oath of office? Trump fails every one of those character tests. He brags about being the one who “got rid of” Roe v. Wade. He is calling for the “termination” of the Constitution and pledges to rule as a dictator on “Day One.” He invokes the language of Nazi Germany at his rallies, calls his political opponents "vermin,” and talks about the blood of America being poisoned. And what’s worse is that the Supreme Court has just ruled that there are virtually no limits on the power of the President. According to the extreme majority on the Supreme Court, a President is now above the law. If Trump wins again, he will be even more unhinged and dangerous because he knows the courts won’t hold him back. That’s why all of us -- every single one of us -- has to work tirelessly to do what the Court would not do:Hold Trump accountable. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I’ve said it before, and I will say it again: I have never been more optimistic about America’s future. That is in no small part because of the work this team is doing. Thank you for your support, Joe Joe Biden President of the United States

Peter, November might be a few months away, but election season is already in full swing.

So much is on the line this year, from abortion access to better wages and working conditions to our fundamental right to vote. Future progress on all of these issues depends on protecting our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority – and if we wait until the fall to take action, it’ll already be too late.

[That’s why I’m asking you to support my friend and colleague Sherrod Brown today. Here’s why I’m so worried about this race: Experts are calling Sherrod one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, and national Republicans smell blood. They’re already spending millions to flip this seat and the Senate red, and Mitch McConnell’s super PACs just made their largest ad investment EVER to try to take down Sherrod.

Now, polls show this race is neck and neck, so Sherrod’s counting on US – you and me, friend – to help him pull ahead. Unlike his wealthy self-funding opponent, Sherrod can’t write his campaign million-dollar checks. That’s why I set a personal goal to raise $75,000 for Sherrod’s campaign by midnight tonight, and I need you to help me get there.

[If we lose this race, we lose the Senate, plain and simple. With that in mind, will you rush $15 or more to help Sherrod win in Ohio and defend our Senate majority?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88334718/483776070/-193742861?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240705_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1NGRiNmRlLTA5M2ItZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pUfA5T0ng8C5CB903JDG5qn9qzVa8dW7kn3AKoZiMv4=)

Thank you.

– Chuck Schumer

Peter,

In 123 days, just 4 months, Election Day will be here.

In 4 months, Rhode Island will help decide control of the House of Representatives. Everything is on the line this year from access to reproductive healthcare, to common-sense gun reform, to the environment. The stakes are high — we need to keep Rhode Island **blue.**

[Election Day will be here before you know it. body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Hi there — it’s Team Crow. Happy July!
If you’re anything like us, you’ve gotten a lot of fundraising emails in the last few days. You deserve a break.
Below is a thank you note and a link to complete our new July Priorities Survey [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-07-julysurvey] — but first (and more importantly), here’s a photo of our top spokes-paw-rson, Zuma Crow, after a hard day’s work. Thanks for everything! 🐶
https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-07-julysurvey [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-07-julysurvey]
TAKE THE SURVEY [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-07-julysurvey]

Hello —

Earlier this week, Jason and our team closed the books on our FEC quarterly deadline. It came right on the heels of Colorado’s primary election.

We knew that Coloradans were ready to defeat extremism and re-elect Jason, but we could have never predicted the energy.

Since the primary election, hundreds of grassroots supporters have chipped in, signed up for volunteer shifts, and shared Jason’s unifying message across Colorado.

Grassroots supporters like you helped Jason knock our ambitious fundraising goal out of the park — giving us even more opportunities to reach voters across Colorado’s 64 counties and win this election.

Thank you. Sincerely.

Now, it’s on to the next phase of the campaign: Coloradans will start receiving their general election ballots in less than 100 days. We have a shrinking window of time to reach undecided voters in the most competitive of races and defend our democracy.

We’re reviewing our campaign plans for these final four months of the election — and as a top supporter, we want you at the heart of that work.

Will you complete our official July Strategy Survey today? Jason wants to hear directly from you: [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-07-julysurvey]

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-07-julysurvey]

Thank you for your support and responses! Let’s go win this election.

— Team Crow

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-july-2024]
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
*Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Do you have a few minutes?

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88336522/483777758/1328794144?refcode=ea.0bfd40f8-0a3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.0bfd40f8-0a3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiZmQ0MGY4LTBhM2ItZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=STPkZWBGMb9H-coUtFDzxgcn8t1PFrY0hEr_GsyTLDk=&emci=e0e21f77-5c39-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=0bfd40f8-0a3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105)
---
I believe wholeheartedly in the transformative power of grassroots activism. Not only does it lift our spirits — it can also drive real, lasting change. That’s why I’ve spent my life on the front lines of protest movements, finding myself in "good trouble" more times in Washington than I can count. It’s why I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. But my activism is _nothing_ alone. When our voices join together, our power grows. Every voice, including _yours,_ plays a crucial role in achieving our goals — and it needs to be heard. That’s why today, I’m not asking for money. Instead, I’m asking you to volunteer. We’re building our volunteer teams to help elect climate champions this November, and there is a place for everyone. **[Please take a moment to fill out this form to let us know a little more about what motivates you, and how you may be interested in helping.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88336524/483777759/-1836971803?refcode=ea.0bfd40f8-0a3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.0bfd40f8-0a3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiZmQ0MGY4LTBhM2ItZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=STPkZWBGMb9H-coUtFDzxgcn8t1PFrY0hEr_GsyTLDk=&emci=e0e21f77-5c39-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=0bfd40f8-0a3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105)** | [**VOLUNTEER**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88336525/483777760/-1836971803?refcode=ea.0bfd40f8-0a3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.0bfd40f8-0a3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiZmQ0MGY4LTBhM2ItZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=STPkZWBGMb9H-coUtFDzxgcn8t1PFrY0hEr_GsyTLDk=&emci=e0e21f77-5c39-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=0bfd40f8-0a3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105)
---
We’re up against some serious opposition. Big Oil is throwing millions to keep their oily politicians in power, flip state legislatures, and hinder meaningful climate legislation at every turn. But together, we can fight back and win.
We’ve done it before, and we will do it again.
So, what are your top climate priorities? Extreme heat? Environmental justice? Pollution control? A just transition to a green economy? I want to know. And more importantly, I want to know if you’re ready to get involved through our volunteer program!
Whether it’s volunteering, organizing, or spreading the word, every action makes a difference.
**[Please take a few minutes to complete our survey. clean_body: Do you have a few minutes? | I believe wholeheartedly in the transformative power of grassroots activism. Not only does it lift our spirits — it can also drive real, lasting change. That’s why I’ve spent my life on the front lines of protest movements, finding myself in "good trouble" more times in Washington than I can count. It’s why I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. But my activism is nothing alone. When our voices join together, our power grows. Every voice, including yours, plays a crucial role in achieving our goals — and it needs to be heard. That’s why today, I’m not asking for money. Instead, I’m asking you to volunteer. We’re building our volunteer teams to help elect climate champions this November, and there is a place for everyone. | We’re up against some serious opposition. Big Oil is throwing millions to keep their oily politicians in power, flip state legislatures, and hinder meaningful climate legislation at every turn. But together, we can fight back and win. We’ve done it before, and we will do it again. So, what are your top climate priorities? Extreme heat? Environmental justice? Pollution control? A just transition to a green economy? I want to know. And more importantly, I want to know if you’re ready to get involved through our volunteer program! Whether it’s volunteering, organizing, or spreading the word, every action makes a difference. With gratitude and hope, Jane Fonda | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Why is the price of oil so high? Collusion.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Everyone knows gas prices are high — but do you know why they’ve stayed
this high for so long, Peter?
Collusion.

When Pioneer Natural Resources, the largest oil company in Texas, tried to
merge with ExxonMobil, the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) discovered
evidence that Pioneer was illegally colluding with OPEC, the oil cartel
that includes Iran, Iraq, and Saudi Arabia, to keep prices high.

US oil producers are explicitly prohibited by federal law from price
fixing and from taking actions that restrict competition.

But Pioneer CEO and GOP mega-donor Scott Sheffield was caught red-handed
coordinating production strategies in private messages to Oil Ministers in
the Middle East, to keep prices artificially high.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140458?t=1001&akid=35622%2E1203867%2EINX9KD ]The FTC has now referred this case to the U.S. Department of Justice
(DOJ). Add your name to build public pressure and demand the DOJ
investigate and prosecute American oil executives who are illegally
colluding to keep gas prices high.

Add Your Name

People across the country who are struggling to make ends meet are
continuing to spend thousands of dollars more per year on gas prices at
the pump, as well as higher prices for other goods and services due to
these artificially high oil prices.

The corporate greed and collusion causing this must be put to an end ASAP.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140458?t=1002&akid=35622%2E1203867%2EINX9KD ]Sign on to the petition if you agree →

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240705-35622-footer&t=1003&refcode2=35622_1203867_INX9KD&akid=35622%2E1203867%2EINX9KD

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=35622%2E1203867%2EINX9KD

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

$1. That’s not a typo,
Peter — [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/28090?t=1009&amount=1&akid=1975%2E52803%2ENL0kd5 ]I’m truly only asking
you to chip in $1 today, and here’s why:

With our election just around the corner, we need to boost our fundraising
numbers so that when everyone gets a look at our campaign, they see what I
see:

A strong, far-reaching grassroots movement made up of thousands of
supporters.

So while our total raised is obviously incredibly important — the number
of donations we receive is also a big indicator of our team’s grassroots

name: Team McBride
subject: What’s on your mind? Sarah wants to know!
body:
Sarah has always made listening to her constituents and supporters a top priority.
#
Sarah has always made listening to her constituents and supporters a top priority, whether that means talking in-person at one of the _many_ events she attends in Delaware or getting your feedback online.
And now that we’re well into the summer and the campaign is really heating up, we want to hear your priorities on the issues facing Delaware and the entire nation.
**[We’ve designed a short survey that will only take a couple of minutes so that we can get your thoughts. Can you take a minute or two to let us know what’s on your mind?](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/team-mcbride-q3-issues-survey?source=em20240705-1&akid=761%2E21716%2Eo4tzrM)**
**[Take The Survey »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/team-mcbride-q3-issues-survey?source=em20240705-1&akid=761%2E21716%2Eo4tzrM)**
From the cost of living to healthcare access to abortion rights and so much more, the next Congress will have a lot of work to do on a lot of different fronts.
In the State Senate, Sarah has worked hard to pass legislation improving people’s lives, and she’s committed to keeping it up in Washington.
But in order to most effectively advocate and fight for the issues you care about, Sarah needs to hear what you’d like for her to focus on!
[**So please take just a couple minutes to fill out our Third Quarter Issues Survey today. You are the driving force behind our movement, so we want your input!**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/team-mcbride-q3-issues-survey?source=em20240705-1&akid=761%2E21716%2Eo4tzrM)
Thanks,
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20240705-1&t=1&refcode2=761_21716_o4tzrM&akid=761%2E21716%2Eo4tzrM)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=761%2E21716%2Eo4tzrM)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=761%2E21716%2Eo4tzrM)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=761%2E21716%2Eo4tzrM)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: re: Wisconsin’s Senate Seat.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2953%2E35263%2Exv-A7Q)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul24.e1aXEk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240705_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2953%2E35263%2Exv-A7Q) Hi Peter, it’s Gretchen Whitmer. Republicans only need to flip ONE Senate seat to reclaim the majority — and all eyes will be on Tammy Baldwin’s critical race in Wisconsin. Tammy has fought like hell to lower costs for middle-class Americans and defend reproductive rights. We can’t afford to lose her leadership in the Senate, but Senate Republicans are going all out to flip her seat red. Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate, Eric Hovde, and his dark money allies have already spent more than _$19 million_ to flood Wisconsin’s airwaves with ads attacking Tammy — and they’re not slowing down anytime soon. **The bad news is, their strategy seems to be working, with recent polls showing Tammy Baldwin and her far-right opponent _statistically tied._** If Republicans are successful in flipping Tammy’s seat and taking back the Senate majority, they won’t hesitate to enact their harmful agenda — including a national abortion ban. The stakes could not be higher, Peter. With control of both the Senate and the White House running right through Wisconsin this November, reelecting Tammy Baldwin is crucial to protecting reproductive rights — and our democracy. But it’s going to take all of us to help her win this fight. **[We cannot let far-right extremists buy their way into the U.S. Senate. So if you can, please chip in to Tammy Baldwin’s reelection campaign today to defend the Senate majority.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul24.e1aXEk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240705_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2953%2E35263%2Exv-A7Q)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-jul24.owp_q2&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240705_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2953%2E35263%2Exv-A7Q)

name: Letitia James
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88338684/483782413/-1997846893?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&refcode=jtk1504-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODk0OGYyNC0xMDNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bNwIrJVDlyd7y2oKylp6bn6Tkj9cltrLyszSseGP3E=)
---
$5.

I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my _entire_ fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. [**That's why I'm going to ask you to donate $5 before my July 11th public filing deadline**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88338685/483782414/-2022193277?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=5&refcode=jtk1504-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODk0OGYyNC0xMDNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bNwIrJVDlyd7y2oKylp6bn6Tkj9cltrLyszSseGP3E=) – but first, I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important.
Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless.

**But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work.**
And throughout my time in office, I have been able to secure _real_ wins for everyday, working families. From holding Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic to going toe to toe with far-right attorneys general around the nation, I have made it clear that New York is _not_ up for sale.
As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. Thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – but as we continue on into 2024, I must keep that momentum going.
**[That's why I'm asking you to invest just $5 for my July 11th public filing deadline to help me continue my fight for progress. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88338686/483782415/-2022193277?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=5&refcode=jtk1504-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODk0OGYyNC0xMDNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bNwIrJVDlyd7y2oKylp6bn6Tkj9cltrLyszSseGP3E=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88338687/483782416/-2022193277?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=5&refcode=jtk1504-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODk0OGYyNC0xMDNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bNwIrJVDlyd7y2oKylp6bn6Tkj9cltrLyszSseGP3E=)
---
Thank you for all of your support.

Letitia
With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families?

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Take a look at these numbers

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=6961%2E5257348%2Ewa3D3R ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, today
is officially the halfway point between California’s all-parties jungle
primary election on March 5 and Election Day on November 5.

President Biden is trailing Donald Trump in several key battleground
states, and election experts are predicting a close fight for control of
the Senate.

And I’ll be blunt with you — we need to dial up our effort, and quickly,
if we are to have any hope of defending the Senate, defeating Trump, and
racking up the wins down-ballot that it will take to flip the House
majority and get anything done in 2025.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=july2024_abs_em.MnctZF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240705_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=6961%2E5257348%2Ewa3D3R ]We need to amp up our efforts today,
Derek — will you be one of the
865 donors I need to help us reach our grassroots fundraising goal before
midnight?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=july2024_abs_em.XD-pOq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240705_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1005&akid=6961%2E5257348%2Ewa3D3R ]EXPRESS DONATE

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2024_abs_em.oAIbuh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240705_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=6961%2E5257348%2Ewa3D3R ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

In a matter of days, all fundraising reports since the FEC deadline will
be made public.

The Senate GOP campaign arm just announced $100,000,000 in a fall
advertising blitz.

If we don’t build the resources right now, we could fall even further
behind the GOP.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=july2024_abs_em.MnctZF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240705_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=6961%2E5257348%2Ewa3D3R ]Chip in any amount before midnight to help my team build the momentum
we need to win. We cannot let Trump’s MAGA cult of personality back into
power. We just can’t.

Thanks for whatever you’re able to contribute. It means a lot — truly.

**** Two years ago, the Republican Supreme Court stripped Americans of the constitutional right to access abortion and threatened our access to birth control. Now the Alabama Supreme Court has ruled that embryos are “extrauterine children,” which has paused treatments in the state and imperiled the ability of families who struggle to conceive children plan a family nationwide .
**To add to the outrage, Republicans in the Senate just torpedoed a Democratic bill that would have codified access to in vitro fertilization (IVF) treatment!**

In vitro fertilization (IVF) treatment is a crucial form of assisted reproductive technology that has helped countless couples struggling with infertility to start families of their own.
Republicans in Congress and on the Supreme Court are actively working to oppress people who can become pregnant and people who need in vitro fertilization in order to have a family.
**By blocking funding for IVF programs and imposing unnecessary regulations, these senators are directly harming families who are already facing immense emotional and financial strain.**

clean_body: | | | ** ** Two years ago, the Republican Supreme Court stripped Americans of the constitutional right to access abortion and threatened our access to birth control. Now the Alabama Supreme Court has ruled that embryos are “extrauterine children,” which has paused treatments in the state and imperiled the ability of families who struggle to conceive children plan a family nationwide . To add to the outrage, Republicans in the Senate just torpedoed a Democratic bill that would have codified access to in vitro fertilization (IVF) treatment! | In vitro fertilization (IVF) treatment is a crucial form of assisted reproductive technology that has helped countless couples struggling with infertility to start families of their own. Republicans in Congress and on the Supreme Court are actively working to oppress people who can become pregnant and people who need in vitro fertilization in order to have a family. By blocking funding for IVF programs and imposing unnecessary regulations, these senators are directly harming families who are already facing immense emotional and financial strain. ** Every person deserves the opportunity to build the family they desire, and it is essential that we stand together to protect this important medical treatment. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future.
