Peter,

We hope you had a wonderful Fourth of July filled with joy, cherished moments with loved ones, and the beauty of fireworks lighting up the night sky. Here at Team Bohannan, we had a blast participating in parades and connecting with communities by celebrating across southeastern Iowa!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88339608/483784111/175592731?refcode=em24_240705_july4r_engg_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240705_july4r_engg_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=f144daa9-123b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTQ0ZGFhOS0xMjNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D8ccS4UQZ9GWebM-IUYqaPsO1h-HIlPamRpR2JLvAss=)
As we reflect on the spirit of unity that Independence Day brings, we are reminded of the values that bind us together as Americans – freedom, equality, and opportunity for all.

Together, we are working towards a future where these principles are upheld across our nation and where the voice of every Iowan is heard. Thank you for being part of this journey.

– Team Bohannan

Together, we are working towards a future where these principles are upheld across our nation and where the voice of every Iowan is heard. name: Working Families Party
subject: AOC’s articles of impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is taking a stand against the corrupt, far-right Supreme Court majority. Following the court’s unconstitutional decision to give presidents absolute immunity for official acts last week and their major corruption scandals this term, Rep. Ocasio-Cortez tweeted last week that she intends to file articles of impeachment after Congress returns for recess next week: [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfuVZ47p1ygnIyNkacL2yBBcV74aXHUc8lmOpgSylA7g_X4mr5efFs2we_um40mab0oXe_NQPO3pE-vm19-Y0nqfxJOWg_aL8YaGt5oAzlNSad9RlZtOBUY16hSQAd1bRTYDQ0sw3mSgq4sg4BO7K750G9DJMxlfEV-eauJyydywr28m3NcI3ZeWjpvrM6fryHe38tngVYT0NYPF0BgqTN7Flkd8uIwRAmQV_XrNa18WdpZ6ZYUfej7g4sfI0jfcRayCi5R0pLtxXR6Vl-jTEQVyw/47s/6VrJk26tT8WEvHzJMffNIA/h0/h001.Apej-l7R7MHhEWy23hp105SlW7CP4vN75QyV5QLq8Hs) **[Add your name to tell AOC you have her back and to urge other members of Congress to sign on to articles of impeachment against the corrupt justices on this court.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfuVZ47p1ygnIyNkacL2yBBcV74aXHUc8lmOpgSylA7g_X4mr5efFs2we_um40mab0oXe_NQPO3pE-vm19-Y0nqfxJOWg_aL8YaGt5oAzlNSaf03lGV73G91NHEVm2TIf63UT6TFNnJBgGiB7J9dab_vYiFoJN0xwTh3oASNfEtOaBoEmFLiLWnzj51bXPQuwHe6P1fRaJIWdbMzHubxbfPxrXzjigCuKra399PmlrnvEjJWdUWDOn72olU0mFF6Lsse7PPNY2O5DsFD7lR0ucYMw/47s/6VrJk26tT8WEvHzJMffNIA/h1/h001.YiUHLl8sBqacRvYz2XItN2f1-L34F3eL_Y-VlR_Vwc4)** **[Sign the petition](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfuVZ47p1ygnIyNkacL2yBBcV74aXHUc8lmOpgSylA7g_X4mr5efFs2we_um40mab0oXe_NQPO3pE-vm19-Y0nqfxJOWg_aL8YaGt5oAzlNSaelJ2XSliTW5RfPYEDCfFMi2Ig4lNiqTgxzfvmf-tdeltv0gUigFD_XrXsfFI7r9E9m-OH28-pn1W_Q6Kbg8A25nOQUn7Q09hSV4t3nbW3V8NhXL5zVw4_3HQeTBLTt-Hi5DbYEoH_XSafAEiboTtib7GXprSKgV6eqPmEngiMKTw/47s/6VrJk26tT8WEvHzJMffNIA/h2/h001.jNi3a0qQBOjOWnfkYRwB-dbAmrXdRYJM1j4x_TCEVzE)** With no accountability to anyone, and no regard for the actual text of the Constitution itself, the Roberts majority on the Supreme Court has become a club where right-wing billionaires and Republican ideologues can buy whatever policies they want, no matter the harm to the American people. Justice Clarence Thomas alone has received (and illegally failed to disclose) millions of dollars’ worth of luxury gifts, real estate, private school tuition, and more from conservative billionaires since 2004, while his wife is a proud MAGA activist who supported the January 6 insurrection. Justice Samuel Alito has flown insurrectionist flags outside of his homes while going on a free luxury vacation with a billionaire whose business Alito later ruled in favor of in court. And the far-right majority has changed the definition of bribery to only refer to gifts given before a decision, and made it harder to prosecute people who tried to overturn the U.S. government. **Our democracy is in real danger if we do not take a bold stand now to expand the Court, demand real ethics guidelines, and do all we can to hold the corrupt right-wing justices on the Court fully accountable.** **[That’s why we’re asking you to add your name and tell your representative to support AOC’s work to impeach corrupt justices. Click here to sign on.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfuVZ47p1ygnIyNkacL2yBBcV74aXHUc8lmOpgSylA7g_X4mr5efFs2we_um40mab0oXe_NQPO3pE-vm19-Y0nqfxJOWg_aL8YaGt5oAzlNSaezl_aBh8uGsY4xXRxmkMKNt1k-OudoBogA9vhdJrolnPWV4ugoWo23xR2idb5HzFM2zbUPiAGMWxHYp8p7GjXIuSLUY8KNO0dQltiywLZp6vQ8FVK7my5tM93Z3FLvzLc0FqyC59EjpJtNt2SG56QlD2AZCqOCzZYWeevnDSqttg/47s/6VrJk26tT8WEvHzJMffNIA/h3/h001.W-pmrH1f3H2cUTS4R7w0AeIdi3oHbZxCVaTcEboXJDg)** clean_body: | | | Peter, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is taking a stand against the corrupt, far-right Supreme Court majority. Following the court’s unconstitutional decision to give presidents absolute immunity for official acts last week and their major corruption scandals this term, Rep. Ocasio-Cortez tweeted last week that she intends to file articles of impeachment after Congress returns for recess next week: With no accountability to anyone, and no regard for the actual text of the Constitution itself, the Roberts majority on the Supreme Court has become a club where right-wing billionaires and Republican ideologues can buy whatever policies they want, no matter the harm to the American people. Justice Clarence Thomas alone has received (and illegally failed to disclose) millions of dollars’ worth of luxury gifts, real estate, private school tuition, and more from conservative billionaires since 2004, while his wife is a proud MAGA activist who supported the January 6 insurrection. Justice Samuel Alito has flown insurrectionist flags outside of his homes while going on a free luxury vacation with a billionaire whose business Alito later ruled in favor of in court. And the far-right majority has changed the definition of bribery to only refer to gifts given before a decision, and made it harder to prosecute people who tried to overturn the U.S. government. Our democracy is in real danger if we do not take a bold stand now to expand the Court, demand real ethics guidelines, and do all we can to hold the corrupt right-wing justices on the Court fully accountable. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: FWD: It’s official. I’ve been disbarred
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
New York communists have taken away my law license.
| [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=14335008.5799.1.4fccfb9aa3cf2ed14ca889b24965869a)
---
Friend,
---
I want you to hear this __directly__ from me. My law license has been **TAKEN AWAY** by the same New York Democrats who are trying to SENTENCE President Trump to prison this fall.
---
**_I did absolutely _nothing_ wrong._**
---
_The vengeful Democrats simply want to destroy me for serving as President Trump’s lawyer and for refusing to drop to my knees and surrender to the Deep State tyrants who are killing America._
---
This tragic news comes as we celebrate America’s 248th birthday and pay homage to our Founding Fathers who were willing to lay down their lives to choose liberty over tyranny. _They would’ve rather died on their feet than lived on their knees._
---
_248 years later, our nation is now once again teetering on the brink of tyranny._
---
**But please make no mistake: I am _not_ writing this letter to you with a sense of defeat or surrender.**
---
If I didn’t surrender when the FBI came knocking on my door in a dawn raid, then you better believe I’m not giving up now! Our Founding Fathers didn’t surrender to tyranny. _Neither can we_.
---
When I was unjustly arrested in Atlanta alongside President Trump, Crooked Joe’s accomplices filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757**.
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=14335008.5800.1.7aef2498cc240edb6136d88fe6256758)
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my legal defense trust to continue the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me fight for my freedom and justice as Biden’s Deep State tries to JAIL me for the rest of my life.**](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=14335008.5801.1.9c9a76ef5358177185d8c6aebadf1215)

name: Jill Stein
subject: There’s a reckoning coming for Boeing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Corporate greed, political corruption, and now a prosecution.

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=boeing_prosecution&n=1)
---
Peter – Five years ago, in the wake of the second catastrophic air disaster in less than six months, the Boeing 737 Max was grounded worldwide.

It wasn’t the U.S. Federal Aviation Administration – the global standard bearer for aviation safety – that ordered the newest Boeing plane to ground.

In fact, the FAA initially _refused_ to ground the plane, stating there was “no reason” to justify that order after 346 people died in nearly identical crashes.

Our federal regulators only buckled under pressure after more than 60 countries + the European Union grounded the plane.

A massive investigation followed, and Boeing agreed to pay a $2.5 billion settlement in exchange for not pleading guilty to any charges related to the deadly crashes.

It’s worth noting that the settlement, hailed at the time as a “historic victory” for transportation safety, comes to only 2% of their profits from the last decade plus.

It’s also worth noting that paying that puny fine did nothing to dissuade Boeing from continuing to cut corners on passenger safety.

**_Fast forward to today: the number of serious safety incidents with Boeing is accelerating.

_** In January, a door plug blew off of a Boeing plane moments into the flight.

In March, a WHEEL fell off a Boeing plane during take-off.

A few weeks ago, another Boeing 737 skimmed _just 500 feet_ over an Oklahoma suburb when the plane malfunctioned on approach to the runway.

These are just a fraction of the known Boeing incidents _this year_.

The evidence against Boeing for unfettered corporate malfeasance is so overwhelming that the company is now facing criminal prosecution.

**There is indeed a reckoning coming for the world’s largest aerospace company, but that reckoning must also include the unconscionable lapses in regulatory oversight brought on by corporate capture in our government**.

Last year Boeing spent nearly $15 million lobbying elected officials, and as many as 72% of those lobbyists formally held government positions.

Lawmakers in Congress with direct oversight responsibilities are effectively on Boeing’s payroll, accepting tens if not hundreds of thousands of dollars in campaign cash to unwind regulations.

The problem is so obvious and egregious that one Congressional investigation determined FAA regulations had become “limp and malleable” while “Boeing — not the FAA — was comfortably piloting its own regulatory fate.”

This is the perfect illustration of how corporate capture of our government regulatory bodies harms the public.

**[The FAA answers to the President, and you deserve a president who will put public safety ahead of corporate profits every time. Ours is the only pro-worker, pro-humanity, pro-peace and pro-planet campaign that will be on the ballot across the country this November. Can I count on your support to get our movement in front of every voter?](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=boeing_prosecution&n=2)**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=boeing_prosecution&n=3 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=boeing_prosecution&n=3)
---
This is so much bigger than one company or even one industry.

With the recent Supreme Court decision radically dismantling the administrative state, even those regulations that remain are now at risk of being wiped out. The impact on public safety is catastrophic as the guardrails are now FULLY dismantled.

_This ends with us.

_**I’ve never taken a dime from corporate PACs or lobbyists, and I never will.

****We will fight for publicly financed elections so that their blood money can never be used to buy the silence or complicity of public servants.

** We will restore transparency and trust in our government institutions, and we will ALWAYS put people over profits.

In solidarity and gratitude,

Jill
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=boeing_prosecution&n=4 "Support Jill Today!") [Support Jill Today!](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=boeing_prosecution&n=4)

Lawmakers in Congress with direct oversight responsibilities are effectively on Boeing’s payroll, accepting tens if not hundreds of thousands of dollars in campaign cash to unwind regulations. The problem is so obvious and egregious that one Congressional investigation determined FAA regulations had become “limp and malleable” while “Boeing — not the FAA — was comfortably piloting its own regulatory fate.” This is the perfect illustration of how corporate capture of our government regulatory bodies harms the public. | "DONATE" This is so much bigger than one company or even one industry. With the recent Supreme Court decision radically dismantling the administrative state, even those regulations that remain are now at risk of being wiped out. The impact on public safety is catastrophic as the guardrails are now FULLY dismantled. This ends with us. I’ve never taken a dime from corporate PACs or lobbyists, and I never will. We will fight for publicly financed elections so that their blood money can never be used to buy the silence or complicity of public servants. We will restore transparency and trust in our government institutions, and we will ALWAYS put people over profits. In solidarity and gratitude, Jill | "Support Jill Today!" Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024 ©2024 Jill Stein for President 2024, all rights reserved Jill Stein for President, www.jillstein2024.com P.O. Box 4359, Fall River, MA 02723-0415

name: D. Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Fed up

body:
Rick Scott can't be serious
| | |
---
Friend, it's Debbie, and I wanted to make sure you saw my opponent's latest stunt.
Rick Scott voted against a bill that would protect access to IVF. And now he is running an ad promising to do the exact opposite. He is trying to deceive Florida voters!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88340089/483785369/849749119?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1481-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY0M2M1NTgtMTQzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0QrWqMIcNu9FxBF7DezIx7zM6IRysoBnNIph91BLmhA=)
Look, Floridians know that actions speak louder than Rick Scott's empty promises and bold-faced lies.
Not only has he voted against protecting IVF access, he's voted against protecting access to contraception, he's voted for a nationwide abortion ban, and voiced his support for the dangerous abortion ban that took effect in Florida last month.
Honestly, friend, I'm fed up, and I know that Floridians are, too. We're fed up with the lies, the flip-flopping, and Rick Scott's arrogant assumption that we can't see right through his contradictions. _Enough is enough. _

body:
Republicans have made it abundantly clear that they will FEDERALLY BAN abortion if given the chance–and we should believe them.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88340245/483785781/919917606?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2024-07-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTE1ZmY5ZC0xNDNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bQUfriNktfDO7ICrpecWQ17CEdH7NBDw3M9W_qXjhYU=)
---
| Peter,

Across the country, reproductive rights are being challenged daily. You may think we have nothing to worry about here in California regarding reproductive freedoms, _but that is the furthest from the truth._
---
**Republicans have made it abundantly clear that they will FEDERALLY BAN abortion if given the chance–and we should believe them.**
Bodily autonomy should not be up for debate, our rights should not be interfered with, and legislators should stay out of private matters between doctors and patients.

The only way to ensure that extremist Republicans won’t federally ban abortion is to kick them out of Congress. We are only a few seats away from securing a Democratic majority in the House, and as the BOLD PAC chair, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, I am working tirelessly to elect progressive and pro-choice Latinos to Congress.

[_**I am doing everything I can to protect reproductive rights, but I cannot do it alone. The right to contraception is at risk.

Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/KuMB1syMs0W9O3v5MuCvqQ2?unsubscribedata=W8z6agjEVEn8Y4X33BFwYTs7zpdid4g4k4%2FpJ6%2F3E%2F15LQjAKgzNbwaMNJ9CjxlKzmZuXx1ZVobams3GW4xEQ0ecgj%2BN2g7NWrRy8SHI4iwXP7bqXNELdh3xqJoZ8dKy6qOqTEv4RbHLQPBdCa7q2U9CiQXkYLa9v0jkNQLAJQU6irG6NXV0MZ6fry3Nw00ReW9yklF6GAWilu4W5dwH9v9EvAUFNDbaj%2BfSiBEqjNWxGeFuU5u4cqDASwsXOEq2JnqEJvF6mzpGCwLGgaWWXLKINJVo3bPwZJjhwDuPNxTic1RAN8Itv75StPg4iRf9t%2FFpsHzCBgTwaA8jo%2F7nmPrEhxUpRjB%2FovOeibeUy15DxNVsQWU4xRUDR9R1tkIjqX7NMjzXGq%2Bt%2B%2FnrH4cfDpVmX5gZp49b6AOa1a6uXhZGixgZubvIpM%2FNrpJ6jrZr)

Hey Peter, **They’ve already come after abortion, and now they’re coming after contraception.** Last month, Senate Republicans blocked legislation that would protect our right to contraception. And you can bet Gianforte intends to bring this same attack right here to Montana. The bottom line is there is absolutely no circumstance where legislation can regulate when a woman has a child. Deciding whether or not you are ready and willing to start a family is dependent upon a multitude of factors. And the most important one is: do you want a family? If you know you do not want a family, or you are unprepared to have one just yet, whatever the reason that you decide not to pursue a pregnancy — **that is birth control, Peter.** **You don’t need a legislator, or a governor, telling you what to do. It’s NONE of their business.** [I’m so grateful Ryan and Raph are in this fight for us. We cannot let this agenda take hold, Peter. So, let’s get LOUD and Get Our Montana Back. Add your name to our petition today to show Gianforte that it’s 2024 and he has _no right_ to take _our rights away:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88340712/483786993/-1064462458?source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_070724_1_1_Abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmIyOWY5YmQtMTUzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cx1AYqTqHS3Z0mWLsH-0RbXEZjfDhr1PCsQEse-AJt0=&emci=44c022e6-f03a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=bb29f9bd-153b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=17465008) | | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88340717/483787000/-1064462458?source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_070724_1_1_Abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmIyOWY5YmQtMTUzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cx1AYqTqHS3Z0mWLsH-0RbXEZjfDhr1PCsQEse-AJt0=&emci=44c022e6-f03a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=bb29f9bd-153b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=17465008)

As a woman and proud mother, I’m grateful knowing Ryan and Raph are championing a brighter, safer future for my children. If my boys choose to be parents, their rights to not be parents before they’re ready to be must also be protected. **_That’s birth control._**
**Gianforte has made no secret about his intentions when it comes to dismantling our rights. First abortion, now contraception, what’s next?**
[We can’t let Gianforte and his extremist buddies in DC violate our freedom and privacy by taking this essential right away. Ryan and Raph are fighting for us, for our rights, and for our future. Sign on NOW to show Gianforte that we will not go back to the 1950s. Our kids are depending on us.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88340721/483787004/-1064462458?source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_070724_1_1_Abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmIyOWY5YmQtMTUzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cx1AYqTqHS3Z0mWLsH-0RbXEZjfDhr1PCsQEse-AJt0=&emci=44c022e6-f03a-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=bb29f9bd-153b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=17465008)

Victoria Spartz was charged with a weapons violation at Dulles International Airport in Washington DC when an unloaded handgun was discovered by security personnel in the pocket of her carry-on. This is the second time in 30 days Spartz has been in the news for her poor judgment and behavior, having been accused in early June for verbally abusing her staff members. The alleged incidents caused the House Ethics Committee to open an investigation regarding her conduct. Hoosiers deserve a leader who represents them with kindness and dignity — not one who has been deemed the worst boss in the US House, [according to a report](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88340880/483787335/845995015?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmU0NTdlZi0xNTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d68MwAirLCemb8YqMnQt8mAJ2rMNIBzREUOUqCWoE60=&emci=fc2633c3-0d3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=dfe457ef-153b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4925535) published by the nonpartisan organization Legistorm. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Mitch Gore’s [Green Alert system](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88340883/483787338/-2027758505?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmU0NTdlZi0xNTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d68MwAirLCemb8YqMnQt8mAJ2rMNIBzREUOUqCWoE60=&emci=fc2633c3-0d3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=dfe457ef-153b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4925535) was among them. Similar to the Silver Alert for senior citizens and the Amber Alert for Children, the Green Alert will sound when an at-risk veteran goes missing. its invention was designed to reduce the number of veteran suicides in the state.

“Indiana’s veteran suicide rate is almost 5% higher than the national average according to the [2022 National Veteran Suicide Prevention Annual Report](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88340884/483787339/-406275580?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmU0NTdlZi0xNTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d68MwAirLCemb8YqMnQt8mAJ2rMNIBzREUOUqCWoE60=&emci=fc2633c3-0d3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=dfe457ef-153b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4925535),” Gore said in a [press release.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88340885/483787367/-1365734854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmU0NTdlZi0xNTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d68MwAirLCemb8YqMnQt8mAJ2rMNIBzREUOUqCWoE60=&emci=fc2633c3-0d3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=dfe457ef-153b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4925535) “We know that veterans struggling with PTSD are more likely to be experiencing a mental health crisis if they go missing. Adding this alert system specifically for at-risk veterans adds a sense of urgency and allows law enforcement and the public to go into the situation fully informed.”

clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Indiana State Democratic Convention Just One Week Away = One week from today, over 2,000 Indiana Democratic state delegates will nominate candidates to serve as the next lieutenant governor and attorney general. We will elect our delegates to serve at the DNC in Chicago in August, and more. We can’t wait to see Hoosier Democrats from all 92 counties as we come together to finalize our ticket and celebrate our great candidates! For more information regarding the convention including the schedule, US Rep. Victoria Spartz (R) Charged With Weapons Violation Rep. Victoria Spartz was charged with a weapons violation at Dulles International Airport in Washington DC when an unloaded handgun was discovered by security personnel in the pocket of her carry-on. This is the second time in 30 days Spartz has been in the news for her poor judgment and behavior, having been accused in early June for verbally abusing her staff members. The alleged incidents caused the House Ethics Committee to open an investigation regarding her conduct. Hoosiers deserve a leader who represents them with kindness and dignity — not one who has been deemed the worst boss in the US House, published by the nonpartisan organization Legistorm. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. On Monday, July 1, 172 new laws went into effect in Indiana, and State Rep. Mitch Gore’s was among them. Similar to the Silver Alert for senior citizens and the Amber Alert for Children, the Green Alert will sound when an at-risk veteran goes missing. its invention was designed to reduce the number of veteran suicides in the state. “Indiana’s veteran suicide rate is almost 5% higher than the national average according to the ,” Gore said in a “We know that veterans struggling with PTSD are more likely to be experiencing a mental health crisis if they go missing. Adding this alert system specifically for at-risk veterans adds a sense of urgency and allows law enforcement and the public to go into the situation fully informed.” Join Jennifer McCormick at an Upcoming Event Jennifer will be holding a meet and greet that is open to the public on Saturday, July 10 from 4-5:30 pm in Zionsville. To stay up to date with all her events, view her for more information. Get Involved! Opportunities to Volunteer Near You! The 2024 campaign season is getting started, and campaigns around the state are needing help! Find an event near you and get involved to help Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee Thursday, July 11, from 8-9 pm ET for a free virtual live training entitled Civics for Change - Know the system to change the system , designed to help you publicize your campaign in the most effective way possible. Save the Dates! = Hoosier Hospitality Dinner 2024: July 12 at the Indiana Roof Ballroom = Indiana State Democratic Convention: July 13 at the Indiana Convention Center. IDEA French Lick: August 1-4 Democratic National Convention Chicago: August 19-22 INDems IN the News Indiana Capital Chronicle: Indiana Capital Chronicle: Indiana Capital Chronicle: INHouseDems: WFYI: WFYI: WTHR: IndyStar: Wane15: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. By supporting our work, you are supporting state Democrats who will fight to BLOCK the GOP’s dangerous agenda and PROTECT your fundamental freedoms. But we rely on grassroots donations from Democrats like you to put our strategy into action. [Chip in to take back power in the states](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_StjzIP_JksgF6_3fhf2m-JQm8dVR9E9wJehdasR5Ip3-HzEwD8hIRjCpK2I9InyBr1JYEMGJOEGIAss1ccrbZIkhv2Cmk3IxvT7gQdSa8D-dzmcdHIXXpf0CpexBZkpb2q2AydhW78gY4WeMNQBnKjv7489APXtbIF1zm8mDPsgB7iVVyWNvgOUaIq-q0n6nfr3BdDNO9uVixeeJoboGrLodlXIC42VkqBsFTwZhBvszGJNOMG3wNhNiqW-5NK-xqwvDyP3xC59EsN7eQQUdR1jzfIal-QCza-YV37o08qqpWcWd0Oj9n8l8Oif1KHsD5G92veqv9SiTLsfq8sMGW4QrGs8tV8lD5PrrUFx0sWUu2t5zcotuUGhptjGv-K13Lf45g8xfG8Hgu8kbF0NZl6Eg8JOKLiSXsRzcID_FcZlGBUR0UIcHmQ_zrYnN13I-UsArB6H9d8qmszxcGPtIvyPCRJeJvmvOWHQ7KLSgVfmlJM4k5EEG-Pkyl5SSVCvC4CTau12-4P04DxltjyhG-Ag-QVDq6ESoiLW5eFyp5IM/47s/VJawA2leQF2xiaHBA7psSA/h2/h001.xUuyJBcsERGP8nAxmPBrHr17G_4eURKuZlBK0lBWJb8) ➡️**State Dems are facing legislative elections in 44 states this fall.** These races are critical opportunities to build Democratic power in the states – your investment today could be the difference between victory and defeat. The fight for our future is happening in the states, and it’s happening now. | | | | | ---|--- We’re reaching out to ask you to . But first, here’s why your donation right now is so important: ➡️State legislatures are the building blocks of our democracy. State legislators pass the policies that have the most impact on our day-to-day lives, from abortion access to voting rights to public education. By supporting our work, you are supporting state Democrats who will fight to BLOCK the GOP’s dangerous agenda and PROTECT your fundamental freedoms. ➡️The DLCC is the only party organization dedicated to electing Democrats to statehouses nationwide. We’re working around the clock to build power in our key target states by expanding our majorities, flipping key chambers, and chipping away at GOP supermajorities. But we rely on grassroots donations from Democrats like you to put our strategy into action. ➡️State Dems are facing legislative elections in 44 states this fall. These races are critical opportunities to build Democratic power in the states – your investment today could be the difference between victory and defeat. With right-wing extremists working to outlaw reproductive freedom, attack the LGBTQ+ community, and sabotage ballot access, our democracy is on the line. name: Hilary Franz
subject: The freedom of gliding across the ice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88341616/483788686/957724876?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-07-05_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RkOGVlNjgtMTczYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wu5kT4mYsOLvK_B8dyfagnE_uyyx3O1_Q-KHHR6OXlw=)

| I just released my first ad of the election, and I wanted you to be one of the first to watch. Take a look ➡️
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88341617/483788687/957724876?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-07-05_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RkOGVlNjgtMTczYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wu5kT4mYsOLvK_B8dyfagnE_uyyx3O1_Q-KHHR6OXlw=)
It's so easy to take freedom for granted. I felt that freedom, gliding across the ice as a young skater. And now, I can see that freedom slipping away right before our eyes.

I couldn't have imagined being where we are now: an America where MAGA extremists are pushing a national abortion ban, denying climate change, and so much more.

Over the last seven years, I've worked to create groundbreaking solutions for our state. _**Now, I'm fighting MAGA extremists with fellow pro-choice leaders and climate champions.**_

In the race for Washington's 6th Congressional District, I'm up against an anti-abortion Republican. Together, I know we can win.

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3477%2E552475%2EwU_l-_)
Peter, here’s the news:
**FIRST:** A super PAC backing our mega-millionaire opponent David McCormick announced a $30 million ad buy to blanket Pennsylvania’s airwaves.
**THEN:** Donald Trump himself came to PA to rally his MAGA base in support of his and McCormick’s effort to flip PA red – and with it, the Senate and the White House.
**NOW:** It’s all hands on deck here at Team Casey HQ as we do everything we can to fight back against the $75 million in dark money headed our way. That’s why we’re coming to you, our strongest supporters, and asking again:
[**Will you pitch in any amount — even just $5 — to help power our campaign to keep PA blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240705-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240705-3&refcode2=3477_552475_wU_l-_&akid=3477%2E552475%2EwU_l-_)

clean_body: We want to hear from you. - Peter, It’s finally summer – but instead of logging off and vacationing, there are a million worrying things on everyone’s mind right now. We want to support more candidates who are fighting on the issues that are the MOST important to you. - - Which issues are top of mind for you at the moment? Gun violence prevention Reproductive rights Affordable housing Consumer protection Criminal justice reform Public safety LGBTQ+ rights Racial justice Climate change/environment Immigration Foreign policy Workers’ rights Paid family and medical leave Universal child care SCOTUS Reform 2024 Election Affordable & accessible health care Voting rights Other - Your answers will help us advocate more fiercely for the things that matter most and elect more young, progressive leaders who will put these issues front and center. Thanks, Leaders We Deserve -

subject: Will we see you tomorrow?

body:
| | | Peter, will we see you **TOMORROW** at The Essence Festival in New Orleans?

Read the details below and then RSVP to let us know you can make it.

We really hope to see you there!
— Quentin & Stefanie

body:
Hey Peter, it’s Jon Tester. The general election has officially begun in Montana, and one thing is already clear: **My opponent and I couldn’t be more different.**
* Tim Sheehy grew up in a multi-million dollar lake house in the big city suburbs. I’m a third-generation dirt farmer, born and raised in Montana.
* Tim Sheehy supports a national abortion ban. I'm fighting to protect personal freedoms.
* Tim Sheehy will be a mouthpiece for Mitch McConnell’s agenda. I always take my cues from Montanans.

[_**This race will be decided by a mere handful of votes, so every action we take could be the difference between victory and defeat. Tim Sheehy grew up in a multi-million dollar lake house in the big city suburbs. I’m a third-generation dirt farmer, born and raised in Montana. Tim Sheehy supports a national abortion ban. I'm fighting to protect personal freedoms. Tim Sheehy will be a mouthpiece for Mitch McConnell’s agenda. I always take my cues from Montanans. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Whether he’s playing cowboy or pretending he grew up surrounded by farmland, Tim Sheehy is shamelessly lying when it’s clear he doesn’t understand a lick about what makes rural America so special. Dear Peter,
The battle against corrupt political interests is getting nasty.
The DNC smear attack machine is back with a nasty hit piece against Robert F. Kennedy Jr. in _Vanity Fair_. This article, filled with distortions and misleading information, is yet another tactic by the DNC political machine to undermine our campaign.
One of the most egregious claims in the article is a baseless reference to a rumor that RFK Jr. once ate a dog. This ridiculous and unfounded accusation is an apparent attempt to distract from his policies and achievements.
The article’s timing and tone are no coincidence.
A week after wrongfully being kept off the presidential debate stage, the DNC political machine is trying to destroy RFK Jr.! They will stop at nothing to smear his character and divert attention from the real issues at hand.
After President Biden's miserable debate performance, Democrats know they are in trouble with many calling for him to step down.
Whether Biden is replaced as the Democrat candidate or not, the DNC machine knows this will be a razor-thin election. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is poised to make history and win the White House!
[The last thing the DNC wants is a Kennedy on a ballot who is leading among the 51% of Americans who consider themselves independent!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hit_piece_7_5_24_nd1&n=3)

name: Joe Biden
subject: Are you in? I know I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
I just wrapped up our campaign rally in Wisconsin -- and let me tell you, folks, I’m more fired up than ever before.
---
I just wrapped up our campaign rally in Wisconsin -- and let me tell you, Derek, I’m more fired up than ever before. **I'm in this race to the end. I would not be running again if I didn’t believe with all my heart and soul that I can do this job. Because, quite frankly, the stakes are too high.** [**If you’re with me, I’m humbly asking you to split a few bucks between our campaign and the DNC to help Kamala and me defeat Donald Trump in November and elect Democrats across the country.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-bfp-split-july-2024?refcode=em_20240705_jb_actives1_kfm_na_fr_rap-&refcode2=298_22930333_mt8h7A&akid=298%2E22930333%2Emt8h7A) This election isn’t just about policy differences between my opponent and me -- though, there are many. This election is about the character of the person who sits in the Oval Office. Their honesty. _Their decency. Their integrity._ Do they respect other people or do they incite violence and hate? Can they honor their oath to the Constitution and uphold their oath of office? **Trump fails every one of those character tests.** He brags about being the one who “got rid of” _Roe v. Wade._ He is calling for the “termination” of the Constitution and pledges to rule as a dictator on “Day One.” He invokes the language of Nazi Germany at his rallies, calls his political opponents "vermin,” and talks about the blood of America being poisoned. And what’s worse is that the Supreme Court has just ruled that there are virtually no limits on the power of the President. According to the extreme majority on the Supreme Court, a President is now above the law. If Trump wins again, he will be even more unhinged and dangerous because he knows the courts won’t hold him back. **That’s why all of us -- every single one of us -- have to work tirelessly to do what the Court would not do: Hold Trump accountable. ** [**Will you split $10 -- or whatever you can afford today -- between our campaign and the DNC to help Kamala and me defeat Donald Trump and elect Democrats nationwide? We must hold Donald Trump accountable. No one else can.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-bfp-split-july-2024?refcode=em_20240705_jb_actives1_kfm_na_fr_rap-&refcode2=298_22930333_mt8h7A&akid=298%2E22930333%2Emt8h7A) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Biden-Harris campaign and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-bfp-split-july-2024?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20240705_jb_actives1_kfm_na_fr_rap-&refcode2=298_22930333_mt8h7A&akid=298%2E22930333%2Emt8h7A)**
---

I’ve said it before, and I will say it again: I have never been more optimistic about America’s future. That is in no small part because of the work this team is doing.
Thank you for your support,
Joe
Joe Biden
President of the United States

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: What's the reason? -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi team, it's Chuck Schumer.

I'm sorry to be blunt, but I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important: **Why haven't you donated?**

**[Your donation could be the one that ensures we defend our majority, so will you pitch in $5 or more to defeat Republicans and keep the Senate blue? I've unlocked a Triple-Impact Match, so it'll become $15 if you chip in before midnight>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/18708?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240705-ChuckSchumer-SchumerDidntDonate-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240705-ChuckSchumer-SchumerDidntDonate-Pros-sl1&akid=15739%2E9716520%2EDXzB17)**

Maybe you think the consequences aren't that dire -- but CNN has already said **"November could decide Senate control for years."**

Maybe you trust we already have the resources it takes to compete with the GOP's treasure trove -- but **their self-funding candidates are _already_ pumping _MILLIONS_ into their own campaigns.**

Maybe you think you'll have more chances to make a difference -- but **we're running out of time to make the critical investments that make or break campaigns, so we MUST raise that money here and now.**

If we drop the ball, we could be _powerless_ to stop the GOP's destructive agenda -- including abortion bans and cuts to Social Security and Medicare -- for _years_. **We need a historic grassroots response IMMEDIATELY.**

**Your donation has _never_ been more important than it is right now.** To prove it to you, I just unlocked a Triple-Impact Match to make your donation go THREE times as far for today _only_. So please, now that you know the stakes:

**[Will you pitch in $5 (becomes $15) before midnight to defeat the GOP and secure a Democratic majority for years to come?](https://go.dscc.org/go/18708?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240705-ChuckSchumer-SchumerDidntDonate-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240705-ChuckSchumer-SchumerDidntDonate-Pros-sl1&akid=15739%2E9716520%2EDXzB17)**

clean_body: | | | Hi team, it's Chuck Schumer. I'm sorry to be blunt, but I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important: Why haven't you donated? Maybe you think the consequences aren't that dire -- but CNN has already said "November could decide Senate control for years." Maybe you trust we already have the resources it takes to compete with the GOP's treasure trove -- but their self-funding candidates are already pumping MILLIONS into their own campaigns. Maybe you think you'll have more chances to make a difference -- but we're running out of time to make the critical investments that make or break campaigns, so we MUST raise that money here and now. If we drop the ball, we could be powerless to stop the GOP's destructive agenda -- including abortion bans and cuts to Social Security and Medicare -- for years. We need a historic grassroots response IMMEDIATELY. Your donation has never been more important than it is right now. To prove it to you, I just unlocked a Triple-Impact Match to make your donation go THREE times as far for today only. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Record scratch. Freeze Frame.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1620%2E135344%2EfpGFPp)

Stop. *Record scratch. Freeze frame.*
You may be wondering how this girl:
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-july24.5Fk0a0&refcode=em240705-2-400&t=2&akid=1620%2E135344%2EfpGFPp)
Ended up here:
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-july24.5Fk0a0&refcode=em240705-2-400&t=3&akid=1620%2E135344%2EfpGFPp)
Serving my first of three tours in Iraq as a CIA analyst in Iraq, working to understand terrorist and militia groups that were targeting US forces and Iraqi civilians and plotting against the U.S.
It started on 9/11. One of the big moments that changed my life.
I was 24 years old, and I happened to be in New York City on my second day of grad school. By the time the dust had settled, I knew that I wanted to go into national security and protect my country.
Several months later, the CIA came to campus and my favorite professor encouraged me to hear what they had to say. Not wanting to disappoint him, I went. I applied, got the job, and after a lengthy background check, I started in Langley as an analyst.
It wasn’t long before I found myself in Iraq, my first of three deployments.
Going from the national security world to politics was a major culture shock. For 16 years, I didn’t talk publicly about my work—when I posted on Facebook that I was thinking about running for Congress, people asked me if I’d been hacked. One thing I definitely hadn’t done was ask people for money.
To be upfront: Winning this race is going to take a lot of resources. A crazy amount. When you're running to win a seat in a swing state like Michigan, you can't take anything for granted.
[**If keeping Michigan's Senate seat blue this November feels worth $3 to you, that's the donation I am asking you to make to my campaign today.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-july24.5Fk0a0&refcode=em240705-2-400&t=4&akid=1620%2E135344%2EfpGFPp)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8acf2c6f10ab4e61a965ead9ad2b241f&_e=IqxbRoUUe6KOc2Yz9DR4nkccJZBU5Z5KIY1XYo-i4B1oMBlgj7V9aMeyg6GZmAmLDhHVI3YYzzlBfpQXsoAoO0nzYIbym0SiPRmnq7W_OuCuI1DH7iDYJiKJH1Jt4G4q7hkr7H2FcAXAufts4_BRcjXw6qFobXKmcSJb5DtcjLmqpmFjNU7cnaQNkOzwQFO7sxuZkf3SgsgiZJWh07Tp5H4YiaHS3VH_CAZY4kUvoeKkeI31SW7-L969kRZ-T-axLYvlwpXXwdB2V8k2ei3R8xV_CC-mjPBwuhJQBkBgs4SdqmyRrDj3n-WanNBhUqSHG4eDzWPcN3z37e-8oqg661m1yTh1xcZX7yJOT0bmcEo%3D)

| | **No 💰 for the Taliban**
---
| |
---
In case you missed my email last week, I'm fired up to tell you that we just scored a huge win in the House of Representatives. The "[No Tax Dollars for the Taliban Act](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8acf2c6f10ab4e61a965ead9ad2b241f&_e=IqxbRoUUe6KOc2Yz9DR4nlUJj9-0KPWskPe0L1pbBJtJw6D8f4YqfcroYkkc4muZMHl9IoKhjJGE-6jPGHSH7OjU9Kic5lZojoL4jt6OdINKwatcr3GYWK_J3Do6xvGhhztdvF2u__P9mtKC2VyedVZyGRxQaRVoeOQsKovcKLXb2QlJ0a4wn4PFFsB-aY6nptMYp8OLJ2C9CsX3Ofow6QaVKdgQgqy2KzYlCFF2FV2M3NJXRO1XiPw0XPCj7wbzGaPr5KVWZaqvyM4IvX1kWi__7-62h0HSKdrpFMnV6nESoUmZFeXwltUzMpkdKW7dY2M7F94lbZENS2zGDtWzdg%3D%3D)" has passed, and let me tell you, it's about time! For far too long, millions of your hard-earned dollars have been slipping through the cracks and ending up in the hands of the Taliban. That's right, folks—your tax dollars have been funding the very people who want to do us harm. According to [recent reports](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8acf2c6f10ab4e61a965ead9ad2b241f&_e=IqxbRoUUe6KOc2Yz9DR4ntSMoSGl2NnOzJGtkxo5uhGt6Tul93yyyQhIzS8ivHG4AdFZCuynG3tN4vGxjzNvJl3CPPT7b-5MGc38WN-5hB1YPVY4ZVnjdLaNp2jnqpXkEMp-V4ABEemnvda9s5m4Daf44ALM1_0DAgXcmP40QBf7OqMxfqaErbAbga_Df0n7nY27KA5Aqlhcp2ASsg2j0ldkmrOyjlU2bKvUDCK6_H0HgQlZ8bfxTOrDy1rae5rDRX98zSl_0OsrjtnG2BtrUtu6eq9sqPOdydIeJXNEoHcXkT0oyNgJ_JnGQ8q998rBxdZNjkIMD9Q4fC-5mIPbv5KGAyzb-NHxfmbu-m7BZdU%3D), the U.S. has knowingly or unknowingly funneled tens of millions of dollars to the Taliban. We’re drawing a dadgum line in the sand. With this bill, we’ve put a stop to the madness. We’re bringing in tough oversight and accountability measures to make sure not a single red cent of American money ends up with those terrorists. This is a fight for our security, our principles, and our tax dollars. The [bill enforces](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8acf2c6f10ab4e61a965ead9ad2b241f&_e=IqxbRoUUe6KOc2Yz9DR4nrzcUjYW8ufmyRj4O1Szk44STOLzedsrWM_oQzolmPzninIeP2d4epF1huGaTnQcc3LjdB7huG81tDZnxqIT1J5x_q7ftmUbgNi-fd8Fzvh9gVhx7CR4gDMZQUJ6G1b_g4FreKsz6oQP7ySrtCt6NW3aedGrITHUAyx0B1iUxCHhigTqT3gwd73VyIERnZ0UgoqNolyC2cOT6XEAfQC3O5fnsHQHJn9kbJ3kABHDIx3rqVrlE7Q0SZRa-NQYrAEL0u6j-q3qGH7cevl6vD5rYjcFxvbPm01_9lrrNAYU1mEp) strict measures to monitor and audit where our aid is going, ensuring that we don’t inadvertently [support those who aim to undermine our country](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8acf2c6f10ab4e61a965ead9ad2b241f&_e=IqxbRoUUe6KOc2Yz9DR4nhCVG-ZTkuQStHzea5Tlf3__5ndlg_KHPDLY-p8xTXtMYCLz3MfheWFWD0jEgu3m45VSIUg-bNeVQCpw8q_8E8r8q_AAu-8yDtfJz7ljp6BeDaFYnb4NJoLrA7I50nwBWahDNKGU9nMFyVIl_Qw0DbZnM_vxx_23DMG5kObepmN-0xg6w3JH59edC2234z_ZgorSR6PLOednFc8AVVmy7P06zvp3vxF93FRUatZ8leO7wunWIvvW0cCIfbAnhplpRGjWXWenEQbHHdGEuc7OO1Z6LmEbd3h6fsA48KSHvdu9fs7rRBM1Pt5FkwkSm_vxDw%3D%3D). It’s what I’ve been saying to you all along: **follow. every. penny.** We will not be complacent while our enemies use our resources against us. Per the Department of Defense, nearly $1 billion in U.S. aid has been at risk of diversion to the Taliban. This [legislation](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8acf2c6f10ab4e61a965ead9ad2b241f&_e=IqxbRoUUe6KOc2Yz9DR4nsxas4KsxRwZxpX2gkGlA1Bfoyd3zVgT9RN-ybqVzH2AvjkDMRK3Cd5vawVri0RVggn1pGRFhRcB6mFZKnyNMBsFyq8NOM2jYH_BllWeLlGYJyF2l8_fyvv652tQrq5OXgbe9DKbHBsWjaK56PkJ2ADcqvHA8xiog5d77pVe7Ecv8llEhXtQbK_SN3TIokyX58FIBDcpTQ6kL7qT8oG6pfp63GrjVURwpYN8C5qT3mrpp8Ct8nNkpJdQzSP2KwYOaa2o-Mlb-7uMMHVTeeKXgAGcwvkGQT4XZlXyJXohWoGf3abpm3AxP82PJT9ixjnO1a1N6q9wKXkesM2l9PwSQ24%3D) aims to close those loopholes and protect our investments in national security and international stability. I'm proud of my colleagues who stood with me, shoulder to shoulder, to make this happen. We’re sending a loud and clear message to the world: the United States will not be a piggy bank for terrorists.
---

| | I’d like to thank each and every one of you who took the time to walk with me in Farragut’s Independence Day Parade! It was an incredible morning that really demonstrated the patriotism that serves as the cornerstone of East Tennessee. There were families decked out in red, white, and blue and too many American flags to count—just as it should be! After the parade, I spent time with my family enjoying some delicious grub and reflecting on how blessed we are to live in this country. It’s because of fantastic people like you that conservative values live on and help our families thrive, and I’m forever grateful to be a part of this important movement. God bless America!

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | No 💰 for the Taliban | | In case you missed my email last week, I'm fired up to tell you that we just scored a huge win in the House of Representatives. The "" has passed, and let me tell you, it's about time! For far too long, millions of your hard-earned dollars have been slipping through the cracks and ending up in the hands of the Taliban. That's right, folks—your tax dollars have been funding the very people who want to do us harm. According to , the U.S. has knowingly or unknowingly funneled tens of millions of dollars to the Taliban. We’re drawing a dadgum line in the sand. With this bill, we’ve put a stop to the madness. We’re bringing in tough oversight and accountability measures to make sure not a single red cent of American money ends up with those terrorists. This is a fight for our security, our principles, and our tax dollars. The strict measures to monitor and audit where our aid is going, ensuring that we don’t inadvertently . It’s what I’ve been saying to you all along: follow. every. penny. We will not be complacent while our enemies use our resources against us. Per the Department of Defense, nearly $1 billion in U.S. aid has been at risk of diversion to the Taliban. This aims to close those loopholes and protect our investments in national security and international stability. I'm proud of my colleagues who stood with me, shoulder to shoulder, to make this happen. We’re sending a loud and clear message to the world: the United States will not be a piggy bank for terrorists. | | | | | The Home of the Free 🇺🇲 | | | | I’d like to thank each and every one of you who took the time to walk with me in Farragut’s Independence Day Parade! It was an incredible morning that really demonstrated the patriotism that serves as the cornerstone of East Tennessee. There were families decked out in red, white, and blue and too many American flags to count—just as it should be! After the parade, I spent time with my family enjoying some delicious grub and reflecting on how blessed we are to live in this country. It’s because of fantastic people like you that conservative values live on and help our families thrive, and I’m forever grateful to be a part of this important movement. God bless America! | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → This world needs more Emmas 😲 () → Nothing beats that new puppy smell 🥰 ()→ Can I come? 😛 () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

After an embarrassing debate performance, Joe Biden is turning to Wisconsin because he knows whoever wins here will win the Presidency. Since taking office, the Biden Administration has been a disaster for our country. From skyrocketing inflation and a border crisis spiraling out of control to the reckless spending spree that threatens our economic stability, Biden's policies ignored hard working Americans who are struggling to make ends meet. Joe Biden thinks a quick visit can distract us from his record of failure. **Biden has made it clear the future of his campaign hinges upon Wisconsin.** We are asking you to make a statement and [_**STAND UP**_](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mjtttdk-didthutlhu-y/) to Joe Biden and the Far-Left. name: Don Jr.
subject: Thank you, Fellow American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Fellow American,

We couldn’t do it without your support for the America First agenda.

Patriots like you are the backbone of our movement and I am thankful every day for your support for the principled GOP candidates who will help my father lead our country back to freedom and prosperity.

When I reach out for support, you ALWAYS answer the call. Whether we need help sending emergency funds to critical races or supporting vital advertising campaigns to spread the truth to voters, we can count on patriots like you, Fellow American.

Fellow American, I am grateful for your support for our Republican campaign to Make America Great Again. Our country is hurting thanks to Joe Biden and Democrats leading us down all the wrong roads.

**Fellow American, please know we could not do this without you. Thank you for everything you have done and will do for GOP candidates in 2024.**

But we are still getting crushed in the fundraising race. Some of our candidates are behind by as much as $3 to $1. We MUST turn these fundraising numbers around, or we will have no hope of recapturing the U.S. Senate.

[**Please make a donation to the NRSC today.**](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=42ed11c4593540b08d6ad6bcc3f5220f&_e=7hiWDQyU93kkAAdsCahO-6eZDvxT0emzPsGPIFXLShD0DkhSpI6mr4VZEBYRPY2GoJ0aQEQO74fpBkaopWBbqKwA0L93Eh2EVXiaNLJY08czTtBPd3RG46SusVnEvcmtV-qTkktBbLYKg34MkWxtP9hSNwcZALbLKGD34l8XmqJ-mjwfx8tgeuKZwuK7T_y9eVMv7msIs9VPVDEctUjoBuiXRgupf334x6yg-mxa-_UA244N-KOj-lnv_Vckbm-V-mN5WWU6lhrFsHHef9Cd3yu8J1KqGYz057qBdAv8Bfu9rk2Dlz5eZiOOo3EibJpY4ZhoiZIaYM1ASsJaMr0o1QMZgi4IZJ8RLR9JXQPO31jPNgdzHLaXdYMRyhtZMXRBAEHmPQGcEx5A-23LwfdrU-R8Vis0o1y4mukJ_O0lswP4-9UWs1o1zAMaki1weSnJSGXrjbvQO_IJOQ9ds4VghO1JwwQ6wBLWTsL2X6miEltxO0ZmE3Jbn-VnG1QNoXr2)

name: Orlando Sonza
subject: Sonza for Congress Newsletter - July 5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sonza For Congress
body:
I hope you had a relaxing and dry Fourth of July! Team Sonza came out and showed voters in Southwest Ohio that we have a groundswell of support for | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | I hope you had a relaxing and dry Fourth of July, Peter!

**Team Sonza came out and showed voters in Southwest Ohio that we have a groundswell of support for this race.**

It was great to see such patriotism around the district. Check out some photos below or visit our [Facebook page](https://orlandosonza.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51038eb70764b0f1ec2166a2b&id=ac585fae19&e=6bb1d60162) to see all our activities!
---
|
---
---
|
---

| | As I have said before, we can only win this race with support from people like you.

**Peter, i****f you could give us a boost with $10, $25, $50, or $100, it could make a big difference in November.**
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://orlandosonza.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51038eb70764b0f1ec2166a2b&id=368ecc4920&e=6bb1d60162 "DONATE TODAY")

| | This week, I joined Chris Long with the Ohio Christian Alliance to discuss inflation and the crisis at our southern border.

**You can hear what families are telling me about the impact of Bidenomics in the video below.**

**Thanks for staying up to date with the race, and I hope to see you on the campaign trail!**

**Orlando**
